While large language models (LLMs) have significantly enhanced dialogue capabilities, most current systems still rely on cascaded architectures that connect independent modules. These pipelines are often plagued by accumulated errors, high latency, and poor real-time performance. Lacking access to the underlying conversational context, these pipelines inherently prioritize rigid lip-sync over emotional depth. To address these challenges, we propose A$^2$-LLM, an end-to-end conversational audio avatar large language model that jointly reasons about language, audio prosody, and 3D facial motion within a unified framework. To facilitate training, we introduce FLAME-QA, a high-quality multimodal dataset designed to align semantic intent with expressive facial dynamics within a QA format. By leveraging deep semantic understanding, A$^2$-LLM generates emotionally rich facial movements beyond simple lip-synchronization. Experimental results demonstrate that our system achieves superior emotional expressiveness while maintaining real-time efficiency (500 ms latency, 0.7 RTF).
tldr: The paper introduces A$^2$-LLM, an end-to-end LLM for conversational audio avatars that jointly models language, audio prosody, and 3D facial motion, along with the FLAME-QA dataset for training emotionally expressive avatars.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 A$^2$-LLM，一个端到端的 LLM，用于生成会话音频头像，它联合建模语言、音频韵律和 3D 面部运动，并伴随 FLAME-QA 数据集，用于训练富有情感表达的头像。
summary_zh: 开发具有表现力和响应能力的对话式数字人是下一代人机交互的基石。 虽然大型语言模型（LLMs）已显著提升了对话能力，但目前大多数系统仍依赖于连接独立模块的级联架构。这些流水线常受累于累积误差、高延迟和不良的实时性能。由于缺乏对底层对话语境的访问，这些流水线本质上优先考虑刚性的口型同步，而非情感深度。 为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了A$^2$-LLM，一个端到端的对话式音频头像大型语言模型，它在统一框架内联合推理语言、音频韵律和3D面部运动。为了促进训练，我们引入了FLAME-QA，一个高质量的多模态数据集，旨在以问答形式对齐语义意图与富有表现力的面部动态。 通过利用深度语义理解，A$^2$-LLM生成超出简单口型同步的情感丰富的面部运动。 实验结果表明，我们的系统在保持实时效率（500 ms延迟，0.7 RTF）的同时，实现了卓越的情感表现力。

title: Scaling In-Context Online Learning Capability of LLMs via Cross-Episode Meta-RL
summary: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance when all task-relevant information is available upfront, as in static prediction and instruction-following problems. However, many real-world decision-making tasks are inherently online: crucial information must be acquired through interaction, feedback is delayed, and effective behavior requires balancing information collection and exploitation over time. While in-context learning enables adaptation without weight updates, existing LLMs often struggle to reliably leverage in-context interaction experience in such settings. In this work, we show that this limitation can be addressed through training. We introduce ORBIT, a multi-task, multi-episode meta-reinforcement learning framework that trains LLMs to learn from interaction in context. After meta-training, a relatively small open-source model (Qwen3-14B) demonstrates substantially improved in-context online learning on entirely unseen environments, matching the performance of GPT-5.2 and outperforming standard RL fine-tuning by a large margin. Scaling experiments further reveal consistent gains with model size, suggesting significant headroom for learn-at-inference-time decision-making agents. Code reproducing the results in the paper can be found at https://github.com/XiaofengLin7/ORBIT.
tldr: The paper introduces ORBIT, a meta-RL framework for training LLMs to learn from in-context interaction, achieving strong online learning performance even with smaller models.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了ORBIT，一个元强化学习框架，用于训练LLM从上下文交互中学习，即使使用较小的模型也能实现强大的在线学习性能。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在所有任务相关信息均可预先获取时，能够展现出强大的性能，例如在静态预测和指令遵循问题中。然而，许多现实世界的决策任务本质上是线上的：关键信息必须通过交互来获取，反馈存在延迟，并且有效的行为需要在时间上平衡信息收集和探索利用。虽然上下文学习能够在无需权重更新的情况下实现适应，但现有的LLMs通常难以可靠地利用此类场景中的上下文交互经验。在这项工作中，我们表明可以通过训练来解决这一局限性。我们引入了ORBIT，一个多任务、多轮次的元强化学习框架，用于训练LLMs从上下文中的交互中学习。经过元训练后，一个相对较小的开源模型（Qwen3-14B）在完全未知的环境中展现出大大提高的上下文在线学习能力，与GPT-5.2的性能相匹配，并且大幅优于标准的强化学习微调。扩展实验进一步揭示了模型规模带来的一致增益，表明在推理时学习的决策代理方面存在显著的提升空间。重现本文结果的代码可以在https://github.com/XiaofengLin7/ORBIT找到。

title: AgentArk: Distilling Multi-Agent Intelligence into a Single LLM Agent
summary: While large language model (LLM) multi-agent systems achieve superior reasoning performance through iterative debate, practical deployment is limited by their high computational cost and error propagation. This paper proposes AgentArk, a novel framework to distill multi-agent dynamics into the weights of a single model, effectively transforming explicit test-time interactions into implicit model capabilities. This equips a single agent with the intelligence of multi-agent systems while remaining computationally efficient. Specifically, we investigate three hierarchical distillation strategies across various models, tasks, scaling, and scenarios: reasoning-enhanced fine-tuning; trajectory-based augmentation; and process-aware distillation. By shifting the burden of computation from inference to training, the distilled models preserve the efficiency of one agent while exhibiting strong reasoning and self-correction performance of multiple agents. They further demonstrate enhanced robustness and generalization across diverse reasoning tasks. We hope this work can shed light on future research on efficient and robust multi-agent development. Our code is at https://github.com/AIFrontierLab/AgentArk.
tldr: AgentArk distills the reasoning capabilities of multi-agent LLM systems into a single LLM agent via hierarchical distillation, improving computational efficiency and robustness.
tldr_zh: AgentArk通过分层蒸馏将多智能体LLM系统的推理能力提炼到单个LLM智能体中，从而提高计算效率和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）多智能体系统通过迭代辩论实现卓越的推理性能，但其实际部署受到高计算成本和误差传播的限制。本文提出AgentArk，一种新颖的框架，将多智能体动态提炼到单个模型的权重中，有效地将显式的测试时交互转化为隐式的模型能力。这使得单个智能体具备多智能体系统的智能，同时保持计算效率。具体而言，我们研究了跨越各种模型、任务、规模和场景的三种分层提炼策略：推理增强微调；基于轨迹的增强；以及过程感知提炼。通过将计算负担从推理转移到训练，提炼后的模型保留了单个智能体的效率，同时展现出多个智能体的强大推理和自我纠正性能。它们还展示了在各种推理任务中增强的鲁棒性和泛化能力。我们希望这项工作能够为未来高效且鲁棒的多智能体发展研究提供启示。我们的代码位于https://github.com/AIFrontierLab/AgentArk。

title: Bridging Online and Offline RL: Contextual Bandit Learning for Multi-Turn Code Generation
summary: Recently, there have been significant research interests in training large language models (LLMs) with reinforcement learning (RL) on real-world tasks, such as multi-turn code generation. While online RL tends to perform better than offline RL, its higher training cost and instability hinders wide adoption. In this paper, we build on the observation that multi-turn code generation can be formulated as a one-step recoverable Markov decision process and propose contextual bandit learning with offline trajectories (Cobalt), a new method that combines the benefits of online and offline RL. Cobalt first collects code generation trajectories using a reference LLM and divides them into partial trajectories as contextual prompts. Then, during online bandit learning, the LLM is trained to complete each partial trajectory prompt through single-step code generation. Cobalt outperforms two multi-turn online RL baselines based on GRPO and VeRPO, and substantially improves R1-Distill 8B and Qwen3 8B by up to 9.0 and 6.2 absolute Pass@1 scores on LiveCodeBench. Also, we analyze LLMs' in-context reward hacking behaviors and augment Cobalt training with perturbed trajectories to mitigate this issue. Overall, our results demonstrate Cobalt as a promising solution for iterative decision-making tasks like multi-turn code generation. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/OSU-NLP-Group/cobalt.
tldr: The paper introduces Cobalt, a contextual bandit learning method that combines online and offline RL for multi-turn code generation, outperforming existing online RL baselines and improving LLM performance on LiveCodeBench. It also addresses reward hacking through perturbed trajectories.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为Cobalt的contextual bandit学习方法，结合了在线和离线RL，用于多轮代码生成，优于现有的在线RL基线，并提高了LLM在LiveCodeBench上的性能。 同时，通过扰动轨迹解决了奖励利用问题。
summary_zh: 最近，利用强化学习（RL）在真实世界任务（如多轮代码生成）上训练大型语言模型（LLM）的研究兴趣显著增加。虽然在线强化学习通常比离线强化学习表现更好，但其更高的训练成本和不稳定性阻碍了广泛应用。在本文中，我们基于多轮代码生成可以被公式化为单步可恢复马尔可夫决策过程的观察，提出了一种结合在线和离线强化学习优势的新方法，即基于离线轨迹的上下文老虎机学习（Cobalt）。Cobalt首先使用参考LLM收集代码生成轨迹，并将它们划分为作为上下文提示的部分轨迹。然后，在在线老虎机学习期间，训练LLM通过单步代码生成来完成每个部分轨迹提示。Cobalt优于基于GRPO和VeRPO的两个多轮在线强化学习基线，并且在LiveCodeBench上将R1-Distill 8B 和 Qwen3 8B 的Pass@1 绝对分数分别提高了高达9.0和6.2。此外，我们分析了LLM的上下文奖励利用行为，并使用扰动轨迹来增强Cobalt训练，以缓解这个问题。总的来说，我们的结果表明Cobalt是迭代决策任务（如多轮代码生成）的有希望的解决方案。我们的代码和数据可在 https://github.com/OSU-NLP-Group/cobalt 获取。

title: Annotation Free Spacecraft Detection and Segmentation using Vision Language Models
summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance in open-world zero-shot visual recognition. However, their potential in space-related applications remains largely unexplored. In the space domain, accurate manual annotation is particularly challenging due to factors such as low visibility, illumination variations, and object blending with planetary backgrounds. Developing methods that can detect and segment spacecraft and orbital targets without requiring extensive manual labeling is therefore of critical importance. In this work, we propose an annotation-free detection and segmentation pipeline for space targets using VLMs. Our approach begins by automatically generating pseudo-labels for a small subset of unlabeled real data with a pre-trained VLM. These pseudo-labels are then leveraged in a teacher-student label distillation framework to train lightweight models. Despite the inherent noise in the pseudo-labels, the distillation process leads to substantial performance gains over direct zero-shot VLM inference. Experimental evaluations on the SPARK-2024, SPEED+, and TANGO datasets on segmentation tasks demonstrate consistent improvements in average precision (AP) by up to 10 points. Code and models are available at https://github.com/giddyyupp/annotation-free-spacecraft-segmentation.
tldr: This paper introduces an annotation-free spacecraft detection and segmentation pipeline using Vision Language Models (VLMs) and teacher-student label distillation to train lightweight models, achieving improved average precision on space-related datasets.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于视觉语言模型（VLMs）的无标注航天器检测和分割方法，利用教师-学生标签蒸馏训练轻量级模型，从而在航天相关数据集上实现了更高的平均精度。
summary_zh: 视觉语言模型（VLMs）在开放世界零样本视觉识别中表现出了卓越的性能。然而，它们在航天相关应用中的潜力仍有待探索。在航天领域，由于低可见度、光照变化以及目标与行星背景的融合等因素，准确的人工标注尤其具有挑战性。因此，开发无需大量人工标注即可检测和分割航天器和轨道目标的方法至关重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用VLM进行航天目标无标注检测和分割的流水线。我们的方法首先使用预训练的VLM为少量未标注的真实数据自动生成伪标签。然后，在一个师生标签蒸馏框架中利用这些伪标签来训练轻量级模型。尽管伪标签中存在固有的噪声，但蒸馏过程能够带来显著的性能提升，超过直接的零样本VLM推断。在SPARK-2024、SPEED+ 和 TANGO 数据集上的分割任务实验评估表明，平均精度 (AP) 一致提高了高达 10 个百分点。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/giddyyupp/annotation-free-spacecraft-segmentation 获取。

title: PIO-FVLM: Rethinking Training-Free Visual Token Reduction for VLM Acceleration from an Inference-Objective Perspective
summary: Recently, reducing redundant visual tokens in vision-language models (VLMs) to accelerate VLM inference has emerged as a hot topic. However, most existing methods rely on heuristics constructed based on inter-visual-token similarity or cross-modal visual-text similarity, which gives rise to certain limitations in compression performance and practical deployment. In contrast, we propose PIO-FVLM from the perspective of inference objectives, which transforms visual token compression into preserving output result invariance and selects tokens primarily by their importance to this goal. Specially, vision tokens are reordered with the guidance of token-level gradient saliency generated by our designed layer-local proxy loss, a coarse constraint from the current layer to the final result. Then the most valuable vision tokens are selected following the non-maximum suppression (NMS) principle. The proposed PIO-FVLM is training-free and compatible with FlashAttention, friendly to practical application and deployment. It can be deployed independently as an encoder-free method, or combined with encoder compression approaches like VisionZip for use as an encoder-involved method. On LLaVA-Next-7B, PIO-FVLM retains just 11.1% of visual tokens but maintains 97.2% of the original performance, with a 2.67$\times$ prefill speedup, 2.11$\times$ inference speedup, 6.22$\times$ lower FLOPs, and 6.05$\times$ reduced KV Cache overhead. Our code is available at https://github.com/ocy1/PIO-FVLM.
tldr: The paper introduces PIO-FVLM, a training-free method for visual token reduction in VLMs, which uses gradient saliency to select important tokens, achieving significant speedup and reduced resource consumption with minimal performance loss.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了PIO-FVLM，一种VLM中用于视觉token减少的免训练方法，它利用梯度显著性来选择重要token，在性能损失最小的情况下，实现了显著的加速并降低了资源消耗。
summary_zh: 近来，减少视觉-语言模型(VLMs)中冗余的视觉tokens以加速VLM推理已成为一个热门话题。然而，现有的大多数方法依赖于基于视觉token间的相似性或跨模态视觉-文本相似性构建的启发式方法，这导致压缩性能和实际部署存在一定的局限性。 相反，我们从推理目标的角度出发，提出了PIO-FVLM，它将视觉token压缩转化为保持输出结果不变性，并主要根据其对这个目标的重要性来选择tokens。 具体来说，视觉tokens在由我们设计的层级局部代理损失生成的token级梯度显著性图的引导下被重新排序，该代理损失是从当前层到最终结果的粗略约束。 然后，遵循非极大值抑制 (NMS) 原则选择最有价值的视觉tokens。 所提出的PIO-FVLM是免训练的，并且与FlashAttention兼容，对实际应用和部署友好。 它可以作为一种无编码器的方法独立部署，也可以与像VisionZip这样的编码器压缩方法结合使用，作为一种涉及编码器的方法。 在LLaVA-Next-7B上，PIO-FVLM仅保留了11.1%的视觉tokens，但保持了97.2%的原始性能，实现了2.67倍的预填充加速、2.11倍的推理加速、6.22倍的FLOPs降低和6.05倍的KV Cache开销降低。 我们的代码在https://github.com/ocy1/PIO-FVLM上提供。

title: Self-evolving Embodied AI
summary: Embodied Artificial Intelligence (AI) is an intelligent system formed by agents and their environment through active perception, embodied cognition, and action interaction. Existing embodied AI remains confined to human-crafted setting, in which agents are trained on given memory and construct models for given tasks, enabling fixed embodiments to interact with relatively static environments. Such methods fail in in-the-wild setting characterized by variable embodiments and dynamic open environments. This paper introduces self-evolving embodied AI, a new paradigm in which agents operate based on their changing state and environment with memory self-updating, task self-switching, environment self-prediction, embodiment self-adaptation, and model self-evolution, aiming to achieve continually adaptive intelligence with autonomous evolution. Specifically, we present the definition, framework, components, and mechanisms of self-evolving embodied AI, systematically review state-of-the-art works for realized components, discuss practical applications, and point out future research directions. We believe that self-evolving embodied AI enables agents to autonomously learn and interact with environments in a human-like manner and provide a new perspective toward general artificial intelligence.
tldr: This paper introduces the concept of self-evolving embodied AI, where agents autonomously adapt by updating their memory, switching tasks, predicting environments, adapting their embodiments, and evolving their models, moving towards general AI.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种自进化具身人工智能的概念，在这种概念中，智能体通过更新其记忆、切换任务、预测环境、适应其身体以及进化其模型来实现自主适应，从而朝着通用人工智能的方向发展。
summary_zh: 具身人工智能（AI）是由智能体及其环境通过主动感知、具身认知和行动交互形成的智能系统。现有的具身人工智能仍然局限于人工构建的环境，其中智能体在给定的记忆上进行训练，并为给定的任务构建模型，从而使固定的具身与相对静态的环境进行交互。这种方法在以可变具身和动态开放环境为特征的野外环境中失效。本文介绍了一种自进化具身人工智能，这是一种新的范式，其中智能体基于自身变化的状态和环境进行操作，并具有记忆自更新、任务自切换、环境自预测、具身自适应和模型自进化等能力，旨在实现具有自主进化的持续适应性智能。具体来说，我们给出了自进化具身人工智能的定义、框架、组成部分和机制，系统地回顾了已实现的组件的最新工作，讨论了实际应用，并指出了未来的研究方向。我们相信，自进化具身人工智能能够使智能体以类似于人类的方式自主学习并与环境交互，并为通用人工智能提供一个新的视角。

title: Seeing Through Clutter: Structured 3D Scene Reconstruction via Iterative Object Removal
summary: We present SeeingThroughClutter, a method for reconstructing structured 3D representations from single images by segmenting and modeling objects individually. Prior approaches rely on intermediate tasks such as semantic segmentation and depth estimation, which often underperform in complex scenes, particularly in the presence of occlusion and clutter. We address this by introducing an iterative object removal and reconstruction pipeline that decomposes complex scenes into a sequence of simpler subtasks. Using VLMs as orchestrators, foreground objects are removed one at a time via detection, segmentation, object removal, and 3D fitting. We show that removing objects allows for cleaner segmentations of subsequent objects, even in highly occluded scenes. Our method requires no task-specific training and benefits directly from ongoing advances in foundation models. We demonstrate stateof-the-art robustness on 3D-Front and ADE20K datasets. Project Page: https://rioak.github.io/seeingthroughclutter/
tldr: The paper introduces SeeingThroughClutter, a novel method for 3D scene reconstruction from single images that iteratively removes objects to improve segmentation and 3D fitting, leveraging VLMs as orchestrators and requiring no task-specific training.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SeeingThroughClutter，一种从单张图像中重建3D场景的新方法，通过迭代移除对象来改善分割和3D拟合，利用VLMs作为协调器，无需任务特定的训练。
summary_zh: 我们提出SeeingThroughClutter，一种通过分割和单独建模对象，从单张图像重建结构化3D表示的方法。先前的方法依赖于中间任务，如语义分割和深度估计，这些方法在复杂场景中通常表现不佳，尤其是在存在遮挡和杂物的情况下。我们通过引入一种迭代的对象移除和重建流程来解决这个问题，该流程将复杂场景分解为一系列更简单的子任务。使用VLMs作为协调者，通过检测、分割、对象移除和3D拟合，逐个移除前景对象。我们证明，移除对象可以对后续对象进行更清晰的分割，即使在高度遮挡的场景中也是如此。我们的方法不需要特定于任务的训练，并直接受益于基础模型的持续发展。我们在3D-Front和ADE20K数据集上展示了最先进的鲁棒性。项目页面: https://rioak.github.io/seeingthroughclutter/

title: Fast-Slow Efficient Training for Multimodal Large Language Models via Visual Token Pruning
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) suffer from severe training inefficiency issue, which is associated with their massive model sizes and visual token numbers. Existing efforts in efficient training focus on reducing model sizes or trainable parameters. Inspired by the success of Visual Token Pruning (VTP) in improving inference efficiency, we are exploring another substantial research direction for efficient training by reducing visual tokens. However, applying VTP at the training stage results in a training-inference mismatch: pruning-trained models perform poorly when inferring on non-pruned full visual token sequences. To close this gap, we propose DualSpeed, a fast-slow framework for efficient training of MLLMs. The fast-mode is the primary mode, which incorporates existing VTP methods as plugins to reduce visual tokens, along with a mode isolator to isolate the model's behaviors. The slow-mode is the auxiliary mode, where the model is trained on full visual sequences to retain training-inference consistency. To boost its training, it further leverages self-distillation to learn from the sufficiently trained fast-mode. Together, DualSpeed can achieve both training efficiency and non-degraded performance. Experiments show DualSpeed accelerates the training of LLaVA-1.5 by 2.1$\times$ and LLaVA-NeXT by 4.0$\times$, retaining over 99% performance. Code: https://github.com/dingkun-zhang/DualSpeed
tldr: The paper proposes DualSpeed, a fast-slow training framework for MLLMs that uses visual token pruning in the fast mode and full visual sequences with self-distillation in the slow mode to improve training efficiency while maintaining performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种名为DualSpeed的快慢训练框架，用于多模态大语言模型。该框架在快速模式下使用视觉令牌剪枝，在慢速模式下使用完整的视觉序列和自蒸馏，从而提高训练效率并保持性能。
summary_zh: 多模态大型语言模型(MLLMs)存在严重的训练效率问题，这与其庞大的模型规模和视觉token数量相关。现有的高效训练方法侧重于减小模型规模或可训练参数。受到视觉token剪枝(VTP)在提高推理效率方面成功的启发，我们正在探索另一个通过减少视觉token来实现高效训练的重要研究方向。然而，在训练阶段应用VTP会导致训练-推理不匹配：使用剪枝训练的模型在非剪枝的完整视觉token序列上进行推理时表现不佳。为了弥合这一差距，我们提出DualSpeed，一种用于高效训练MLLMs的快-慢框架。快模式是主要模式，它将现有的VTP方法作为插件来减少视觉token，并配有一个模式隔离器来隔离模型的行为。慢模式是辅助模式，模型在此模式下使用完整的视觉序列进行训练，以保持训练-推理一致性。为了加速训练，慢模式进一步利用自蒸馏从充分训练的快模式中学习。综上，DualSpeed可以实现训练效率和不下降的性能。实验表明，DualSpeed分别加速了LLaVA-1.5的训练2.1倍和LLaVA-NeXT的训练4.0倍，同时保持了99%以上的性能。代码：https://github.com/dingkun-zhang/DualSpeed

title: QUATRO: Query-Adaptive Trust Region Policy Optimization for LLM Fine-tuning
summary: GRPO-style reinforcement learning (RL)-based LLM fine-tuning algorithms have recently gained popularity. Relying on heuristic trust-region approximations, however, they can lead to brittle optimization behavior, as global importance-ratio clipping and group-wise normalization fail to regulate samples whose importance ratios fall outside the clipping range. We propose Query-Adaptive Trust-Region policy Optimization (QUATRO), which directly enforces trust-region constraints through a principled optimization. This yields a clear and interpretable objective that enables explicit control over policy updates and stable, entropy-controlled optimization, with a stabilizer terms arising intrinsically from the exact trust-region formulation. Empirically verified on diverse mathematical reasoning benchmarks, QUATRO shows stable training under increased policy staleness and aggressive learning rates, maintaining well-controlled entropy throughout training.
tldr: QUATRO improves LLM fine-tuning with a query-adaptive trust-region policy optimization method, addressing the instability issues in GRPO-style reinforcement learning by directly enforcing trust-region constraints. It demonstrates improved stability and control over entropy on mathematical reasoning benchmarks.
tldr_zh: QUATRO 提出了一种查询自适应信任区域策略优化方法，用于改进 LLM 的微调，通过直接实施信任区域约束来解决 GRPO 式强化学习中的不稳定性问题。它在数学推理基准测试中表现出更好的稳定性和对熵的控制。
summary_zh: 最近，基于GRPO风格的强化学习（RL）的大语言模型（LLM）微调算法越来越受欢迎。然而，由于依赖于启发式置信域近似，它们可能会导致脆弱的优化行为，因为全局重要性比例裁剪和组别归一化无法有效规范重要性比例超出裁剪范围的样本。我们提出了查询自适应置信域策略优化（QUATRO），它通过一种有原则的优化方法直接强制执行置信域约束。这产生了一个清晰且可解释的目标，能够显式控制策略更新，并实现稳定、熵控制的优化，同时稳定项本质上来自精确的置信域公式。在各种数学推理基准上的实证验证表明，QUATRO在策略陈旧性增加和激进学习率下表现出稳定的训练，并在整个训练过程中保持良好的熵控制。

title: Stochastic Decision Horizons for Constrained Reinforcement Learning
summary: Constrained Markov decision processes (CMDPs) provide a principled model for handling constraints, such as safety and other auxiliary objectives, in reinforcement learning. The common approach of using additive-cost constraints and dual variables often hinders off-policy scalability. We propose a Control as Inference formulation based on stochastic decision horizons, where constraint violations attenuate reward contributions and shorten the effective planning horizon via state-action-dependent continuation. This yields survival-weighted objectives that remain replay-compatible for off-policy actor-critic learning. We propose two violation semantics, absorbing and virtual termination, that share the same survival-weighted return but result in distinct optimization structures that lead to SAC/MPO-style policy improvement. Experiments demonstrate improved sample efficiency and favorable return-violation trade-offs on standard benchmarks. Moreover, MPO with virtual termination (VT-MPO) scales effectively to our high-dimensional musculoskeletal Hyfydy setup.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel Control as Inference formulation for Constrained Reinforcement Learning using stochastic decision horizons and survival-weighted objectives, enabling off-policy scalability and improved performance on standard benchmarks and a high-dimensional musculoskeletal setup.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的基于随机决策范围和生存加权目标函数的约束强化学习的控制即推理框架，实现了离线策略的可扩展性，并在标准基准测试和高维肌肉骨骼装置上提高了性能。
summary_zh: 受约束马尔可夫决策过程(CMDP)为强化学习中处理约束，例如安全性和其他辅助目标，提供了一个有原则的模型。使用加性成本约束和对偶变量的常用方法通常阻碍了离策略的可扩展性。我们提出了一种基于随机决策范围的控制即推断公式，其中违反约束会衰减奖励贡献，并通过状态-动作相关的延续来缩短有效规划范围。 这产生了生存加权目标，其对于离策略的Actor-Critic学习保持了回放兼容性。我们提出了两种违反语义，即吸收终止和虚拟终止，它们共享相同的生存加权回报，但导致了不同的优化结构，从而带来了 SAC/MPO 风格的策略改进。实验表明，在标准基准测试中，样本效率得到提高，并且回报-违反权衡得到改善。此外，具有虚拟终止的MPO (VT-MPO) 可有效地扩展到我们高维的肌肉骨骼Hyfydy设置。

title: MaMa: A Game-Theoretic Approach for Designing Safe Agentic Systems
summary: LLM-based multi-agent systems have demonstrated impressive capabilities, but they also introduce significant safety risks when individual agents fail or behave adversarially. In this work, we study the automated design of agentic systems that remain safe even when a subset of agents is compromised. We formalize this challenge as a Stackelberg security game between a system designer (the Meta-Agent) and a best-responding Meta-Adversary that selects and compromises a subset of agents to minimize safety. We propose Meta-Adversary-Meta-Agent (MaMa), a novel algorithm for approximately solving this game and automatically designing safe agentic systems. Our approach uses LLM-based adversarial search, where the Meta-Agent iteratively proposes system designs and receives feedback based on the strongest attacks discovered by the Meta-Adversary. Empirical evaluations across diverse environments show that systems designed with MaMa consistently defend against worst-case attacks while maintaining performance comparable to systems optimized solely for task success. Moreover, the resulting systems generalize to stronger adversaries, as well as ones with different attack objectives or underlying LLMs, demonstrating robust safety beyond the training setting.
tldr: The paper introduces MaMa, a game-theoretic algorithm that uses LLMs to design multi-agent systems robust to adversarial attacks, demonstrating improved safety and generalizability across different environments and adversaries.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了MaMa，一种博弈论算法，使用LLM来设计能够抵抗对抗性攻击的多智能体系统，展示了在不同环境和对抗者中的改进的安全性和泛化能力。
summary_zh: 基于大型语言模型的多智能体系统已经展现出令人瞩目的性能，但当单个智能体失效或做出对抗行为时，它们也引入了显著的安全风险。在这项工作中，我们研究了智能体系统的自动化设计，即使一部分智能体受到损害，系统仍然能保持安全。我们将这一挑战形式化为一个Stackelberg安全博弈，其中系统设计者（元代理）与一个最佳应对的元对抗者进行博弈，元对抗者选择并损害一部分智能体以最小化安全性。我们提出Meta-Adversary-Meta-Agent (MaMa)，一种用于近似求解该博弈并自动设计安全智能体系统的新颖算法。我们的方法使用基于大型语言模型的对抗搜索，其中元代理迭代地提出系统设计，并根据元对抗者发现的最强攻击接收反馈。在不同环境下的经验评估表明，使用MaMa设计的系统能够持续防御最坏情况下的攻击，同时保持与仅针对任务成功优化的系统相当的性能。此外，由此产生的系统能够泛化到更强的对抗者，以及具有不同攻击目标或底层大型语言模型的对抗者，从而在训练环境之外展现出强大的安全性。

title: Training Data Efficiency in Multimodal Process Reward Models
summary: Multimodal Process Reward Models (MPRMs) are central to step-level supervision for visual reasoning in MLLMs. Training MPRMs typically requires large-scale Monte Carlo (MC)-annotated corpora, incurring substantial training cost. This paper studies the data efficiency for MPRM training. Our preliminary experiments reveal that MPRM training quickly saturates under random subsampling of the training data, indicating substantial redundancy within existing MC-annotated corpora. To explain this, we formalize a theoretical framework and reveal that informative gradient updates depend on two factors: label mixtures of positive/negative steps and label reliability (average MC scores of positive steps). Guided by these insights, we propose the Balanced-Information Score (BIS), which prioritizes both mixture and reliability based on existing MC signals at the rollout level, without incurring any additional cost. Across two backbones (InternVL2.5-8B and Qwen2.5-VL-7B) on VisualProcessBench, BIS-selected subsets consistently match and even surpass the full-data performance at small fractions. Notably, the BIS subset reaches full-data performance using only 10% of the training data, improving over random subsampling by a relative 4.1%.
tldr: This paper introduces a data selection method (BIS) for Multimodal Process Reward Models (MPRMs) which significantly improves training data efficiency, achieving full-data performance with only 10% of the training data.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于多模态过程奖励模型（MPRM）的数据选择方法（BIS），该方法显著提高了训练数据的效率，仅用10%的训练数据即可达到完整数据的性能。
summary_zh: 多模态过程奖励模型（MPRMs）是MLLMs中视觉推理的步骤级监督的核心。训练MPRMs通常需要大规模的蒙特卡洛（MC）标注语料库，导致巨大的训练成本。本文研究了MPRM训练的数据效率。我们的初步实验表明，MPRM训练在训练数据的随机子抽样下迅速饱和，表明现有MC标注语料库中存在大量冗余。为了解释这一点，我们形式化了一个理论框架，并揭示了信息量大的梯度更新取决于两个因素：正/负步骤的标签混合和标签可靠性（正步骤的平均MC分数）。受这些见解的指导，我们提出了平衡信息分数（BIS），它在无需任何额外成本的情况下，基于现有的rollout层级的MC信号优先考虑混合和可靠性。在VisualProcessBench上的两个骨干网络（InternVL2.5-8B和Qwen2.5-VL-7B）上，BIS选择的子集始终能匹配甚至超越全部数据在小比例下的性能。值得注意的是，BIS子集仅使用10%的训练数据即可达到全部数据的性能，相对于随机子抽样提高了4.1%。

title: Understanding and Exploiting Weight Update Sparsity for Communication-Efficient Distributed RL
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) is a critical component for post-training large language models (LLMs). However, in bandwidth-constrained distributed RL, scalability is often bottlenecked by the synchronization of policy weights from trainers to inference workers, particularly over commodity networks or in decentralized settings. While recent studies suggest that RL updates modify only a small fraction of model parameters, these observations are typically based on coarse checkpoint differences. We present a systematic empirical study of weight-update sparsity at both step-level and multi-step granularities, examining its evolution across training dynamics, off-policy delay, and model scale. We find that update sparsity is consistently high, frequently exceeding 99% across practically relevant settings. Leveraging this structure, we propose PULSE (Patch Updates via Lossless Sparse Encoding), a simple yet highly efficient lossless weight synchronization method that transmits only the indices and values of modified parameters. PULSE is robust to transmission errors and avoids floating-point drift inherent in additive delta schemes. In bandwidth-constrained decentralized environments, our approach achieves over 100x (14 GB to ~108 MB) communication reduction while maintaining bit-identical training dynamics and performance compared to full weight synchronization. By exploiting this structure, PULSE enables decentralized RL training to approach centralized throughput, reducing the bandwidth required for weight synchronization from 20 Gbit/s to 0.2 Gbit/s to maintain high GPU utilization.
tldr: This paper introduces PULSE, a communication-efficient weight synchronization method for distributed RL that exploits weight update sparsity to achieve significant bandwidth reduction (up to 100x) without performance degradation, making decentralized RL training comparable to centralized throughput.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了PULSE，一种用于分布式强化学习的通信高效的权重同步方法，它利用权重更新的稀疏性，在不降低性能的情况下显著减少带宽 (高达100倍)，使去中心化强化学习训练与中心化吞吐量相媲美。
summary_zh: 强化学习（RL）是大型语言模型（LLMs）后训练的关键组成部分。然而，在带宽受限的分布式RL中，可扩展性常常受到策略权重从训练器到推理工作器的同步的瓶颈限制，特别是在使用通用网络或去中心化环境中。尽管最近的研究表明，RL更新仅修改一小部分模型参数，但这些观察通常基于粗略的检查点差异。我们对步长级别和多步长粒度的权重更新稀疏性进行系统的实证研究，考察其在训练动态、离线策略延迟和模型规模中的演变。我们发现，在实际相关的设置中，更新稀疏性始终很高，经常超过99％。利用这种结构，我们提出PULSE（通过无损稀疏编码进行补丁更新），这是一种简单但高效的无损权重同步方法，仅传输修改后的参数的索引和值。PULSE对传输错误具有鲁棒性，并避免了加性增量方案中固有的浮点漂移。在带宽受限的去中心化环境中，与完整权重同步相比，我们的方法实现了超过100倍的通信量减少（从14 GB到约108 MB），同时保持了比特相同的训练动态和性能。通过利用这种结构，PULSE使去中心化RL训练能够接近中心化吞吐量，从而将权重同步所需的带宽从20 Gbit/s降低至0.2 Gbit/s，以维持高GPU利用率。

title: Beyond the Control Equations: An Artifact Study of Implementation Quality in Robot Control Software
summary: A controller -- a software module managing hardware behavior -- is a key component of a typical robot system. While control theory gives safety guarantees for standard controller designs, the practical implementation of controllers in software introduces complexities that are often overlooked. Controllers are often designed in continuous space, while the software is executed in discrete space, undermining some of the theoretical guarantees. Despite extensive research on control theory and control modeling, little attention has been paid to the implementations of controllers and how their theoretical guarantees are ensured in real-world software systems. We investigate 184 real-world controller implementations in open-source robot software. We examine their application context, the implementation characteristics, and the testing methods employed to ensure correctness. We find that the implementations often handle discretization in an ad hoc manner, leading to potential issues with real-time reliability. Challenges such as timing inconsistencies, lack of proper error handling, and inadequate consideration of real-time constraints further complicate matters. Testing practices are superficial, no systematic verification of theoretical guarantees is used, leaving possible inconsistencies between expected and actual behavior. Our findings highlight the need for improved implementation guidelines and rigorous verification techniques to ensure the reliability and safety of robotic controllers in practice.
tldr: This paper analyzes real-world robot controller implementations, revealing common pitfalls like ad-hoc discretization handling, timing inconsistencies, and inadequate testing, highlighting the need for improved implementation guidelines and verification techniques.
tldr_zh: 本文分析了现实世界中的机器人控制器实现，揭示了常见的缺陷，如临时离散化处理、时序不一致和不充分的测试，强调了改进实施指南和验证技术的必要性。
summary_zh: 控制器——一种管理硬件行为的软件模块——是典型机器人系统的关键组成部分。虽然控制理论为标准控制器设计提供了安全保障，但控制器在软件中的实际实现引入了常被忽视的复杂性。控制器通常在连续空间中设计，而软件在离散空间中执行，这削弱了部分理论保障。尽管控制理论和控制建模方面有大量的研究，但很少关注控制器的实现以及如何在真实世界的软件系统中确保其理论保障。我们调查了开源机器人软件中的184个真实控制器实现。我们检查了它们的应用背景、实现特性以及用于确保正确性的测试方法。我们发现，这些实现通常以临时的方式处理离散化，导致潜在的实时可靠性问题。诸如时序不一致、缺乏适当的错误处理以及对实时约束考虑不足等挑战进一步使情况复杂化。测试实践流于表面，没有系统地验证理论保障，导致预期行为和实际行为之间可能存在不一致性。我们的发现强调了需要改进的实现指南和严格的验证技术，以确保机器人控制器在实践中的可靠性和安全性。

title: PuppetAI: A Customizable Platform for Designing Tactile-Rich Affective Robot Interaction
summary: We introduce PuppetAI, a modular soft robot interaction platform. This platform offers a scalable cable-driven actuation system and a customizable, puppet-inspired robot gesture framework, supporting a multitude of interaction gesture robot design formats. The platform comprises a four-layer decoupled software architecture that includes perceptual processing, affective modeling, motion scheduling, and low-level actuation. We also implemented an affective expression loop that connects human input to the robot platform by producing real-time emotional gestural responses to human vocal input. For our own designs, we have worked with nuanced gestures enacted by "soft robots" with enhanced dexterity and "pleasant-to-touch" plush exteriors. By reducing operational complexity and production costs while enhancing customizability, our work creates an adaptable and accessible foundation for future tactile-based expressive robot research. Our goal is to provide a platform that allows researchers to independently construct or refine highly specific gestures and movements performed by social robots.
tldr: The paper introduces PuppetAI, a customizable and modular platform for tactile-rich, affective robot interaction, aiming to simplify the development of expressive robot gestures and movements.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了PuppetAI，一个用于触觉丰富的、情感机器人交互的可定制模块化平台，旨在简化表达性机器人姿势和动作的开发。
summary_zh: 我们介绍了PuppetAI，一个模块化的软体机器人交互平台。该平台提供了一个可扩展的缆索驱动系统和一个可定制的、受傀儡启发的机器人姿态框架，支持多种交互姿态机器人设计格式。该平台包含一个四层解耦的软件架构，包括感知处理、情感建模、运动调度和底层驱动。我们还实现了一个情感表达回路，通过产生对人类语音输入的实时情感姿态响应，将人类输入连接到机器人平台。对于我们自己的设计，我们致力于利用具有增强灵巧性和“触感舒适”的毛绒外饰的“软体机器人”来实现细微的姿态。通过降低操作复杂性和生产成本，同时增强可定制性，我们的工作为未来基于触觉的表情机器人研究创建了一个适应性强且易于访问的基础。我们的目标是提供一个平台，使研究人员能够独立构建或优化社交机器人执行的高度特定的姿态和动作。

title: From Vision to Assistance: Gaze and Vision-Enabled Adaptive Control for a Back-Support Exoskeleton
summary: Back-support exoskeletons have been proposed to mitigate spinal loading in industrial handling, yet their effectiveness critically depends on timely and context-aware assistance. Most existing approaches rely either on load-estimation techniques (e.g., EMG, IMU) or on vision systems that do not directly inform control. In this work, we present a vision-gated control framework for an active lumbar occupational exoskeleton that leverages egocentric vision with wearable gaze tracking. The proposed system integrates real-time grasp detection from a first-person YOLO-based perception system, a finite-state machine (FSM) for task progression, and a variable admittance controller to adapt torque delivery to both posture and object state. A user study with 15 participants performing stooping load lifting trials under three conditions (no exoskeleton, exoskeleton without vision, exoskeleton with vision) shows that vision-gated assistance significantly reduces perceived physical demand and improves fluency, trust, and comfort. Quantitative analysis reveals earlier and stronger assistance when vision is enabled, while questionnaire results confirm user preference for the vision-gated mode. These findings highlight the potential of egocentric vision to enhance the responsiveness, ergonomics, safety, and acceptance of back-support exoskeletons.
tldr: This paper presents a vision-gated control framework for a back-support exoskeleton that uses egocentric vision and gaze tracking to provide context-aware assistance, demonstrating improved user comfort and reduced physical demand compared to exoskeletons lacking vision.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于视觉门控控制的背部支撑外骨骼框架，该框架利用以自我为中心的视觉和眼动追踪来提供上下文感知的辅助，与缺乏视觉的外骨骼相比，证明了用户舒适度的提高和身体需求的降低。
summary_zh: 后背支撑外骨骼被提议用于减轻工业搬运中的脊柱负荷，但其有效性关键取决于及时且上下文相关的辅助。现有的大多数方法依赖于负荷估计技术（例如，EMG、IMU）或无法直接告知控制的视觉系统。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个用于主动腰椎职业外骨骼的视觉门控控制框架，该框架利用以人为中心的视觉与可穿戴的视线跟踪。该系统集成了来自基于第一人称YOLO的感知系统的实时抓取检测、用于任务进展的有限状态机 (FSM) 以及用于根据姿势和物体状态调整扭矩传递的可变顺应性控制器。一项包含15名参与者在三种条件下（无外骨骼、无视觉的外骨骼、有视觉的外骨骼）进行弯腰负重试验的用户研究表明，视觉门控辅助显著降低了感知到的体力需求，并提高了流畅性、信任度和舒适度。定量分析表明，启用视觉时，辅助更早且更强，而问卷调查结果证实了用户对视觉门控模式的偏好。这些发现突出了以人为中心的视觉在增强后背支撑外骨骼的响应性、人体工程学、安全性和接受度方面的潜力。

title: S-MUSt3R: Sliding Multi-view 3D Reconstruction
summary: The recent paradigm shift in 3D vision led to the rise of foundation models with remarkable capabilities in 3D perception from uncalibrated images. However, extending these models to large-scale RGB stream 3D reconstruction remains challenging due to memory limitations. This work proposes S-MUSt3R, a simple and efficient pipeline that extends the limits of foundation models for monocular 3D reconstruction. Our approach addresses the scalability bottleneck of foundation models through a simple strategy of sequence segmentation followed by segment alignment and lightweight loop closure optimization. Without model retraining, we benefit from remarkable 3D reconstruction capacities of MUSt3R model and achieve trajectory and reconstruction performance comparable to traditional methods with more complex architecture. We evaluate S-MUSt3R on TUM, 7-Scenes and proprietary robot navigation datasets and show that S-MUSt3R runs successfully on long RGB sequences and produces accurate and consistent 3D reconstruction. Our results highlight the potential of leveraging the MUSt3R model for scalable monocular 3D scene in real-world settings, with an important advantage of making predictions directly in the metric space.
tldr: S-MUSt3R is a simple and efficient pipeline that extends the MUSt3R foundation model for scalable monocular 3D reconstruction by segmenting sequences, aligning segments, and optimizing loop closures without retraining.
tldr_zh: S-MUSt3R是一个简单高效的流程，通过分割序列、对齐片段和优化闭环，扩展了MUSt3R基础模型，实现可扩展的单目3D重建，且无需重新训练。
summary_zh: 3D视觉领域的最新范式转变促成了具有卓越的、基于非标定图像的3D感知能力的基础模型的兴起。然而，由于内存限制，将这些模型扩展到大规模RGB流3D重建仍然具有挑战性。本工作提出S-MUSt3R，一种简单高效的流水线，旨在突破基础模型在单目3D重建中的局限性。我们的方法通过序列分割、分段对齐和轻量级回环闭合优化这一简单策略，解决了基础模型的可扩展性瓶颈。无需模型重训练，我们即可受益于MUSt3R模型出色的3D重建能力，并获得与采用更复杂架构的传统方法相当的轨迹和重建性能。我们在TUM、7-Scenes和专有机器人导航数据集上评估了S-MUSt3R，结果表明S-MUSt3R能够成功运行于长RGB序列，并产生准确且一致的3D重建。我们的结果突出了利用MUSt3R模型在真实场景中进行可扩展的单目3D场景重建的潜力，一个重要的优势是可以直接在度量空间中进行预测。

title: TACO: Temporal Consensus Optimization for Continual Neural Mapping
summary: Neural implicit mapping has emerged as a powerful paradigm for robotic navigation and scene understanding. However, real-world robotic deployment requires continual adaptation to changing environments under strict memory and computation constraints, which existing mapping systems fail to support. Most prior methods rely on replaying historical observations to preserve consistency and assume static scenes. As a result, they cannot adapt to continual learning in dynamic robotic settings. To address these challenges, we propose TACO (TemporAl Consensus Optimization), a replay-free framework for continual neural mapping. We reformulate mapping as a temporal consensus optimization problem, where we treat past model snapshots as temporal neighbors. Intuitively, our approach resembles a model consulting its own past knowledge. We update the current map by enforcing weighted consensus with historical representations. Our method allows reliable past geometry to constrain optimization while permitting unreliable or outdated regions to be revised in response to new observations. TACO achieves a balance between memory efficiency and adaptability without storing or replaying previous data. Through extensive simulated and real-world experiments, we show that TACO robustly adapts to scene changes, and consistently outperforms other continual learning baselines.
tldr: The paper introduces TACO, a replay-free continual learning framework for neural implicit mapping that maintains temporal consensus with past model snapshots to adapt to changing environments without replaying historical data.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了TACO，一种无需重放的持续学习框架，用于神经隐式映射，通过与过去模型快照保持时间一致性，适应变化的环境，而无需重放历史数据。
summary_zh: 神经隐式地图构建已成为机器人导航和场景理解的强大范例。然而，现实世界中的机器人部署需要持续适应不断变化的环境，同时面临严格的内存和计算约束，而现有的地图构建系统无法支持这一点。大多数先前的方法依赖于重放历史观测来保持一致性，并假设场景是静态的。因此，它们无法适应动态机器人环境中的持续学习。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出TACO（时间共识优化），一个用于持续神经地图构建的无需重放的框架。我们将地图构建重新表述为一个时间共识优化问题，其中我们将过去的模型快照视为时间邻居。直观地说，我们的方法类似于模型咨询自身的过去知识。我们通过强制与历史表示加权共识来更新当前地图。我们的方法允许可靠的过去几何约束优化，同时允许不可靠或过时的区域根据新的观测进行修改。TACO在内存效率和适应性之间实现了平衡，无需存储或重放以前的数据。通过大量的模拟和真实世界实验，我们表明TACO能够稳健地适应场景变化，并且始终优于其他持续学习基线方法。

title: The Supportiveness-Safety Tradeoff in LLM Well-Being Agents
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are being integrated into socially assistive robots (SARs) and other conversational agents providing mental health and well-being support. These agents are often designed to sound empathic and supportive in order to maximize user's engagement, yet it remains unclear how increasing the level of supportive framing in system prompts influences safety relevant behavior. We evaluated 6 LLMs across 3 system prompts with varying levels of supportiveness on 80 synthetic queries spanning 4 well-being domains (1440 responses). An LLM judge framework, validated against human ratings, assessed safety and care quality. Moderately supportive prompts improved empathy and constructive support while maintaining safety. In contrast, strongly validating prompts significantly degraded safety and, in some cases, care across all domains, with substantial variation across models. We discuss implications for prompt design, model selection, and domain specific safeguards in SARs deployment.
tldr: This paper investigates the tradeoff between supportiveness and safety in LLM-based well-being agents, finding that overly supportive prompts can degrade safety. They evaluate different LLMs and prompt strategies across various well-being domains.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了基于LLM的健康助手中支持性和安全性之间的权衡，发现过度支持性的提示会降低安全性。作者评估了不同LLM和提示策略在不同健康领域中的表现。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）正被集成到社交辅助机器人（SARs）和其他提供心理健康和福祉支持的对话式代理中。这些代理通常被设计成听起来富有同情心和支持性，以最大化用户的参与度，但系统提示中增加支持性框架的程度如何影响与安全相关的行为仍然不清楚。我们评估了6个大型语言模型在3种不同支持程度的系统提示下的表现，使用了涵盖4个福祉领域的80个合成查询（1440个回复）。一个经过人工评估验证的LLM评判框架评估了安全性和护理质量。适度支持的提示提高了同理心和建设性支持，同时保持了安全性。相比之下，强验证的提示显著降低了所有领域的安全性，在某些情况下也降低了护理质量，且不同模型之间的差异很大。 我们讨论了SARs部署中提示设计、模型选择以及领域特定安全保障的意义。

title: Towards Next-Generation SLAM: A Survey on 3DGS-SLAM Focusing on Performance, Robustness, and Future Directions
summary: Traditional Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) systems often face limitations including coarse rendering quality, insufficient recovery of scene details, and poor robustness in dynamic environments. 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), with its efficient explicit representation and high-quality rendering capabilities, offers a new reconstruction paradigm for SLAM. This survey comprehensively reviews key technical approaches for integrating 3DGS with SLAM. We analyze performance optimization of representative methods across four critical dimensions: rendering quality, tracking accuracy, reconstruction speed, and memory consumption, delving into their design principles and breakthroughs. Furthermore, we examine methods for enhancing the robustness of 3DGS-SLAM in complex environments such as motion blur and dynamic environments. Finally, we discuss future challenges and development trends in this area. This survey aims to provide a technical reference for researchers and foster the development of next-generation SLAM systems characterized by high fidelity, efficiency, and robustness.
tldr: This survey paper reviews the integration of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) with SLAM, focusing on performance, robustness, and future directions towards next-generation SLAM systems.
tldr_zh: 这篇综述文章回顾了3D高斯溅射(3DGS)与SLAM的集成，重点关注性能、鲁棒性和面向下一代SLAM系统的未来方向。
summary_zh: 传统的同时定位与地图构建（SLAM）系统常常面临限制，包括粗糙的渲染质量、场景细节恢复不足以及在动态环境中鲁棒性较差。3D高斯溅射（3DGS）凭借其高效的显式表示和高质量的渲染能力，为SLAM提供了一种新的重建范式。本综述全面回顾了将3DGS与SLAM集成的关键技术方法。我们从四个关键维度分析了代表性方法的性能优化：渲染质量、跟踪精度、重建速度和内存消耗，深入探讨了它们的设计原则和突破。此外，我们还研究了增强3DGS-SLAM在复杂环境（如运动模糊和动态环境）中鲁棒性的方法。最后，我们讨论了该领域未来的挑战和发展趋势。本综述旨在为研究人员提供技术参考，并促进下一代具有高保真度、高效率和高鲁棒性的SLAM系统的开发。

title: SPOT-Occ: Sparse Prototype-guided Transformer for Camera-based 3D Occupancy Prediction
summary:
Achieving highly accurate and real-time 3D occupancy prediction from cameras is a critical requirement for the safe and practical deployment of autonomous vehicles. While this shift to sparse 3D representations solves the encoding bottleneck, it creates a new challenge for the decoder: how to efficiently aggregate information from a sparse, non-uniformly distributed set of voxel features without resorting to computationally prohibitive dense attention.
  In this paper, we propose a novel Prototype-based Sparse Transformer Decoder that replaces this costly interaction with an efficient, two-stage process of guided feature selection and focused aggregation. Our core idea is to make the decoder's attention prototype-guided. We achieve this through a sparse prototype selection mechanism, where each query adaptively identifies a compact set of the most salient voxel features, termed prototypes, for focused feature aggregation.
  To ensure this dynamic selection is stable and effective, we introduce a complementary denoising paradigm. This approach leverages ground-truth masks to provide explicit guidance, guaranteeing a consistent query-prototype association across decoder layers. Our model, dubbed SPOT-Occ, outperforms previous methods with a significant margin in speed while also improving accuracy. Source code is released at https://github.com/chensuzeyu/SpotOcc.
tldr: The paper introduces SPOT-Occ, a novel transformer-based architecture for efficient and accurate 3D occupancy prediction from camera images using a prototype-guided sparse attention mechanism.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为SPOT-Occ的新型Transformer架构，它使用原型引导的稀疏注意力机制，从相机图像中进行高效且准确的3D占用预测。
summary_zh:
从摄像头实现高精度和实时的3D占用预测是自动驾驶车辆安全可靠部署的关键需求。虽然向稀疏3D表示的转变解决了编码瓶颈，但它为解码器带来了一个新的挑战：如何在不诉诸于计算成本高昂的密集注意力机制的情况下，有效地聚合来自稀疏且非均匀分布的体素特征集合的信息。

在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于原型的稀疏Transformer解码器，它采用高效的两阶段过程（即引导式特征选择和聚焦式聚合）来取代这种代价高昂的交互。我们的核心思想是使解码器的注意力机制以原型为导向。我们通过一种稀疏原型选择机制来实现这一点，在该机制中，每个查询自适应地识别出一组最显著的体素特征（称为原型），用于聚焦式特征聚合。

为了确保这种动态选择是稳定且有效的，我们引入了一种互补的去噪范式。这种方法利用真实标签掩码提供显式指导，从而保证跨解码器层的一致的查询-原型关联。我们的模型，称为SPOT-Occ，在速度上显著优于以往的方法，同时还提高了精度。源代码已发布在https://github.com/chensuzeyu/SpotOcc。

title: ALORE: Autonomous Large-Object Rearrangement with a Legged Manipulator
summary: Endowing robots with the ability to rearrange various large and heavy objects, such as furniture, can substantially alleviate human workload. However, this task is extremely challenging due to the need to interact with diverse objects and efficiently rearrange multiple objects in complex environments while ensuring collision-free loco-manipulation. In this work, we present ALORE, an autonomous large-object rearrangement system for a legged manipulator that can rearrange various large objects across diverse scenarios. The proposed system is characterized by three main features: (i) a hierarchical reinforcement learning training pipeline for multi-object environment learning, where a high-level object velocity controller is trained on top of a low-level whole-body controller to achieve efficient and stable joint learning across multiple objects; (ii) two key modules, a unified interaction configuration representation and an object velocity estimator, that allow a single policy to regulate planar velocity of diverse objects accurately; and (iii) a task-and-motion planning framework that jointly optimizes object visitation order and object-to-target assignment, improving task efficiency while enabling online replanning. Comparisons against strong baselines show consistent superiority in policy generalization, object-velocity tracking accuracy, and multi-object rearrangement efficiency. Key modules are systematically evaluated, and extensive simulations and real-world experiments are conducted to validate the robustness and effectiveness of the entire system, which successfully completes 8 continuous loops to rearrange 32 chairs over nearly 40 minutes without a single failure, and executes long-distance autonomous rearrangement over an approximately 40 m route. The open-source packages are available at https://zhihaibi.github.io/Alore/.
tldr: The paper introduces ALORE, a system for autonomous large-object rearrangement using a legged manipulator, validated through simulations and real-world experiments. It uses hierarchical RL, a unified interaction configuration representation, and a task-and-motion planning framework.
tldr_zh: 这篇论文介绍了ALORE，一个使用腿式机械臂自主重排大型物体的系统，并通过仿真和真实世界的实验进行了验证。它采用了分层强化学习，统一的交互配置表示，以及任务与运动规划框架。
summary_zh: 赋予机器人重新排列各种大型重物的能力，例如家具，可以大大减轻人类的工作负担。然而，由于需要与不同的物体互动，并在复杂的环境中高效地重新排列多个物体，同时确保无碰撞的移动操作，这项任务极具挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了ALORE，一种用于腿式机械臂自主重新排列大型物体的系统，可以在不同的场景中重新排列各种大型物体。该系统的特点在于三个主要特征：（i）一种用于多物体环境学习的分层强化学习训练流程，其中高级物体速度控制器在低级全身控制器的基础上进行训练，以实现跨多个物体的高效和稳定的联合学习；（ii）两个关键模块，一个统一的交互配置表示和一个物体速度估计器，允许单个策略精确地调节不同物体的平面速度；（iii）一个任务与运动规划框架，它联合优化物体访问顺序和物体-目标分配，在提高任务效率的同时，实现在线重规划。与强大的基线模型的比较表明，在策略泛化、物体速度跟踪精度和多物体重新排列效率方面具有一致的优越性。对关键模块进行了系统评估，并通过大量的模拟和真实世界实验验证了整个系统的鲁棒性和有效性，该系统成功完成了8个连续循环，在近40分钟内重新排列了32把椅子，没有发生任何失败，并在大约40米的路线上执行了长距离的自主重新排列。 开源软件包可从https://zhihaibi.github.io/Alore/获取。

title: MA3DSG: Multi-Agent 3D Scene Graph Generation for Large-Scale Indoor Environments
summary: Current 3D scene graph generation (3DSGG) approaches heavily rely on a single-agent assumption and small-scale environments, exhibiting limited scalability to real-world scenarios. In this work, we introduce Multi-Agent 3D Scene Graph Generation (MA3DSG) model, the first framework designed to tackle this scalability challenge using multiple agents. We develop a training-free graph alignment algorithm that efficiently merges partial query graphs from individual agents into a unified global scene graph. Leveraging extensive analysis and empirical insights, our approach enables conventional single-agent systems to operate collaboratively without requiring any learnable parameters. To rigorously evaluate 3DSGG performance, we propose MA3DSG-Bench-a benchmark that supports diverse agent configurations, domain sizes, and environmental conditions-providing a more general and extensible evaluation framework. This work lays a solid foundation for scalable, multi-agent 3DSGG research.
tldr: This paper introduces MA3DSG, a multi-agent framework for generating 3D scene graphs in large-scale indoor environments using a training-free graph alignment algorithm. It also presents MA3DSG-Bench, a new benchmark for evaluating 3DSGG performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了MA3DSG，一个多智能体框架，用于使用无需训练的图对齐算法在大型室内环境中生成3D场景图。它还提出了MA3DSG-Bench，一个用于评估3DSGG性能的新基准。
summary_zh: 当前的3D场景图生成(3DSGG)方法严重依赖于单智能体假设和小规模环境，在真实世界场景中的可扩展性有限。在这项工作中，我们引入了多智能体3D场景图生成(MA3DSG)模型，这是首个旨在利用多个智能体解决这一可扩展性挑战的框架。我们开发了一种无需训练的图对齐算法，以高效地将来自各个智能体的局部查询图合并成一个统一的全局场景图。凭借广泛的分析和实验性见解，我们的方法使传统的单智能体系统无需任何可学习的参数即可协同运作。为了严格评估3DSGG性能，我们提出了MA3DSG-Bench，一个支持多样化智能体配置、领域规模和环境条件的基准，提供了一个更通用和可扩展的评估框架。这项工作为可扩展的多智能体3DSGG研究奠定了坚实的基础。

title: Lyapunov Constrained Soft Actor-Critic (LC-SAC) using Koopman Operator Theory for Quadrotor Trajectory Tracking
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has achieved remarkable success in solving complex sequential decision-making problems. However, its application to safety-critical physical systems remains constrained by the lack of stability guarantees. Standard RL algorithms prioritize reward maximization, often yielding policies that may induce oscillations or unbounded state divergence. There has been significant work in incorporating Lyapunov-based stability guarantees in RL algorithms with key challenges being selecting a candidate Lyapunov function, computational complexity by using excessive function approximators and conservative policies by incorporating stability criterion in the learning process. In this work we propose a novel Lyapunov-constrained Soft Actor-Critic (LC-SAC) algorithm using Koopman operator theory. We propose use of extended dynamic mode decomposition (EDMD) to produce a linear approximation of the system and use this approximation to derive a closed form solution for candidate Lyapunov function. This derived Lyapunov function is incorporated in the SAC algorithm to further provide guarantees for a policy that stabilizes the nonlinear system. The results are evaluated trajectory tracking of a 2D Quadrotor environment based on safe-control-gym. The proposed algorithm shows training convergence and decaying violations for Lyapunov stability criterion compared to baseline vanilla SAC algorithm. GitHub Repository: https://github.com/DhruvKushwaha/LC-SAC-Quadrotor-Trajectory-Tracking
tldr: The paper introduces a Lyapunov-constrained Soft Actor-Critic (LC-SAC) algorithm utilizing Koopman operator theory for stable quadrotor trajectory tracking, addressing stability concerns in applying RL to safety-critical systems. They use EDMD to determine suitable Lyapunov functions, resulting in better convergence and fewer Lyapunov violations than standard SAC.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于Koopman算子理论的Lyapunov约束软演员-评论家（LC-SAC）算法，用于稳定四旋翼飞行器的轨迹跟踪，解决了RL在安全关键系统应用中的稳定性问题。他们使用EDMD来确定合适的Lyapunov函数，相比标准SAC算法，实现了更好的收敛性和更少的Lyapunov违规。
summary_zh: 强化学习(RL)在解决复杂的序列决策问题方面取得了显著成功。然而，由于缺乏稳定性保证，其在安全攸关的物理系统中的应用仍然受到限制。标准的强化学习算法优先考虑奖励最大化，往往会产生可能导致振荡或无界状态发散的策略。在将基于Lyapunov的稳定性保证纳入强化学习算法方面已经有大量工作，主要挑战包括选择候选Lyapunov函数、通过使用过多的函数逼近器而导致的计算复杂度以及通过在学习过程中纳入稳定性准则而导致的保守策略。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用Koopman算子理论的新型Lyapunov约束软演员-评论家(LC-SAC)算法。我们提出使用扩展动态模式分解(EDMD)来生成系统的线性近似，并使用该近似推导出候选Lyapunov函数的闭合形式解。该导出的Lyapunov函数被纳入SAC算法中，以进一步为稳定非线性系统的策略提供保证。结果在基于safe-control-gym的2D四旋翼飞行器环境的轨迹跟踪中进行了评估。与基线vanilla SAC算法相比，所提出的算法显示出训练收敛和Lyapunov稳定性准则的违规次数逐渐减少。GitHub存储库：https://github.com/DhruvKushwaha/LC-SAC-Quadrotor-Trajectory-Tracking

title: Towards X-embodiment safety: A control theory perspective on transferring safety certificates across dynamical systems
summary: Control barrier functions (CBFs) provide a powerful tool for enforcing safety constraints in control systems, but their direct application to complex, high-dimensional dynamics is often challenging. In many settings, safety certificates are more naturally designed for simplified or alternative system models that do not exactly match the dynamics of interest. This paper addresses the problem of transferring safety guarantees between dynamical systems with mismatched dynamics. We propose a transferred control barrier function (tCBF) framework that enables safety constraints defined on one system to be systematically enforced on another system using a simulation function and an explicit margin term. The resulting transferred barrier accounts for model mismatch and induces a safety condition that can be enforced on the target system via a quadratic-program-based safety filter. The proposed approach is general and does not require the two systems to share the same state dimension or dynamics. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the framework on a quadrotor navigation task with the transferred barrier ensuring collision avoidance for the target system, while remaining minimally invasive to a nominal controller. These results highlight the potential of transferred control barrier functions as a general mechanism for enforcing safety across heterogeneous dynamical systems.
tldr: This paper introduces a transferred control barrier function (tCBF) framework to transfer safety constraints between dynamical systems with mismatched dynamics, enabling safety enforcement on a target system using a simulation function and margin term. It demonstrates the effectiveness on a quadrotor navigation task.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种转移控制屏障函数（tCBF）框架，用于在具有不匹配动力学的动态系统之间传递安全约束，利用仿真函数和裕度项，能够在目标系统上实施安全。该方法在一个四旋翼导航任务上展示了其有效性。
summary_zh: 控制屏障函数 (CBFs) 为控制系统中实施安全约束提供了一种强大的工具，但将其直接应用于复杂、高维动力学往往具有挑战性。在许多情况下，安全证书更自然地设计用于简化或替代的系统模型，这些模型与感兴趣的动力学不完全匹配。本文探讨了在动力学失配的动力系统之间传递安全保证的问题。我们提出了一种传递控制屏障函数 (tCBF) 框架，该框架能够使用仿真函数和一个显式裕度项，将定义在一个系统上的安全约束系统地强制执行到另一个系统上。生成的传递屏障考虑了模型失配，并诱导出一个安全条件，该条件可以通过基于二次规划的安全滤波器在目标系统上强制执行。所提出的方法具有通用性，并且不需要两个系统共享相同的状态维度或动力学。我们通过一个四旋翼导航任务展示了该框架的有效性，其中传递屏障确保了目标系统的避撞，同时对标称控制器的侵入性最小。这些结果突出了传递控制屏障函数作为一种通用机制，用于在异构动力系统之间强制执行安全的潜力。

title: eCP: Informative uncertainty quantification via Equivariantized Conformal Prediction with pre-trained models
summary: We study the effect of group symmetrization of pre-trained models on conformal prediction (CP), a post-hoc, distribution-free, finite-sample method of uncertainty quantification that offers formal coverage guarantees under the assumption of data exchangeability. Unfortunately, CP uncertainty regions can grow significantly in long horizon missions, rendering the statistical guarantees uninformative. To that end, we propose infusing CP with geometric information via group-averaging of the pretrained predictor to distribute the non-conformity mass across the orbits. Each sample now is treated as a representative of an orbit, thus uncertainty can be mitigated by other samples entangled to it via the orbit inducing elements of the symmetry group. Our approach provably yields contracted non-conformity scores in increasing convex order, implying improved exponential-tail bounds and sharper conformal prediction sets in expectation, especially at high confidence levels. We then propose an experimental design to test these theoretical claims in pedestrian trajectory prediction.
tldr: This paper introduces equivariantized conformal prediction (eCP) to improve uncertainty quantification in pre-trained models by leveraging group symmetrization to reduce the size of conformal prediction sets, particularly in trajectory prediction tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了等变一致预测(eCP)，通过利用群对称化来减小一致预测集合的大小，从而提高预训练模型中不确定性量化，尤其是在轨迹预测任务中。
summary_zh: 我们研究了预训练模型进行群对称化处理对共形预测 (CP) 的影响。共形预测是一种事后、无分布、有限样本的不确定性量化方法，在数据可交换性的假设下提供正式的覆盖率保证。遗憾的是，在长时域任务中，共形预测的不确定性区域可能会显著增大，导致统计保证变得不具信息性。为此，我们提出通过对预训练预测器进行群平均来注入几何信息到共形预测中，从而将非符合性质量分布到轨道上。每个样本现在都被视为一个轨道的代表，因此可以通过与它通过对称群的轨道诱导元素纠缠的其他样本来缓解不确定性。我们的方法可证明地产生以递增凸序收缩的非符合性得分，这意味着改进的指数尾部边界和更准确的预期共形预测集，尤其是在高置信水平下。然后，我们提出一个实验设计来测试这些在行人轨迹预测中的理论主张。

title: How Users Understand Robot Foundation Model Performance through Task Success Rates and Beyond
summary: Robot Foundation Models (RFMs) represent a promising approach to developing general-purpose home robots. Given the broad capabilities of RFMs, users will inevitably ask an RFM-based robot to perform tasks that the RFM was not trained or evaluated on. In these cases, it is crucial that users understand the risks associated with attempting novel tasks due to the relatively high cost of failure. Furthermore, an informed user who understands an RFM's capabilities will know what situations and tasks the robot can handle. In this paper, we study how non-roboticists interpret performance information from RFM evaluations. These evaluations typically report task success rate (TSR) as the primary performance metric. While TSR is intuitive to experts, it is necessary to validate whether novices also use this information as intended. Toward this end, we conducted a study in which users saw real evaluation data, including TSR, failure case descriptions, and videos from multiple published RFM research projects. The results highlight that non-experts not only use TSR in a manner consistent with expert expectations but also highly value other information types, such as failure cases that are not often reported in RFM evaluations. Furthermore, we find that users want access to both real data from previous evaluations of the RFM and estimates from the robot about how well it will do on a novel task.
tldr: This paper investigates how non-expert users interpret Robot Foundation Model (RFM) performance information, especially task success rates (TSR), and reveals that they value failure case descriptions and robots' self-estimation in addition to TSR.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了非专业用户如何理解机器人基础模型（RFM）的性能信息，特别是任务成功率（TSR），结果表明除了TSR之外，他们也重视失败案例描述和机器人自身的评估。
summary_zh: 机器人基础模型(RFMs)代表着开发通用型家庭机器人的一个有前景的途径。鉴于RFMs广泛的能力，用户将不可避免地要求基于RFM的机器人执行RFM未曾训练或评估过的任务。在这种情况下，至关重要的是，用户要了解尝试新任务所带来的风险，因为失败的代价相对较高。此外，了解RFM能力的用户就会知道机器人可以处理哪些情况和任务。在本文中，我们研究了非机器人专家如何解读来自RFM评估的性能信息。这些评估通常将任务成功率(TSR)作为主要的性能指标进行报告。虽然TSR对于专家来说是直观的，但有必要验证新手是否也按预期使用此信息。为此，我们进行了一项研究，其中用户看到了真实的评估数据，包括来自多个已发表的RFM研究项目的TSR、失败案例描述和视频。结果表明，非专家不仅以符合专家期望的方式使用TSR，而且高度重视其他信息类型，例如RFM评估中通常不报告的失败案例。此外，我们发现用户希望获得来自RFM先前评估的真实数据，以及机器人对自身在执行新任务时的表现的估计。

title: Beyond Rewards in Reinforcement Learning for Cyber Defence
summary: Recent years have seen an explosion of interest in autonomous cyber defence agents trained to defend computer networks using deep reinforcement learning. These agents are typically trained in cyber gym environments using dense, highly engineered reward functions which combine many penalties and incentives for a range of (un)desirable states and costly actions. Dense rewards help alleviate the challenge of exploring complex environments but risk biasing agents towards suboptimal and potentially riskier solutions, a critical issue in complex cyber environments. We thoroughly evaluate the impact of reward function structure on learning and policy behavioural characteristics using a variety of sparse and dense reward functions, two well-established cyber gyms, a range of network sizes, and both policy gradient and value-based RL algorithms. Our evaluation is enabled by a novel ground truth evaluation approach which allows directly comparing between different reward functions, illuminating the nuanced inter-relationships between rewards, action space and the risks of suboptimal policies in cyber environments. Our results show that sparse rewards, provided they are goal aligned and can be encountered frequently, uniquely offer both enhanced training reliability and more effective cyber defence agents with lower-risk policies. Surprisingly, sparse rewards can also yield policies that are better aligned with cyber defender goals and make sparing use of costly defensive actions without explicit reward-based numerical penalties.
tldr: This paper investigates the impact of reward function structure in reinforcement learning for cyber defense, finding that sparse, goal-aligned rewards lead to more reliable training and effective, lower-risk policies compared to dense rewards.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了强化学习在网络防御中奖励函数结构的影响，发现与密集奖励相比，稀疏、目标对齐的奖励能够带来更可靠的训练以及更有效、风险更低的策略。
summary_zh: 近年来，人们对使用深度强化学习训练的自主网络防御代理产生了爆炸式的兴趣，这些代理旨在防御计算机网络。这些代理通常在网络竞技场环境中进行训练，使用密集且高度工程化的奖励函数，这些函数结合了多种针对一系列（不）期望状态和高成本行为的惩罚和激励。 密集的奖励有助于缓解探索复杂环境的挑战，但存在使代理偏向次优且潜在更高风险解决方案的风险，这在复杂的网络环境中是一个关键问题。我们使用各种稀疏和密集奖励函数、两个成熟的网络竞技场、一系列网络规模以及基于策略梯度和基于值的强化学习算法，彻底评估了奖励函数结构对学习和策略行为特征的影响。 我们的评估得益于一种新颖的真值评估方法，该方法可以直接比较不同的奖励函数，从而阐明奖励、行动空间以及网络环境中次优策略风险之间细微的相互关系。 我们的结果表明，稀疏奖励如果与目标一致且能够频繁遇到，则独特地提供了增强的训练可靠性以及更有效的、具有较低风险策略的网络防御代理。 令人惊讶的是，稀疏奖励还可以产生与网络防御者目标更好地对齐的策略，并且可以节约使用高成本的防御行为，而无需明确的基于奖励的数值惩罚。

title: Active Asymmetric Multi-Agent Multimodal Learning under Uncertainty
summary: Multi-agent systems are increasingly equipped with heterogeneous multimodal sensors, enabling richer perception but introducing modality-specific and agent-dependent uncertainty. Existing multi-agent collaboration frameworks typically reason at the agent level, assume homogeneous sensing, and handle uncertainty implicitly, limiting robustness under sensor corruption. We propose Active Asymmetric Multi-Agent Multimodal Learning under Uncertainty (A2MAML), a principled approach for uncertainty-aware, modality-level collaboration. A2MAML models each modality-specific feature as a stochastic estimate with uncertainty prediction, actively selects reliable agent-modality pairs, and aggregates information via Bayesian inverse-variance weighting. This formulation enables fine-grained, modality-level fusion, supports asymmetric modality availability, and provides a principled mechanism to suppress corrupted or noisy modalities. Extensive experiments on connected autonomous driving scenarios for collaborative accident detection demonstrate that A2MAML consistently outperforms both single-agent and collaborative baselines, achieving up to 18.7% higher accident detection rate.
tldr: This paper introduces A2MAML, a novel multi-agent multimodal learning framework that actively selects and fuses reliable agent-modality pairs based on uncertainty, demonstrated through experiments in collaborative accident detection for autonomous driving.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种新的多智能体多模态学习框架A2MAML，该框架基于不确定性主动选择和融合可靠的智能体-模态对，并通过自主驾驶中协同事故检测的实验进行了演示。
summary_zh: 多智能体系统越来越多地配备异构多模态传感器，从而实现更丰富的感知，但也引入了模态特异性和智能体依赖的不确定性。现有的多智能体协作框架通常在智能体层面进行推理，假设同质传感，并隐式地处理不确定性，这限制了在传感器损坏情况下的鲁棒性。我们提出了一种在不确定性下进行主动非对称多智能体多模态学习的方法 (A2MAML)，这是一种用于不确定性感知、模态层级协作的原则性方法。A2MAML 将每个模态特异性特征建模为具有不确定性预测的随机估计，主动选择可靠的智能体-模态对，并通过贝叶斯逆方差加权来聚合信息。这种公式实现了细粒度的模态层级融合，支持非对称模态可用性，并提供了抑制损坏或噪声模态的原则性机制。在用于协作事故检测的互联自动驾驶场景中进行的大量实验表明，A2MAML 始终优于单智能体和协作基线，事故检测率最高可提高 18.7%。

title: SAR-RAG: ATR Visual Question Answering by Semantic Search, Retrieval, and MLLM Generation
summary: We present a visual-context image retrieval-augmented generation (ImageRAG) assisted AI agent for automatic target recognition (ATR) of synthetic aperture radar (SAR). SAR is a remote sensing method used in defense and security applications to detect and monitor the positions of military vehicles, which may appear indistinguishable in images. Researchers have extensively studied SAR ATR to improve the differentiation and identification of vehicle types, characteristics, and measurements. Test examples can be compared with known vehicle target types to improve recognition tasks. New methods enhance the capabilities of neural networks, transformer attention, and multimodal large language models. An agentic AI method may be developed to utilize a defined set of tools, such as searching through a library of similar examples. Our proposed method, SAR Retrieval-Augmented Generation (SAR-RAG), combines a multimodal large language model (MLLM) with a vector database of semantic embeddings to support contextual search for image exemplars with known qualities. By recovering past image examples with known true target types, our SAR-RAG system can compare similar vehicle categories, achieving improved ATR prediction accuracy. We evaluate this through search and retrieval metrics, categorical classification accuracy, and numeric regression of vehicle dimensions. These metrics all show improvements when SAR-RAG is added to an MLLM baseline method as an attached ATR memory bank.
tldr: The paper introduces SAR-RAG, a retrieval-augmented generation method that leverages a multimodal large language model and semantic embeddings to improve automatic target recognition in synthetic aperture radar images by comparing test cases with known vehicle examples.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SAR-RAG，一种检索增强生成方法，它利用多模态大型语言模型和语义嵌入，通过将测试用例与已知的车辆示例进行比较，来提高合成孔径雷达图像中的自动目标识别。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种视觉上下文图像检索增强生成（ImageRAG）辅助的人工智能代理，用于合成孔径雷达（SAR）的自动目标识别（ATR）。SAR是一种遥感方法，应用于国防和安全领域，用于检测和监控军用车辆的位置，这些车辆在图像中可能难以区分。研究人员已经广泛研究了SAR ATR，以提高车辆类型、特征和尺寸的区分和识别能力。测试样本可以与已知的车辆目标类型进行比较，以改进识别任务。新的方法增强了神经网络、Transformer注意力机制和多模态大型语言模型的能力。可以开发一种智能体式人工智能方法，利用一套定义的工具，例如搜索相似示例库。我们提出的方法，SAR检索增强生成（SAR-RAG），将多模态大型语言模型（MLLM）与语义嵌入向量数据库相结合，以支持对具有已知属性的图像示例进行上下文搜索。通过恢复过去具有已知真实目标类型的图像示例，我们的SAR-RAG系统可以比较相似的车辆类别，从而提高ATR预测精度。我们通过搜索和检索指标、类别分类精度以及车辆尺寸的数值回归来评估此方法。这些指标都表明，当SAR-RAG作为附加的ATR记忆库添加到MLLM基线方法中时，性能有所提升。

title: Dual Mind World Model Inspired Network Digital Twin for Access Scheduling
summary: Emerging networked systems such as industrial IoT and real-time cyber-physical infrastructures demand intelligent scheduling strategies capable of adapting to dynamic traffic, deadlines, and interference constraints. In this work, we present a novel Digital Twin-enabled scheduling framework inspired by Dual Mind World Model (DMWM) architecture, for learning-informed and imagination-driven network control. Unlike conventional rule-based or purely data-driven policies, the proposed DMWM combines short-horizon predictive planning with symbolic model-based rollout, enabling the scheduler to anticipate future network states and adjust transmission decisions accordingly. We implement the framework in a configurable simulation testbed and benchmark its performance against traditional heuristics and reinforcement learning baselines under varied traffic conditions. Our results show that DMWM achieves superior performance in bursty, interference-limited, and deadline-sensitive environments, while maintaining interpretability and sample efficiency. The proposed design bridges the gap between network-level reasoning and low-overhead learning, marking a step toward scalable and adaptive NDT-based network optimization.
tldr: This paper introduces a Digital Twin-enabled network scheduler leveraging a Dual Mind World Model (DMWM) architecture for improved performance in dynamic and constrained network environments, demonstrating superior results compared to traditional methods.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于数字孪生的网络调度器，利用双脑世界模型（DMWM）架构来提高动态和受限网络环境中的性能，并展示了优于传统方法的结果。
summary_zh: 工业物联网和实时信息物理基础设施等新兴网络系统需要能够适应动态流量、截止时间和干扰约束的智能调度策略。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种受双脑世界模型（DMWM）架构启发的、基于数字孪生的新型调度框架，用于学习驱动和想象驱动的网络控制。与传统的基于规则或纯数据驱动的策略不同，所提出的DMWM将短时预测规划与基于符号模型的展开相结合，使调度器能够预测未来的网络状态并相应地调整传输决策。我们在一个可配置的仿真测试平台中实现了该框架，并在不同的流量条件下，将其性能与传统启发式算法和强化学习基线进行比较。我们的结果表明，DMWM在突发、干扰受限和截止时间敏感的环境中表现出优越的性能，同时保持了可解释性和样本效率。所提出的设计弥合了网络级推理和低开销学习之间的差距，标志着向可扩展和自适应的基于网络确定性技术的网络优化迈出了一步。

title: Continual Learning through Control Minimization
summary: Catastrophic forgetting remains a fundamental challenge for neural networks when tasks are trained sequentially. In this work, we reformulate continual learning as a control problem where learning and preservation signals compete within neural activity dynamics. We convert regularization penalties into preservation signals that protect prior-task representations. Learning then proceeds by minimizing the control effort required to integrate new tasks while competing with the preservation of prior tasks. At equilibrium, the neural activities produce weight updates that implicitly encode the full prior-task curvature, a property we term the continual-natural gradient, requiring no explicit curvature storage. Experiments confirm that our learning framework recovers true prior-task curvature and enables task discrimination, outperforming existing methods on standard benchmarks without replay.
tldr: This paper presents a continual learning method that reformulates the problem as a control problem minimizing the effort required to learn new tasks while preserving past knowledge, achieving state-of-the-art performance without replay.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种持续学习方法，将该问题重新表述为一个控制问题，旨在最小化学习新任务所需的努力，同时保留先前的知识，在没有重放的情况下实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 灾难性遗忘仍然是神经网络在顺序训练任务时面临的一个根本挑战。在这项工作中，我们将持续学习重构为一个控制问题，其中学习和保存信号在神经活动动态中相互竞争。我们将正则化惩罚转化为保存信号，以保护先前任务的表征。学习过程则通过最小化控制工作量来进行，该工作量用于整合新任务，同时与先前任务的保存竞争。在平衡状态下，神经活动产生权重更新，这些更新隐式地编码了完整的先前任务曲率，我们称之为持续-自然梯度，无需显式存储曲率。实验证实，我们的学习框架恢复了真实的先前任务曲率并实现了任务区分，在标准基准测试上优于现有方法，且无需重放。

title: Learning the Value Systems of Agents with Preference-based and Inverse Reinforcement Learning
summary: Agreement Technologies refer to open computer systems in which autonomous software agents interact with one another, typically on behalf of humans, in order to come to mutually acceptable agreements. With the advance of AI systems in recent years, it has become apparent that such agreements, in order to be acceptable to the involved parties, must remain aligned with ethical principles and moral values. However, this is notoriously difficult to ensure, especially as different human users (and their software agents) may hold different value systems, i.e. they may differently weigh the importance of individual moral values. Furthermore, it is often hard to specify the precise meaning of a value in a particular context in a computational manner. Methods to estimate value systems based on human-engineered specifications, e.g. based on value surveys, are limited in scale due to the need for intense human moderation. In this article, we propose a novel method to automatically \emph{learn} value systems from observations and human demonstrations. In particular, we propose a formal model of the \emph{value system learning} problem, its instantiation to sequential decision-making domains based on multi-objective Markov decision processes, as well as tailored preference-based and inverse reinforcement learning algorithms to infer value grounding functions and value systems. The approach is illustrated and evaluated by two simulated use cases.
tldr: This paper introduces a method to automatically learn value systems of agents by combining preference-based and inverse reinforcement learning in multi-objective Markov decision processes, particularly relevant in open computer systems for ensuring ethical alignment.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种通过结合基于偏好的逆强化学习和多目标马尔可夫决策过程自动学习智能体价值系统的方法，特别适用于开放式计算机系统中，以确保伦理一致性。
summary_zh: 协议技术指的是开放的计算机系统，其中自主软件代理为了达成相互接受的协议而相互交互，通常代表人类。近年来，随着人工智能系统的发展，越来越明显的是，为了使此类协议能够被相关方接受，必须与伦理原则和道德价值观保持一致。然而，这很难保证，特别是当不同的人类用户（及其软件代理）可能持有不同的价值体系时，即，他们可能对个体道德价值观的重要性赋予不同的权重。此外，通常难以以计算方式指定特定上下文中价值观的确切含义。基于人工设计的规范（例如基于价值调查）来估计价值体系的方法，由于需要大量的人工干预，因此在规模上受到限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的方法，可以从观察和人类示范中自动*学习*价值体系。特别地，我们提出了*价值体系学习*问题的形式化模型，其基于多目标马尔可夫决策过程在序贯决策领域的实例化，以及定制的基于偏好和逆强化学习算法，以推断价值基础函数和价值体系。通过两个模拟用例来说明和评估该方法。

title: Discovering Mechanistic Models of Neural Activity: System Identification in an in Silico Zebrafish
summary: Constructing mechanistic models of neural circuits is a fundamental goal of neuroscience, yet verifying such models is limited by the lack of ground truth. To rigorously test model discovery, we establish an in silico testbed using neuromechanical simulations of a larval zebrafish as a transparent ground truth. We find that LLM-based tree search autonomously discovers predictive models that significantly outperform established forecasting baselines. Conditioning on sensory drive is necessary but not sufficient for faithful system identification, as models exploit statistical shortcuts. Structural priors prove essential for enabling robust out-of-distribution generalization and recovery of interpretable mechanistic models. Our insights provide guidance for modeling real-world neural recordings and offer a broader template for AI-driven scientific discovery.
tldr: The paper introduces an in silico zebrafish simulation as a testbed for discovering mechanistic models of neural activity, demonstrating that LLM-based tree search can outperform baselines, especially with structural priors, for robust generalization.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个体外斑马鱼模拟环境，用于发现神经活动机理模型。研究表明，基于LLM的树搜索优于基线模型，特别是在结合结构先验信息时，能够实现稳健的泛化。
summary_zh: 构建神经回路的机制模型是神经科学的一个基本目标，但验证此类模型受限于缺乏真实数据。为了严格测试模型发现，我们建立了一个硅内测试平台，使用幼年斑马鱼的神经机械模拟作为透明的真实数据。我们发现，基于LLM (大型语言模型) 的树搜索能够自主发现具有预测性的模型，其表现显著优于已建立的预测基线。以感觉驱动为条件对于忠实的系统辨识是必要的，但并非充分条件，因为模型会利用统计捷径。结构先验证明对于实现鲁棒的分布外泛化和恢复可解释的机制模型至关重要。我们的研究成果为真实世界神经记录的建模提供了指导，并为人工智能驱动的科学发现提供了一个更广泛的模板。

title: InterPReT: Interactive Policy Restructuring and Training Enable Effective Imitation Learning from Laypersons
summary: Imitation learning has shown success in many tasks by learning from expert demonstrations. However, most existing work relies on large-scale demonstrations from technical professionals and close monitoring of the training process. These are challenging for a layperson when they want to teach the agent new skills. To lower the barrier of teaching AI agents, we propose Interactive Policy Restructuring and Training (InterPReT), which takes user instructions to continually update the policy structure and optimize its parameters to fit user demonstrations. This enables end-users to interactively give instructions and demonstrations, monitor the agent's performance, and review the agent's decision-making strategies. A user study (N=34) on teaching an AI agent to drive in a racing game confirms that our approach yields more robust policies without impairing system usability, compared to a generic imitation learning baseline, when a layperson is responsible for both giving demonstrations and determining when to stop. This shows that our method is more suitable for end-users without much technical background in machine learning to train a dependable policy
tldr: The paper introduces InterPReT, an interactive imitation learning method designed for laypersons to train AI agents by allowing them to update policy structure and parameters through instructions and demonstrations, resulting in more robust policies compared to generic imitation learning.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了InterPReT，一种交互式模仿学习方法，旨在让非专业人士通过指令和演示来训练人工智能代理，允许他们更新策略结构和参数，从而获得比通用模仿学习更稳健的策略。
summary_zh: 模仿学习通过从专家演示中学习，已经在许多任务中展现了成功。然而，现有的大部分工作依赖于技术专家的海量演示，以及对训练过程的密切监控。当非专业人士想要教授智能体新技能时，这些会带来挑战。为了降低教授AI智能体的门槛，我们提出了交互式策略重构与训练 (InterPReT)，该方法利用用户指令持续更新策略结构并优化其参数，以适应用户演示。这使得终端用户能够交互式地提供指令和演示，监控智能体的性能，以及审查智能体的决策策略。一项关于教授AI智能体在赛车游戏中驾驶的用户研究（N=34）证实，与通用的模仿学习基线相比，当非专业人士负责提供演示和确定何时停止时，我们的方法能够产生更鲁棒的策略，且不影响系统可用性。这表明我们的方法更适合于没有太多机器学习技术背景的终端用户，以训练出一个可靠的策略。

title: Topology-Aware Revival for Efficient Sparse Training
summary: Static sparse training is a promising route to efficient learning by committing to a fixed mask pattern, yet the constrained structure reduces robustness. Early pruning decisions can lock the network into a brittle structure that is difficult to escape, especially in deep reinforcement learning (RL) where the evolving policy continually shifts the training distribution. We propose Topology-Aware Revival (TAR), a lightweight one-shot post-pruning procedure that improves static sparsity without dynamic rewiring. After static pruning, TAR performs a single revival step by allocating a small reserve budget across layers according to topology needs, randomly uniformly reactivating a few previously pruned connections within each layer, and then keeping the resulting connectivity fixed for the remainder of training. Across multiple continuous-control tasks with SAC and TD3, TAR improves final return over static sparse baselines by up to +37.9% and also outperforms dynamic sparse training baselines with a median gain of +13.5%.
tldr: This paper introduces Topology-Aware Revival (TAR), a post-pruning technique for static sparse training in deep reinforcement learning that improves performance without dynamic rewiring by selectively reactivating a small number of pruned connections based on topology needs.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了拓扑感知重激活（TAR），一种用于深度强化学习中静态稀疏训练的后剪枝技术，通过根据拓扑需求选择性地重新激活少量剪枝连接，在不进行动态重连的情况下提高了性能。
summary_zh: 静态稀疏训练是一种通过确定固定掩码模式来实现高效学习的有效途径，但受限的结构会降低鲁棒性。早期的剪枝决策可能将网络锁定到一个脆弱且难以摆脱的结构中，尤其是在深度强化学习（RL）中，因为不断演进的策略会持续改变训练分布。我们提出拓扑感知复苏（TAR），这是一种轻量级的一次性后剪枝程序，可在不进行动态重连的情况下提高静态稀疏性。在静态剪枝后，TAR执行一个单独的复苏步骤，根据拓扑需求在各层之间分配少量预留预算，在每层内随机均匀地重新激活一些先前剪枝的连接，然后在训练的剩余时间保持生成的连接性不变。在使用SAC和TD3的多个连续控制任务中，TAR与静态稀疏基线相比，最终回报最多提高+37.9%，并且也优于动态稀疏训练基线，中位数增益为+13.5%。

title: Active Epistemic Control for Query-Efficient Verified Planning
summary: Planning in interactive environments is challenging under partial observability: task-critical preconditions (e.g., object locations or container states) may be unknown at decision time, yet grounding them through interaction is costly. Learned world models can cheaply predict missing facts, but prediction errors can silently induce infeasible commitments. We present \textbf{Active Epistemic Control (AEC)}, an epistemic-categorical planning layer that integrates model-based belief management with categorical feasibility checks. AEC maintains a strict separation between a \emph{grounded fact store} used for commitment and a \emph{belief store} used only for pruning candidate plans. At each step, it either queries the environment to ground an unresolved predicate when uncertainty is high or predictions are ambiguous, or simulates the predicate to filter hypotheses when confidence is sufficient. Final commitment is gated by grounded precondition coverage and an SQ-BCP pullback-style compatibility check, so simulated beliefs affect efficiency but cannot directly certify feasibility.
