Experiments on ALFWorld and ScienceWorld show that AEC achieves competitive success with fewer replanning rounds than strong LLM-agent baselines.
tldr: The paper introduces Active Epistemic Control (AEC), a planning layer that combines model-based belief management with feasibility checks to improve planning efficiency in partially observable interactive environments. AEC shows promising results in ALFWorld and ScienceWorld by reducing replanning rounds compared to LLM-agent baselines.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了主动认知控制(AEC)，这是一种将基于模型的信念管理与可行性检查相结合的规划层，旨在提高在部分可观察的交互环境中规划的效率。AEC在ALFWorld和ScienceWorld上表现出前景，与LLM-agent基线相比，减少了重新规划的轮数。
summary_zh: 在交互式环境中进行规划在部分可观测条件下具有挑战性：任务关键的前提条件（例如，物体位置或容器状态）在决策时可能未知，但通过交互来确定它们的代价很高。学习到的世界模型可以廉价地预测缺失的事实，但预测误差会悄无声息地引发不可行的承诺。我们提出了\textbf{主动认知控制 (AEC)}，这是一个认知-分类规划层，它将基于模型的置信度管理与分类可行性检查相结合。AEC坚持在用于承诺的\emph{已确定的事实存储}和仅用于修剪候选方案的\emph{置信度存储}之间进行严格分离。在每一步中，它要么查询环境以确定不确定性较高或预测不明确的未解决谓词，要么在置信度足够时模拟该谓词以过滤假设。最终的承诺由已确定的前提条件覆盖率和SQ-BCP拉回式兼容性检查门控，因此模拟的置信度会影响效率，但不能直接证明可行性。在ALFWorld和ScienceWorld上的实验表明，与强大的LLM-agent基线相比，AEC能够以更少的重新规划轮次实现具有竞争力的成功。

title: SynthVerse: A Large-Scale Diverse Synthetic Dataset for Point Tracking
summary: Point tracking aims to follow visual points through complex motion, occlusion, and viewpoint changes, and has advanced rapidly with modern foundation models. Yet progress toward general point tracking remains constrained by limited high-quality data, as existing datasets often provide insufficient diversity and imperfect trajectory annotations. To this end, we introduce SynthVerse, a large-scale, diverse synthetic dataset specifically designed for point tracking. SynthVerse includes several new domains and object types missing from existing synthetic datasets, such as animated-film-style content, embodied manipulation, scene navigation, and articulated objects. SynthVerse substantially expands dataset diversity by covering a broader range of object categories and providing high-quality dynamic motions and interactions, enabling more robust training and evaluation for general point tracking. In addition, we establish a highly diverse point tracking benchmark to systematically evaluate state-of-the-art methods under broader domain shifts. Extensive experiments and analyses demonstrate that training with SynthVerse yields consistent improvements in generalization and reveal limitations of existing trackers under diverse settings.
tldr: The paper introduces SynthVerse, a large-scale, diverse synthetic dataset for point tracking, aiming to address the limitations of existing datasets and improve the generalization performance of point tracking methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SynthVerse，一个大规模、多样化的合成数据集，用于点跟踪，旨在解决现有数据集的局限性并提高点跟踪方法的泛化性能。
summary_zh: 点跟踪旨在跟踪复杂运动、遮挡和视角变化中的视觉点，并随着现代基础模型的发展而迅速进步。然而，由于现有的数据集通常提供不足的多样性和不完美的轨迹标注，因此在通用点跟踪方面的进展仍然受到高质量数据的限制。为此，我们提出了SynthVerse，一个大规模、多样化的合成数据集，专门为点跟踪而设计。SynthVerse包括现有合成数据集中缺失的几个新领域和对象类型，例如动画电影风格的内容、具身操作、场景导航和铰接对象。SynthVerse通过覆盖更广泛的对象类别并提供高质量的动态运动和交互，从而显著扩展了数据集的多样性，从而为通用点跟踪实现更强大的训练和评估。此外，我们建立了一个高度多样化的点跟踪基准，以系统地评估更广泛领域迁移下最先进的方法。大量的实验和分析表明，使用SynthVerse进行训练可以在泛化方面产生持续改进，并揭示现有跟踪器在各种设置下的局限性。

title: TrajVG: 3D Trajectory-Coupled Visual Geometry Learning
summary: Feed-forward multi-frame 3D reconstruction models often degrade on videos with object motion. Global-reference becomes ambiguous under multiple motions, while the local pointmap relies heavily on estimated relative poses and can drift, causing cross-frame misalignment and duplicated structures. We propose TrajVG, a reconstruction framework that makes cross-frame 3D correspondence an explicit prediction by estimating camera-coordinate 3D trajectories. We couple sparse trajectories, per-frame local point maps, and relative camera poses with geometric consistency objectives: (i) bidirectional trajectory-pointmap consistency with controlled gradient flow, and (ii) a pose consistency objective driven by static track anchors that suppresses gradients from dynamic regions. To scale training to in-the-wild videos where 3D trajectory labels are scarce, we reformulate the same coupling constraints into self-supervised objectives using only pseudo 2D tracks, enabling unified training with mixed supervision. Extensive experiments across 3D tracking, pose estimation, pointmap reconstruction, and video depth show that TrajVG surpasses the current feedforward performance baseline.
tldr: The paper introduces TrajVG, a 3D reconstruction framework that explicitly estimates camera-coordinate 3D trajectories to address issues with object motion in multi-frame 3D reconstruction. It uses geometric consistency objectives and self-supervised learning with pseudo 2D tracks to improve performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了TrajVG，一个3D重建框架，它显式估计相机坐标系下的3D轨迹，以解决多帧3D重建中物体运动的问题。 它利用了几何一致性目标和使用伪2D轨迹的自监督学习来提高性能。
summary_zh: 前馈多帧3D重建模型在包含物体运动的视频上通常会性能下降。Global-reference在多个运动下变得模糊，而局部点云图过分依赖于估计的相对姿态，并可能发生漂移，导致跨帧的错位和重复结构。我们提出了TrajVG，一种通过估计相机坐标系下的3D轨迹，将跨帧3D对应关系进行显式预测的重建框架。我们将稀疏轨迹、逐帧局部点云图以及相对相机姿态与几何一致性目标相结合：（i）具有可控梯度流的双向轨迹-点云图一致性，以及（ii）由静态轨迹锚点驱动的姿态一致性目标，该目标抑制来自动态区域的梯度。为了将训练扩展到3D轨迹标签稀缺的真实场景视频，我们仅使用伪2D轨迹，将相同的耦合约束重新表述为自监督目标，从而实现混合监督下的统一训练。在3D跟踪、姿态估计, 点云图重建和视频深度等方面的广泛实验表明，TrajVG超越了当前的前馈性能基线。

title: Finding NeMO: A Geometry-Aware Representation of Template Views for Few-Shot Perception
summary: We present Neural Memory Object (NeMO), a novel object-centric representation that can be used to detect, segment and estimate the 6DoF pose of objects unseen during training using RGB images. Our method consists of an encoder that requires only a few RGB template views depicting an object to generate a sparse object-like point cloud using a learned UDF containing semantic and geometric information. Next, a decoder takes the object encoding together with a query image to generate a variety of dense predictions. Through extensive experiments, we show that our method can be used for few-shot object perception without requiring any camera-specific parameters or retraining on target data. Our proposed concept of outsourcing object information in a NeMO and using a single network for multiple perception tasks enhances interaction with novel objects, improving scalability and efficiency by enabling quick object onboarding without retraining or extensive pre-processing. We report competitive and state-of-the-art results on various datasets and perception tasks of the BOP benchmark, demonstrating the versatility of our approach. https://github.com/DLR-RM/nemo
tldr: The paper introduces NeMO, a novel object-centric representation using a learned UDF to detect, segment and estimate the 6DoF pose of unseen objects from a few RGB template views, achieving competitive few-shot object perception results without retraining.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为NeMO的新型以物体为中心的表示方法，它使用学习到的UDF从几个RGB模板视图中检测、分割和估计未见物体的6DoF姿态，无需重新训练即可实现有竞争力的少样本物体感知结果。
summary_zh: 我们提出神经记忆对象 (NeMO)，一种新颖的以对象为中心的表示方法，可用于检测、分割和估计RGB图像中训练期间未见过的物体的6自由度姿态。我们的方法包含一个编码器，它仅需几个描绘对象的RGB模板视图，即可利用包含语义和几何信息的学习到的UDF生成稀疏的类对象点云。接下来，一个解码器将对象编码与查询图像一起生成各种密集预测。通过大量实验，我们表明我们的方法可用于小样本对象感知，而无需任何相机特定的参数或在目标数据上重新训练。我们提出的将对象信息外包到NeMO中，并使用单个网络进行多项感知任务的概念，增强了与新对象的交互，通过无需重新训练或大量预处理即可快速实现对象导入，从而提高了可扩展性和效率。我们在BOP基准测试的各种数据集和感知任务上报告了具有竞争力的最先进的结果，证明了我们方法的通用性。https://github.com/DLR-RM/nemo

title: AGMA: Adaptive Gaussian Mixture Anchors for Prior-Guided Multimodal Human Trajectory Forecasting
summary: Human trajectory forecasting requires capturing the multimodal nature of pedestrian behavior. However, existing approaches suffer from prior misalignment. Their learned or fixed priors often fail to capture the full distribution of plausible futures, limiting both prediction accuracy and diversity. We theoretically establish that prediction error is lower-bounded by prior quality, making prior modeling a key performance bottleneck. Guided by this insight, we propose AGMA (Adaptive Gaussian Mixture Anchors), which constructs expressive priors through two stages: extracting diverse behavioral patterns from training data and distilling them into a scene-adaptive global prior for inference. Extensive experiments on ETH-UCY, Stanford Drone, and JRDB datasets demonstrate that AGMA achieves state-of-the-art performance, confirming the critical role of high-quality priors in trajectory forecasting.
tldr: The paper introduces Adaptive Gaussian Mixture Anchors (AGMA) for human trajectory forecasting, which improves prediction accuracy and diversity by constructing scene-adaptive priors from training data, achieving state-of-the-art performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了用于人类轨迹预测的自适应高斯混合锚点 (AGMA)，通过从训练数据中构建场景自适应先验，提高了预测准确性和多样性，并实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 人类轨迹预测需要捕捉行人行为的多模态特性。然而，现有的方法存在先验错位的问题。它们学习到的或固定的先验往往无法捕捉到所有合理未来轨迹的完整分布，从而限制了预测的准确性和多样性。我们在理论上论证了预测误差受先验质量的下界限制，这使得先验建模成为关键的性能瓶颈。基于这一洞察，我们提出了 AGMA (自适应高斯混合锚点)，它通过以下两个阶段构建具有表达能力的先验：从训练数据中提取多样化的行为模式，并将这些模式提炼成一个用于推理的场景自适应全局先验。在 ETH-UCY、Stanford Drone 和 JRDB 数据集上的大量实验表明，AGMA 实现了最先进的性能，证实了高质量先验轨迹预测中的关键作用。

title: DiMo: Discrete Diffusion Modeling for Motion Generation and Understanding
summary: Prior masked modeling motion generation methods predominantly study text-to-motion. We present DiMo, a discrete diffusion-style framework, which extends masked modeling to bidirectional text--motion understanding and generation. Unlike GPT-style autoregressive approaches that tokenize motion and decode sequentially, DiMo performs iterative masked token refinement, unifying Text-to-Motion (T2M), Motion-to-Text (M2T), and text-free Motion-to-Motion (M2M) within a single model. This decoding paradigm naturally enables a quality-latency trade-off at inference via the number of refinement steps. We further improve motion token fidelity with residual vector quantization (RVQ) and enhance alignment and controllability with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Experiments on HumanML3D and KIT-ML show strong motion quality and competitive bidirectional understanding under a unified framework. In addition, we demonstrate model ability in text-free motion completion, text-guided motion prediction and motion caption correction without architectural change. Additional qualitative results are available on our project page: https://animotionlab.github.io/DiMo/.
tldr: The paper introduces DiMo, a discrete diffusion model for motion generation and understanding that unifies Text-to-Motion, Motion-to-Text, and Motion-to-Motion tasks within a single framework using iterative masked token refinement and residual vector quantization.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了DiMo，一种离散扩散模型，用于运动生成和理解，它通过迭代掩码token细化和残差向量量化，将文本到运动，运动到文本和运动到运动任务统一在一个框架中。
summary_zh: 先前的掩码建模运动生成方法主要研究文本到运动的生成。我们提出了DiMo，一个离散扩散风格的框架，它将掩码建模扩展到双向文本-运动理解和生成。与将运动进行token化并按顺序解码的GPT风格自回归方法不同，DiMo执行迭代的掩码token精炼，从而在一个单一模型中统一了文本到运动（T2M）、运动到文本（M2T）以及无文本的运动到运动（M2M）。这种解码范式自然地实现了通过调整精炼步骤数量来平衡推理过程中的质量和延迟。我们进一步利用残差向量量化（RVQ）来提高运动token的保真度，并利用分组相对策略优化（GRPO）来增强对齐性和可控性。在HumanML3D和KIT-ML上的实验表明，在一个统一的框架下，我们的方法具有强大的运动质量和有竞争力的双向理解能力。此外，我们还展示了该模型在无文本运动补全、文本引导运动预测以及运动描述修正方面的能力，并且无需改变模型架构。更多的定性结果可以在我们的项目主页上找到：https://animotionlab.github.io/DiMo/。

title: OMNI-Dent: Towards an Accessible and Explainable AI Framework for Automated Dental Diagnosis
summary: Accurate dental diagnosis is essential for oral healthcare, yet many individuals lack access to timely professional evaluation. Existing AI-based methods primarily treat diagnosis as a visual pattern recognition task and do not reflect the structured clinical reasoning used by dental professionals. These approaches also require large amounts of expert-annotated data and often struggle to generalize across diverse real-world imaging conditions. To address these limitations, we present OMNI-Dent, a data-efficient and explainable diagnostic framework that incorporates clinical reasoning principles into a Vision-Language Model (VLM)-based pipeline. The framework operates on multi-view smartphone photographs,embeds diagnostic heuristics from dental experts, and guides a general-purpose VLM to perform tooth-level evaluation without dental-specific fine-tuning of the VLM. By utilizing the VLM's existing visual-linguistic capabilities, OMNI-Dent aims to support diagnostic assessment in settings where curated clinical imaging is unavailable. Designed as an early-stage assistive tool, OMNI-Dent helps users identify potential abnormalities and determine when professional evaluation may be needed, offering a practical option for individuals with limited access to in-person care.
tldr: OMNI-Dent is a novel, data-efficient, and explainable AI framework for automated dental diagnosis using multi-view smartphone photographs and a Vision-Language Model, designed for accessibility in settings with limited clinical imaging.
tldr_zh: OMNI-Dent 是一个新颖、数据高效且可解释的 AI 框架，用于使用多视角智能手机照片和视觉语言模型进行自动牙科诊断，专为临床成像受限环境中的可访问性而设计。
summary_zh: 准确的牙科诊断对于口腔保健至关重要，然而许多人无法及时获得专业的评估。现有的基于人工智能的方法主要将诊断视为一种视觉模式识别任务，未能反映牙科专业人员所使用的结构化临床推理。这些方法还需要大量专家标注的数据，并且通常难以推广到各种真实世界的成像条件下。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了OMNI-Dent，一个数据高效且可解释的诊断框架，该框架将临床推理原则融入到基于视觉-语言模型(VLM)的流水线中。该框架基于多视角的智能手机照片进行操作，嵌入了来自牙科专家的诊断启发式方法，并引导通用VLM执行牙齿级别的评估，而无需对VLM进行牙科特定的微调。通过利用VLM现有的视觉-语言能力，OMNI-Dent旨在支持在无法获得精心策划的临床影像的场景中的诊断评估。OMNI-Dent被设计为早期阶段的辅助工具，可帮助用户识别潜在的异常情况，并确定何时需要专业评估，从而为那些无法获得面对面护理的人提供了一种切实可行的选择。

title: FullStack-Agent: Enhancing Agentic Full-Stack Web Coding via Development-Oriented Testing and Repository Back-Translation
summary: Assisting non-expert users to develop complex interactive websites has become a popular task for LLM-powered code agents. However, existing code agents tend to only generate frontend web pages, masking the lack of real full-stack data processing and storage with fancy visual effects. Notably, constructing production-level full-stack web applications is far more challenging than only generating frontend web pages, demanding careful control of data flow, comprehensive understanding of constantly updating packages and dependencies, and accurate localization of obscure bugs in the codebase. To address these difficulties, we introduce FullStack-Agent, a unified agent system for full-stack agentic coding that consists of three parts: (1) FullStack-Dev, a multi-agent framework with strong planning, code editing, codebase navigation, and bug localization abilities. (2) FullStack-Learn, an innovative data-scaling and self-improving method that back-translates crawled and synthesized website repositories to improve the backbone LLM of FullStack-Dev. (3) FullStack-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark that systematically tests the frontend, backend and database functionalities of the generated website. Our FullStack-Dev outperforms the previous state-of-the-art method by 8.7%, 38.2%, and 15.9% on the frontend, backend, and database test cases respectively. Additionally, FullStack-Learn raises the performance of a 30B model by 9.7%, 9.5%, and 2.8% on the three sets of test cases through self-improvement, demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach. The code is released at https://github.com/mnluzimu/FullStack-Agent.
tldr: The paper introduces FullStack-Agent, a unified agent system for developing full-stack web applications, including a multi-agent framework (FullStack-Dev), a data-scaling and self-improving method (FullStack-Learn), and a comprehensive benchmark (FullStack-Bench), achieving state-of-the-art performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了FullStack-Agent，一个用于开发全栈Web应用程序的统一代理系统，包括一个多代理框架(FullStack-Dev)，一种数据扩展和自我改进方法(FullStack-Learn)和一个综合基准测试(FullStack-Bench)，达到了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 辅助非专业用户开发复杂的交互式网站已成为 LLM 驱动的代码智能体的热门任务。然而，现有的代码智能体往往只生成前端网页，用华丽的视觉效果掩盖了缺乏真正的全栈数据处理和存储的事实。值得注意的是，构建生产级的全栈 Web 应用程序远比仅生成前端网页更具挑战性，需要仔细控制数据流、全面理解不断更新的软件包和依赖项，以及准确定位代码库中晦涩难懂的错误。为了解决这些难题，我们提出了 FullStack-Agent，一个用于全栈智能体编码的统一智能体系统，它由三个部分组成：（1）FullStack-Dev，一个具有强大的规划、代码编辑、代码库导航和错误定位能力的多智能体框架。（2）FullStack-Learn，一种创新的数据扩展和自我改进方法，通过回译爬取和合成的网站仓库来改进 FullStack-Dev 的骨干 LLM。（3）FullStack-Bench，一个全面的基准测试，系统地测试所生成网站的前端、后端和数据库功能。我们的 FullStack-Dev 在前端、后端和数据库测试用例中分别超过了先前最先进的方法 8.7%、38.2% 和 15.9%。此外，FullStack-Learn 通过自我改进，在三组测试用例中将一个 30B 模型的性能分别提升了 9.7%、9.5% 和 2.8%，证明了我们方法的有效性。代码已发布在 https://github.com/mnluzimu/FullStack-Agent。

title: Evolving Afferent Architectures: Biologically-inspired Models for Damage-Avoidance Learning
summary: We introduce Afferent Learning, a framework that produces Computational Afferent Traces (CATs) as adaptive, internal risk signals for damage-avoidance learning. Inspired by biological systems, the framework uses a two-level architecture: evolutionary optimization (outer loop) discovers afferent sensing architectures that enable effective policy learning, while reinforcement learning (inner loop) trains damage-avoidance policies using these signals. This formalizes afferent sensing as providing an inductive bias for efficient learning: architectures are selected based on their ability to enable effective learning (rather than directly minimizing damage). We provide theoretical convergence guarantees under smoothness and bounded-noise assumptions. We illustrate the general approach in the challenging context of biomechanical digital twins operating over long time horizons (multiple decades of the life-course). Here, we find that CAT-based evolved architectures achieve significantly higher efficiency and better age-robustness than hand-designed baselines, enabling policies that exhibit age-dependent behavioral adaptation (23% reduction in high-risk actions). Ablation studies validate CAT signals, evolution, and predictive discrepancy as essential. We release code and data for reproducibility.
tldr: The paper introduces Afferent Learning, a biologically-inspired framework that uses evolutionary optimization to discover afferent sensing architectures for reinforcement learning, enabling damage-avoidance policies in biomechanical digital twins with improved efficiency and age-robustness.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Afferent Learning，一个受生物学启发的框架，它使用进化优化来发现用于强化学习的传入感应架构，从而在生物力学数字孪生体中实现具有更高效率和年龄鲁棒性的损伤避免策略。
summary_zh: 我们引入了传入学习，这是一个框架，可生成计算传入轨迹（CATs）作为自适应的内部风险信号，用于损伤规避学习。该框架受到生物系统的启发，采用两层架构：进化优化（外循环）发现能够实现有效策略学习的传入感觉架构，而强化学习（内循环）则使用这些信号训练损伤规避策略。这形式化了传入感觉，将其作为一种为高效学习提供归纳偏置的方式：架构的选择基于其实现有效学习的能力（而不是直接最小化损伤）。我们提供了在平滑性和有界噪声假设下理论收敛保证。我们在生物力学数字孪生的挑战性背景下，展示了该通用方法在长期时间范围（生命历程的数十年）内的应用。结果表明，基于CAT的进化架构比手工设计的基线实现了明显更高的效率和更好的年龄鲁棒性，从而能够实现表现出年龄依赖性行为适应的策略（高风险行为减少23%）。消融研究验证了CAT信号、进化和预测差异是必不可少的。我们发布了代码和数据以供复现。

title: Rationality Measurement and Theory for Reinforcement Learning Agents
summary: This paper proposes a suite of rationality measures and associated theory for reinforcement learning agents, a property increasingly critical yet rarely explored. We define an action in deployment to be perfectly rational if it maximises the hidden true value function in the steepest direction. The expected value discrepancy of a policy's actions against their rational counterparts, culminating over the trajectory in deployment, is defined to be expected rational risk; an empirical average version in training is also defined. Their difference, termed as rational risk gap, is decomposed into (1) an extrinsic component caused by environment shifts between training and deployment, and (2) an intrinsic one due to the algorithm's generalisability in a dynamic environment. They are upper bounded by, respectively, (1) the $1$-Wasserstein distance between transition kernels and initial state distributions in training and deployment, and (2) the empirical Rademacher complexity of the value function class. Our theory suggests hypotheses on the benefits from regularisers (including layer normalisation, $\ell_2$ regularisation, and weight normalisation) and domain randomisation, as well as the harm from environment shifts. Experiments are in full agreement with these hypotheses. The code is available at https://github.com/EVIEHub/Rationality.
tldr: This paper introduces rationality measures for RL agents, analyzes the gap between training and deployment rationality, and provides theoretical bounds validated by experiments. It also suggests improvements using regularization techniques.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一系列强化学习智能体的理性度量方法，分析了训练和部署之间理性差距，并提供了实验验证的理论界限。它还建议使用正则化技术来改进。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一套用于强化学习智能体的理性度量方法和相关理论，这是一个日益重要但鲜有研究的属性。 我们将部署中的行动定义为完全理性的，如果它在最陡峭的方向上最大化了隐藏的真实价值函数。 策略的行动与其理性对应行动之间的期望值差异，在部署过程中累积，被定义为期望理性风险；同时定义了训练中的经验平均版本。 它们的差值，称为理性风险差距，被分解为 (1) 由训练和部署之间环境转移引起的外在成分，以及 (2) 由算法在动态环境中的泛化性引起的内在成分。 它们分别以（1）训练和部署中转移核及初始状态分布之间的 $1$-Wasserstein 距离，以及（2）价值函数类的经验 Rademacher 复杂度为上界。 我们的理论提出了关于正则化器（包括层归一化、$\ell_2$ 正则化和权重归一化）的益处以及环境转移的危害的假设。 实验结果与这些假设完全一致。 代码可在 https://github.com/EVIEHub/Rationality 获取。

title: Generalized Schrödinger Bridge on Graphs
summary: Transportation on graphs is a fundamental challenge across many domains, where decisions must respect topological and operational constraints. Despite the need for actionable policies, existing graph-transport methods lack this expressivity. They rely on restrictive assumptions, fail to generalize across sparse topologies, and scale poorly with graph size and time horizon. To address these issues, we introduce Generalized Schrödinger Bridge on Graphs (GSBoG), a novel scalable data-driven framework for learning executable controlled continuous-time Markov chain (CTMC) policies on arbitrary graphs under state cost augmented dynamics. Notably, GSBoG learns trajectory-level policies, avoiding dense global solvers and thereby enhancing scalability. This is achieved via a likelihood optimization approach, satisfying the endpoint marginals, while simultaneously optimizing intermediate behavior under state-dependent running costs. Extensive experimentation on challenging real-world graph topologies shows that GSBoG reliably learns accurate, topology-respecting policies while optimizing application-specific intermediate state costs, highlighting its broad applicability and paving new avenues for cost-aware dynamical transport on general graphs.
tldr: The paper introduces Generalized Schrödinger Bridge on Graphs (GSBoG), a scalable data-driven framework for learning executable controlled continuous-time Markov chain policies on arbitrary graphs for cost-aware dynamical transport.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了广义图上的薛定谔桥 (GSBoG)，这是一个可扩展的数据驱动框架，用于在任意图上学习可执行的受控连续时间马尔可夫链策略，以实现成本感知的动态传输。
summary_zh: 图上的运输是诸多领域中的一项根本性挑战，其中的决策必须尊重拓扑结构和运营约束。尽管需要可执行的策略，但现有的图运输方法缺乏这种表达能力。它们依赖于限制性假设，无法在稀疏拓扑结构中泛化，并且随着图的大小和时间范围的增加，扩展性较差。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新的可扩展数据驱动框架，即图上的广义薛定谔桥 (GSBoG)，用于学习在任意图上、状态成本增加动力学下的可执行受控连续时间马尔可夫链 (CTMC) 策略。值得注意的是，GSBoG 学习轨迹级别的策略，避免了密集的全局求解器，从而增强了可扩展性。这是通过一种似然优化方法实现的，该方法满足端点边际分布，同时优化状态相关的运行成本下的中间行为。在具有挑战性的真实世界图拓扑结构上的大量实验表明，GSBoG 能够可靠地学习准确、尊重拓扑结构的策略，同时优化特定应用的中间状态成本，突显了其广泛的适用性，并为通用图上的成本感知动态运输开辟了新的途径。

title: SAFE: Stable Alignment Finetuning with Entropy-Aware Predictive Control for Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF)
summary: Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) has been positioned by recent literature as the canonical method for the RL part of Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF). PPO performs well empirically but has a heuristic motivation and handles the KL-divergence constraint used in LM-RLHF in an ad-hoc manner and suffers form reward oscillations, entropy collapse, value function drift, and sudden policy divergence that require frequent restarts and extensive hyperparameter tuning. In this paper, we develop a new pure on policy actor-critic RL method for the LM-RLHF setting. We present SAFE (Stable Alignment Finetuning with Entropy-aware control),a novel RLHF algorithm that combines a Double Soft-Min Critic for pessimistic value estimation with a new multi-layer stabilization framework combining entropy-gated KL regulation, and PID-controlled adaptive thresholds. Unlike standard PPO's symmetric KL penalties, SAFE distinguishes high-entropy exploration from low-entropy mode collapse and adjusts penalties dynamically based on reward velocity. Experiments on a 3B parameter model show SAFE achieves +5.15\% training-average reward than PPO (0.725 vs 0.689), negligible reward crashes, and superior KL control than ppo . Our method adds minimal computational overhead and provides an interpretable, crash-resistant RLHF framework that maintains aggressive learning speed while ensuring stable long-horizon optimization suitable for production deployment. Code is available at https://github.com/ryyzn9/SAFE
tldr: The paper introduces SAFE, a new RLHF algorithm that improves upon PPO by using a Double Soft-Min Critic and a multi-layer stabilization framework with entropy-gated KL regulation and PID-controlled adaptive thresholds resulting in more stable and efficient training for large language models.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种新的 RLHF 算法 SAFE，它通过使用双重软最小评论家和一个多层稳定框架，结合熵门控 KL 调节和 PID 控制的自适应阈值，改进了 PPO，从而为大型语言模型带来了更稳定和高效的训练。
summary_zh: 近期的文献将近端策略优化（PPO）定位为人类反馈强化学习（RLHF）中RL部分的经典方法。PPO在实践中表现良好，但其动机具有启发式的性质，并且以一种临时的方式处理在LM-RLHF中使用的KL散度约束，同时面临奖励振荡、熵崩溃、价值函数漂移以及需要频繁重启和大量超参数调优的突发性策略发散等问题。在本文中，我们为LM-RLHF环境开发了一种新的纯粹的在策略行动者-评论家RL方法。我们提出SAFE（具有熵感知控制的稳定对齐微调），一种新颖的RLHF算法，它将用于悲观价值估计的双软最小评论家与一个结合了熵门控KL调节和PID控制自适应阈值的新型多层稳定框架相结合。与标准PPO的对称KL惩罚不同，SAFE区分了高熵探索和低熵模式崩溃，并根据奖励速度动态调整惩罚。在一个30亿参数模型上的实验表明，SAFE实现了比PPO更高的训练平均奖励（+5.15%，0.725对0.689），可以忽略不计的奖励崩溃，以及优于PPO的KL控制。我们的方法增加了最小的计算开销，并提供了一个可解释的、抗崩溃的RLHF框架，该框架在保持积极的学习速度的同时，确保了适合生产部署的稳定的长时程优化。代码可在https://github.com/ryyzn9/SAFE 获取。

title: Decoupling Time and Risk: Risk-Sensitive Reinforcement Learning with General Discounting
summary: Distributional reinforcement learning (RL) is a powerful framework increasingly adopted in safety-critical domains for its ability to optimize risk-sensitive objectives. However, the role of the discount factor is often overlooked, as it is typically treated as a fixed parameter of the Markov decision process or tunable hyperparameter, with little consideration of its effect on the learned policy. In the literature, it is well-known that the discounting function plays a major role in characterizing time preferences of an agent, which an exponential discount factor cannot fully capture. Building on this insight, we propose a novel framework that supports flexible discounting of future rewards and optimization of risk measures in distributional RL. We provide a technical analysis of the optimality of our algorithms, show that our multi-horizon extension fixes issues raised with existing methodologies, and validate the robustness of our methods through extensive experiments. Our results highlight that discounting is a cornerstone in decision-making problems for capturing more expressive temporal and risk preferences profiles, with potential implications for real-world safety-critical applications.
tldr: This paper introduces a new risk-sensitive reinforcement learning framework that supports flexible discounting of future rewards, addressing limitations of the standard exponential discount factor and improving performance in safety-critical domains.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个新的风险敏感强化学习框架，该框架支持对未来奖励的灵活折扣，解决了标准指数折扣因子的局限性，并提高了在安全关键领域的性能。
summary_zh: 分布强化学习(RL)是一种强大的框架，因其优化风险敏感目标的能力而在安全攸关领域中日益普及。然而，折扣因子的作用常常被忽视，因为它通常被视为马尔可夫决策过程的固定参数或可调超参数，很少考虑其对学习策略的影响。在文献中，众所周知，折扣函数在表征智能体的时间偏好方面起着重要作用，而指数折扣因子并不能完全捕捉这一点。基于此洞察，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，该框架支持对未来奖励进行灵活的折扣，并在分布强化学习中优化风险度量。我们对算法的最优性进行了技术分析，表明我们的多视界扩展修复了现有方法论中提出的问题，并通过大量实验验证了我们方法的鲁棒性。我们的结果表明，折扣是决策问题的基石，可以捕捉更具表现力的时间和风险偏好，对现实世界的安全攸关应用具有潜在影响。

title: Autonomous AI Agents for Real-Time Affordable Housing Site Selection: Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning Under Regulatory Constraints
summary: Affordable housing shortages affect billions, while land scarcity and regulations make site selection slow. We present AURA (Autonomous Urban Resource Allocator), a hierarchical multi-agent reinforcement learning system for real-time affordable housing site selection under hard regulatory constraints (QCT, DDA, LIHTC). We model the task as a constrained multi-objective Markov decision process optimizing accessibility, environmental impact, construction cost, and social equity while enforcing feasibility. AURA uses a regulatory-aware state encoding 127 federal and local constraints, Pareto-constrained policy gradients with feasibility guarantees, and reward decomposition separating immediate costs from long-term social outcomes. On datasets from 8 U.S. metros (47,392 candidate parcels), AURA attains 94.3% regulatory compliance and improves Pareto hypervolume by 37.2% over strong baselines. In a New York City 2026 case study, it reduces selection time from 18 months to 72 hours and identifies 23% more viable sites; chosen sites have 31% better transit access and 19% lower environmental impact than expert picks.
tldr: The paper introduces AURA, a hierarchical multi-agent reinforcement learning system for real-time affordable housing site selection that outperforms existing methods in regulatory compliance, Pareto hypervolume, and site selection time.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了AURA，一种用于实时经济适用房选址的分层多智能体强化学习系统，在监管合规性、帕累托超体积和选址时间方面优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 经济适用房短缺影响着数十亿人，而土地稀缺和相关法规使得选址过程缓慢。我们提出了AURA（自主城市资源分配器），这是一种分层多智能体强化学习系统，用于在严格的监管约束（QCT、DDA、LIHTC）下实时选择经济适用房用地。我们将该任务建模为一个受约束的多目标马尔可夫决策过程，在满足可行性的前提下，优化可达性、环境影响、建设成本和社会公平。AURA使用一种感知监管状态的编码方式，涵盖127项联邦和地方约束，采用具有可行性保证的帕累托约束策略梯度，以及将即时成本与长期社会结果分离的奖励分解。在来自美国8个都市区（47392个候选地块）的数据集上，AURA实现了94.3%的法规遵从性，并在强大的基线基础上将帕累托超体积提高了37.2%。在一个纽约市2026年的案例研究中，它将选址时间从18个月缩短到72小时，并识别出多23%的可行地块；所选地块比专家选择的地块拥有高31%的交通可达性和低19%的环境影响。

title: C-IDS: Solving Contextual POMDP via Information-Directed Objective
summary: We study the policy synthesis problem in contextual partially observable Markov decision processes (CPOMDPs), where the environment is governed by an unknown latent context that induces distinct POMDP dynamics. Our goal is to design a policy that simultaneously maximizes cumulative return and actively reduces uncertainty about the underlying context. We introduce an information-directed objective that augments reward maximization with mutual information between the latent context and the agent's observations. We develop the C-IDS algorithm to synthesize policies that maximize the information-directed objective. We show that the objective can be interpreted as a Lagrangian relaxation of the linear information ratio and prove that the temperature parameter is an upper bound on the information ratio. Based on this characterization, we establish a sublinear Bayesian regret bound over K episodes. We evaluate our approach on a continuous Light-Dark environment and show that it consistently outperforms standard POMDP solvers that treat the unknown context as a latent state variable, achieving faster context identification and higher returns.
tldr: This paper introduces C-IDS, an algorithm for solving contextual POMDPs by maximizing a novel information-directed objective that balances reward and context uncertainty reduction, and demonstrates improved performance over standard POMDP solvers in a continuous environment.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为C-IDS的算法，用于解决上下文部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（CPOMDPs），通过最大化一个新的信息导向目标，平衡了奖励和上下文不确定性降低。在连续环境中，C-IDS算法的性能优于标准POMDP求解器。
summary_zh: 我们研究了上下文部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程(CPOMDPs)中的策略综合问题，其中环境由一个未知的潜在上下文控制，该上下文诱导了不同的POMDP动态。我们的目标是设计一种策略，能够同时最大化累积回报并主动减少对潜在上下文的不确定性。我们引入了一个信息导向的目标，该目标通过潜在上下文与agent的观测之间的互信息来增强奖励最大化。我们开发了C-IDS算法来综合最大化信息导向目标的策略。我们证明了该目标可以解释为线性信息比率的拉格朗日松弛，并证明了温度参数是信息比率的上限。基于此，我们建立了一个关于K个episode的次线性贝叶斯遗憾界。我们在连续的明暗环境中评估了我们的方法，并表明其性能始终优于将未知上下文视为潜在状态变量的标准POMDP求解器，从而实现了更快的上下文识别和更高的回报。

title: Robust Intervention Learning from Emergency Stop Interventions
summary: Human interventions are a common source of data in autonomous systems during testing. These interventions provide an important signal about where the current policy needs improvement, but are often noisy and incomplete. We define Robust Intervention Learning (RIL) as the problem of learning from intervention data while remaining robust to the quality and informativeness of the intervention signal. In the best case, interventions are precise and avoiding them is sufficient to solve the task, but in many realistic settings avoiding interventions is necessary but not sufficient for achieving good performance. We study robust intervention learning in the context of emergency stop interventions and propose Residual Intervention Fine-Tuning (RIFT), a residual fine-tuning algorithm that treats intervention feedback as an incomplete learning signal and explicitly combines it with a prior policy. By framing intervention learning as a fine-tuning problem, our approach leverages structure encoded in the prior policy to resolve ambiguity when intervention signals under-specify the task. We provide theoretical analysis characterizing conditions under which this formulation yields principled policy improvement, and identify regimes where intervention learning is expected to fail. Our experiments reveal that residual fine-tuning enables robust and consistent policy improvement across a range of intervention strategies and prior policy qualities, and highlight robust intervention learning as a promising direction for future work.
tldr: The paper introduces Robust Intervention Learning (RIL) for autonomous systems, specifically in the context of emergency stop interventions, and proposes Residual Intervention Fine-Tuning (RIFT), demonstrating improved policy learning across various intervention strategies and prior policy qualities.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了自主系统的鲁棒干预学习 (RIL)，特别是在紧急停止干预的背景下，并提出了残差干预微调 (RIFT)，展示了跨各种干预策略和先验策略质量的改进策略学习。
summary_zh:
摘要：
人为干预是自主系统测试中常见的数据来源。这些干预提供了重要的信号，指示当前策略需要改进的地方，但通常存在噪声和不完整性。我们将稳健干预学习（RIL）定义为从干预数据中学习，同时保持对干预信号质量和信息量的鲁棒性。在最佳情况下，干预是精确的，避免干预足以解决任务，但在许多现实场景中，避免干预对于实现良好性能是必要的，但并不充分。我们研究了在紧急停止干预背景下的稳健干预学习，并提出了残差干预微调（RIFT），这是一种残差微调算法，将干预反馈视为不完整的学习信号，并将其与先验策略显式地结合。通过将干预学习构建为微调问题，我们的方法利用编码在先验策略中的结构来解决干预信号对任务描述不足时的模糊性。我们提供了理论分析，描述了该公式产生有原则的策略改进的条件，并识别了干预学习预计会失败的范围。我们的实验表明，残差微调能够在各种干预策略和先验策略质量下实现稳健且一致的策略改进，并突出了稳健干预学习作为未来研究的一个有希望的方向。

title: A Unified Complementarity-based Approach for Rigid-Body Manipulation and Motion Prediction
summary: Robotic manipulation in unstructured environments requires planners to reason jointly about free-space motion and sustained, frictional contact with the environment. Existing (local) planning and simulation frameworks typically separate these regimes or rely on simplified contact representations, particularly when modeling non-convex or distributed contact patches. Such approximations limit the fidelity of contact-mode transitions and hinder the robust execution of contact-rich behaviors in real time. This paper presents a unified discrete-time modeling framework for robotic manipulation that consistently captures both free motion and frictional contact within a single mathematical formalism (Unicomp). Building on complementarity-based rigid-body dynamics, we formulate free-space motion and contact interactions as coupled linear and nonlinear complementarity problems, enabling principled transitions between contact modes without enforcing fixed-contact assumptions. For planar patch contact, we derive a frictional contact model from the maximum power dissipation principle in which the set of admissible contact wrenches is represented by an ellipsoidal limit surface. This representation captures coupled force-moment effects, including torsional friction, while remaining agnostic to the underlying pressure distribution across the contact patch. The resulting formulation yields a discrete-time predictive model that relates generalized velocities and contact wrenches through quadratic constraints and is suitable for real-time optimization-based planning. Experimental results show that the proposed approach enables stable, physically consistent behavior at interactive speeds across tasks, from planar pushing to contact-rich whole-body maneuvers.
tldr: This paper presents a unified framework, Unicomp, for robotic manipulation that models both free motion and frictional contact using complementarity-based rigid-body dynamics, enabling real-time optimization-based planning for contact-rich tasks.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一个统一的框架Unicomp，用于机器人操作，该框架使用基于互补性的刚体动力学来建模自由运动和摩擦接触，从而可以对接触丰富的任务进行基于实时优化的规划。
summary_zh: 在非结构化环境中进行机器人操作需要规划器联合推理自由空间运动和与环境发生的持续摩擦接触。现有的（局部）规划和仿真框架通常将这些状态分开处理，或依赖于简化的接触表示，特别是在对非凸或分布式接触区域建模时。这些近似限制了接触模式转换的保真度，并阻碍了实时鲁棒地执行富接触行为。本文提出了一种用于机器人操作的统一离散时间建模框架，该框架在单一数学形式主义（Unicomp）中一致地捕捉自由运动和摩擦接触。基于互补刚体动力学，我们将自由空间运动和接触交互形式化为耦合的线性与非线性互补问题，从而在不强制固定接触假设的情况下，实现接触模式之间的可靠转换。对于平面区域接触，我们从最大功率耗散原理推导出摩擦接触模型，其中允许的接触力/力矩集由椭圆形极限曲面表示。该表示捕捉了耦合的力-力矩效应，包括扭转摩擦，同时保持了对接触区域底层压力分布的不可知性。由此产生的公式产生了一个离散时间预测模型，该模型通过二次约束将广义速度和接触力/力矩相关联，适用于基于优化的实时规划。实验结果表明，所提出的方法能够在各种任务中，以交互速度实现稳定且物理一致的行为，包括从平面推动到富接触全身机动。

title: Robot-Assisted Group Tours for Blind People
summary: Group interactions are essential to social functioning, yet effective engagement relies on the ability to recognize and interpret visual cues, making such engagement a significant challenge for blind people. In this paper, we investigate how a mobile robot can support group interactions for blind people. We used the scenario of a guided tour with mixed-visual groups involving blind and sighted visitors. Based on insights from an interview study with blind people (n=5) and museum experts (n=5), we designed and prototyped a robotic system that supported blind visitors to join group tours. We conducted a field study in a science museum where each blind participant (n=8) joined a group tour with one guide and two sighted participants (n=8). Findings indicated users' sense of safety from the robot's navigational support, concerns in the group participation, and preferences for obtaining environmental information. We present design implications for future robotic systems to support blind people's mixed-visual group participation.
tldr: This paper presents a robotic system designed to assist blind individuals in participating in mixed-visual group tours, evaluating its impact on navigation, group interaction, and information access through a field study.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种机器人系统，旨在帮助盲人参与混合视觉人群的团体旅游，通过实地研究评估其对导航、群体互动和信息获取的影响。
summary_zh: 群体互动对社会功能至关重要，然而有效的参与依赖于识别和解读视觉线索的能力，这使得这种参与对于盲人来说是一个重大挑战。本文研究了移动机器人如何能够支持盲人的群体互动。我们采用了包含盲人和视力正常参观者的混合视觉群体导览场景。基于对盲人（n=5）和博物馆专家（n=5）的访谈研究洞见，我们设计并原型化了一个机器人系统，以支持盲人参与团体旅行。我们在科学博物馆进行了一项实地研究，其中每位盲人参与者（n=8）加入了一个由一名导游和两名视力正常参与者（n=8）组成的团体旅行。研究结果表明，用户对机器人导航支持的安全感、群体参与中的顾虑以及获取环境信息的偏好。我们提出了未来机器人系统支持盲人混合视觉群体参与的设计启示。

title: Beyond Ground: Map-Free LiDAR Relocalization for UAVs
summary: Localization is a fundamental capability in unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) systems. Map-free LiDAR relocalization offers an effective solution for achieving high-precision positioning in environments with weak or unavailable GNSS signals. However, existing LiDAR relocalization methods are primarily tailored to autonomous driving, exhibiting significantly degraded accuracy in UAV scenarios. In this paper, we propose MAILS, a novel map-free LiDAR relocalization framework for UAVs. A Locality-Preserving Sliding Window Attention module is first introduced to extract locally discriminative geometric features from sparse point clouds. To handle substantial yaw rotations and altitude variations encountered during UAV flight, we then design a coordinate-independent feature initialization module and a locally invariant positional encoding mechanism, which together significantly enhance the robustness of feature extraction. Furthermore, existing LiDAR-based relocalization datasets fail to capture real-world UAV flight characteristics, such as irregular trajectories and varying altitudes. To address this gap, we construct a large-scale LiDAR localization dataset for UAVs, which comprises four scenes and various flight trajectories, designed to evaluate UAV relocalization performance under realistic conditions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves satisfactory localization precision and consistently outperforms existing techniques by a significant margin. Our code and dataset will be released soon.
tldr: The paper introduces MAILS, a novel map-free LiDAR relocalization framework for UAVs, addressing the limitations of existing methods in UAV scenarios with a new dataset and superior performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为MAILS的新型无人机免地图激光雷达重定位框架，解决了现有方法在无人机场景中的局限性，并提出了一个新数据集和更优越的性能。
summary_zh: 定位是无人机（UAV）系统的一项基本能力。无地图 LiDAR 重定位为在 GNSS 信号微弱或不可用环境中实现高精度定位提供了一种有效解决方案。然而，现有的 LiDAR 重定位方法主要针对自动驾驶量身定制，在无人机场景中表现出显著降低的精度。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的无人机无地图 LiDAR 重定位框架 MAILS。我们首先引入一个局部保持滑动窗口注意力模块，以从稀疏点云中提取局部区分性几何特征。为了处理无人机飞行过程中遇到的显著偏航旋转和高度变化，我们设计了一个坐标无关的特征初始化模块和一个局部不变的位置编码机制，它们共同显著增强了特征提取的鲁棒性。此外，现有的基于 LiDAR 的重定位数据集未能捕捉到真实世界的无人机飞行特性，例如不规则轨迹和变化的高度。为了弥补这一差距，我们构建了一个大规模的无人机 LiDAR 定位数据集，其中包含四个场景和各种飞行轨迹，旨在评估无人机在真实条件下重定位的性能。大量实验表明，我们的方法实现了令人满意的定位精度，并且始终以显著优势优于现有技术。我们的代码和数据集即将发布。

title: VecSet-Edit: Unleashing Pre-trained LRM for Mesh Editing from Single Image
summary: 3D editing has emerged as a critical research area to provide users with flexible control over 3D assets. While current editing approaches predominantly focus on 3D Gaussian Splatting or multi-view images, the direct editing of 3D meshes remains underexplored. Prior attempts, such as VoxHammer, rely on voxel-based representations that suffer from limited resolution and necessitate labor-intensive 3D mask. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{VecSet-Edit}, the first pipeline that leverages the high-fidelity VecSet Large Reconstruction Model (LRM) as a backbone for mesh editing. Our approach is grounded on a analysis of the spatial properties in VecSet tokens, revealing that token subsets govern distinct geometric regions. Based on this insight, we introduce Mask-guided Token Seeding and Attention-aligned Token Gating strategies to precisely localize target regions using only 2D image conditions. Also, considering the difference between VecSet diffusion process versus voxel we design a Drift-aware Token Pruning to reject geometric outliers during the denoising process. Finally, our Detail-preserving Texture Baking module ensures that we not only preserve the geometric details of original mesh but also the textural information. More details can be found in our project page: https://github.com/BlueDyee/VecSet-Edit/tree/main
tldr: The paper introduces VecSet-Edit, a novel pipeline for directly editing 3D meshes from single images using a pre-trained Large Reconstruction Model, addressing limitations of voxel-based approaches through mask-guided token seeding and attention-aligned token gating.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 VecSet-Edit，一种新颖的流水线，利用预训练的大型重建模型，直接从单张图像编辑 3D 网格，通过掩码引导的 token 播种和注意力对齐的 token 门控，克服了基于体素方法的局限性。
summary_zh: 3D编辑作为一项关键的研究领域正在兴起，旨在为用户提供对3D资产的灵活控制。虽然当前的编辑方法主要集中在3D高斯泼溅或多视图图像上，但对3D网格的直接编辑仍然有待进一步探索。先前的尝试，例如VoxHammer，依赖于基于体素的表示，该表示存在分辨率受限的问题，并且需要劳动密集型的3D掩膜。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了\textbf{VecSet-Edit}，这是第一个利用高保真VecSet大型重建模型（LRM）作为网格编辑主干的流程。我们的方法基于对VecSet tokens中空间属性的分析，揭示了token子集控制着不同的几何区域。基于这一洞察，我们引入了掩膜引导的Token播种和注意力对齐的Token门控策略，仅使用2D图像条件即可精确定位目标区域。此外，考虑到VecSet扩散过程与体素之间的差异，我们设计了漂移感知Token剪枝，以在去噪过程中剔除几何离群值。最后，我们的细节保留纹理烘焙模块确保我们不仅保留原始网格的几何细节，还保留纹理信息。更多详情请参阅我们的项目页面：https://github.com/BlueDyee/VecSet-Edit/tree/main

title: SkeletonGaussian: Editable 4D Generation through Gaussian Skeletonization
summary: 4D generation has made remarkable progress in synthesizing dynamic 3D objects from input text, images, or videos. However, existing methods often represent motion as an implicit deformation field, which limits direct control and editability. To address this issue, we propose SkeletonGaussian, a novel framework for generating editable dynamic 3D Gaussians from monocular video input. Our approach introduces a hierarchical articulated representation that decomposes motion into sparse rigid motion explicitly driven by a skeleton and fine-grained non-rigid motion. Concretely, we extract a robust skeleton and drive rigid motion via linear blend skinning, followed by a hexplane-based refinement for non-rigid deformations, enhancing interpretability and editability. Experimental results demonstrate that SkeletonGaussian surpasses existing methods in generation quality while enabling intuitive motion editing, establishing a new paradigm for editable 4D generation. Project page: https://wusar.github.io/projects/skeletongaussian/
tldr: SkeletonGaussian introduces a novel framework for generating editable dynamic 3D Gaussians from monocular video by decomposing motion into rigid (skeleton-driven) and non-rigid components, enabling intuitive motion editing.
tldr_zh: SkeletonGaussian 提出了一种新颖的框架，用于从单目视频生成可编辑的动态3D高斯模型，通过将运动分解为刚性（骨骼驱动）和非刚性部分，从而实现直观的运动编辑。
summary_zh: 4D生成技术在从输入文本、图像或视频合成动态3D对象方面取得了显著进展。然而，现有方法通常将运动表示为隐式的形变场，这限制了直接控制和可编辑性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出SkeletonGaussian，一个从单目视频输入生成可编辑动态3D高斯分布的新颖框架。我们的方法引入了一种分层的铰接表示，将运动分解为由骨骼显式驱动的稀疏刚性运动和精细的非刚性运动。具体而言，我们提取一个鲁棒的骨骼并通过线性混合蒙皮驱动刚性运动，然后进行基于六平面 (hexplane) 的非刚性形变精细化，从而增强了解释性和可编辑性。实验结果表明，SkeletonGaussian在生成质量上超越了现有方法，同时实现了直观的运动编辑，为可编辑的4D生成建立了一个新的范例。项目主页：https://wusar.github.io/projects/skeletongaussian/

title: A labeled dataset of simulated phlebotomy procedures for medical AI: polygon annotations for object detection and human-object interaction
summary: This data article presents a dataset of 11,884 labeled images documenting a simulated blood extraction (phlebotomy) procedure performed on a training arm. Images were extracted from high-definition videos recorded under controlled conditions and curated to reduce redundancy using Structural Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) filtering. An automated face-anonymization step was applied to all videos prior to frame selection. Each image contains polygon annotations for five medically relevant classes: syringe, rubber band, disinfectant wipe, gloves, and training arm. The annotations were exported in a segmentation format compatible with modern object detection frameworks (e.g., YOLOv8), ensuring broad usability. This dataset is partitioned into training (70%), validation (15%), and test (15%) subsets and is designed to advance research in medical training automation and human-object interaction. It enables multiple applications, including phlebotomy tool detection, procedural step recognition, workflow analysis, conformance checking, and the development of educational systems that provide structured feedback to medical trainees. The data and accompanying label files are publicly available on Zenodo.
tldr: The paper introduces a labeled image dataset of simulated phlebotomy procedures with polygon annotations for object detection and human-object interaction, aiming to advance research in medical training automation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个模拟抽血程序的标注图像数据集，包含用于目标检测和人机交互的多边形注释，旨在推进医疗培训自动化领域的研究。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一个包含11884张带标签图像的数据集，这些图像记录了在训练手臂上进行的模拟抽血（静脉切开术）过程。图像是从受控条件下录制的高清视频中提取的，并使用结构相似性指数度量（SSIM）过滤进行整理，以减少冗余。在帧选择之前，对所有视频应用了自动人脸匿名化处理。每张图像都包含五个医学相关类别的多边形标注：注射器、橡皮筋、消毒湿巾、手套和训练手臂。标注以分割格式导出，该格式与现代目标检测框架（例如，YOLOv8）兼容，确保了广泛的可用性。该数据集被划分为训练集（70%）、验证集（15%）和测试集（15%）子集，旨在推进医疗培训自动化和人机交互研究。它支持多种应用，包括抽血工具检测、程序步骤识别、工作流程分析、一致性检查以及开发为医学学员提供结构化反馈的教育系统。数据和随附的标签文件可在Zenodo上公开获取。

title: Expected Moral Shortfall for Ethical Competence in Decision-making Models
summary: Moral cognition is a crucial yet underexplored aspect of decision-making in AI models. Regardless of the application domain, it should be a consideration that allows for ethically aligned decision-making. This paper presents a multifaceted contribution to this research space. Firstly, a comparative analysis of techniques to instill ethical competence into AI models has been presented to gauge them on multiple performance metrics. Second, a novel mathematical discretization of morality and a demonstration of its real-life application have been conveyed and tested against other techniques on two datasets. This value is modeled as the risk of loss incurred by the least moral cases, or an Expected Moral Shortfall (EMS), which we direct the AI model to minimize in order to maximize its performance while retaining ethical competence. Lastly, the paper discusses the tradeoff between preliminary AI decision-making metrics such as model performance, complexity, and scale of ethical competence to recognize the true extent of practical social impact.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel 'Expected Moral Shortfall' (EMS) approach for instilling ethical competence in AI models, evaluating existing techniques, and discussing the trade-offs between performance, complexity, and ethical considerations.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新颖的“预期道德缺失”（EMS）方法，用于在AI模型中灌输道德能力，评估现有技术，并讨论性能、复杂性和道德考量之间的权衡。
summary_zh: 道德认知是人工智能模型决策过程中一个至关重要但尚未充分探索的方面。无论应用领域如何，都应考虑道德认知，以实现符合伦理的决策。本文对该研究领域做出了多方面的贡献。首先，对向人工智能模型灌输伦理能力的技术进行了比较分析，并在多个性能指标上对其进行了评估。其次，提出了一种新颖的道德数学离散化方法，并展示了其在现实生活中的应用，且在两个数据集上与其他技术进行了对比测试。该价值被建模为最不道德案例所遭受的损失风险，或称预期道德不足（Expected Moral Shortfall, EMS），我们引导人工智能模型使其最小化，以便在保持伦理能力的同时，最大限度地提高其性能。最后，本文讨论了初步人工智能决策指标（如模型性能、复杂性和伦理能力的规模）之间的权衡，以认识到实际社会影响的真正程度。

title: SymPlex: A Structure-Aware Transformer for Symbolic PDE Solving
summary: We propose SymPlex, a reinforcement learning framework for discovering analytical symbolic solutions to partial differential equations (PDEs) without access to ground-truth expressions. SymPlex formulates symbolic PDE solving as tree-structured decision-making and optimizes candidate solutions using only the PDE and its boundary conditions. At its core is SymFormer, a structure-aware Transformer that models hierarchical symbolic dependencies via tree-relative self-attention and enforces syntactic validity through grammar-constrained autoregressive decoding, overcoming the limited expressivity of sequence-based generators. Unlike numerical and neural approaches that approximate solutions in discretized or implicit function spaces, SymPlex operates directly in symbolic expression space, enabling interpretable and human-readable solutions that naturally represent non-smooth behavior and explicit parametric dependence. Empirical results demonstrate exact recovery of non-smooth and parametric PDE solutions using deep learning-based symbolic methods.
tldr: SymPlex, a reinforcement learning framework with a structure-aware Transformer, discovers analytical symbolic solutions to PDEs by operating in symbolic expression space, achieving exact recovery of non-smooth and parametric solutions.
tldr_zh: SymPlex是一个强化学习框架，使用结构感知的Transformer，通过在符号表达式空间中操作来发现偏微分方程的解析符号解，从而精确恢复非光滑和参数化解。
summary_zh: 我们提出了SymPlex，一种强化学习框架，用于发现偏微分方程（PDEs）的解析符号解，无需访问真实表达式。SymPlex将符号PDE求解公式化为树状结构的决策过程，并仅使用PDE及其边界条件来优化候选解。 其核心是SymFormer，一个结构感知的Transformer，通过树相对自注意力建模分层符号依赖关系，并通过语法约束的自回归解码来强制执行语法有效性，克服了基于序列生成器的有限表达能力。与在离散或隐函数空间中逼近解的数值和神经方法不同，SymPlex直接在符号表达式空间中操作，从而产生可解释且人类可读的解，能够自然地表示非光滑行为和显式参数依赖性。 经验结果表明，通过基于深度学习的符号方法，能够精确恢复非光滑和参数化的PDE解。

title: Dull, Dirty, Dangerous: Understanding the Past, Present, and Future of a Key Motivation for Robotics
summary: In robotics, the concept of "dull, dirty, and dangerous" (DDD) work has been used to motivate where robots might be useful. In this paper, we conduct an empirical analysis of robotics publications between 1980 and 2024 that mention DDD, and find that only 2.7% of publications define DDD and 8.7% of publications provide concrete examples of tasks or jobs that are DDD. We then review the social science literature on "dull," "dirty," and "dangerous" work to provide definitions and guidance on how to conceptualize DDD for robotics. Finally, we propose a framework that helps the robotics community consider the job context for our technology, encouraging a more informed perspective on how robotics may impact human labor.
tldr: This paper analyzes how "dull, dirty, and dangerous" (DDD) is used in robotics literature, identifies gaps in its definition and application, and proposes a framework for considering the job context of robotics technology.
tldr_zh: 该论文分析了机器人文献中“枯燥、肮脏、危险”（DDD）的使用情况，指出了其定义和应用中的差距，并提出了一个考虑机器人技术工作环境的框架。
summary_zh: 在机器人学中，“枯燥、肮脏和危险”(DDD)的工作概念被用来激发机器人可能发挥作用的领域。本文对1980年至2024年间提及DDD的机器人学出版物进行了实证分析，发现只有2.7%的出版物对DDD进行了定义，而8.7%的出版物提供了DDD任务或工作的具体例子。然后，我们回顾了社会科学文献中关于“枯燥”、“肮脏”和“危险”工作的论述，为机器人学角度下DDD的概念化提供定义和指导。最后，我们提出了一个框架，帮助机器人学界考虑技术应用的工作环境，从而鼓励以更明智的视角看待机器人学可能对人类劳动产生的影响。

title: Radar-Inertial Odometry For Computationally Constrained Aerial Navigation
summary: Recently, the progress in the radar sensing technology consisting in the miniaturization of the packages and increase in measuring precision has drawn the interest of the robotics research community. Indeed, a crucial task enabling autonomy in robotics is to precisely determine the pose of the robot in space. To fulfill this task sensor fusion algorithms are often used, in which data from one or several exteroceptive sensors like, for example, LiDAR, camera, laser ranging sensor or GNSS are fused together with the Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) measurements to obtain an estimate of the navigation states of the robot. Nonetheless, owing to their particular sensing principles, some exteroceptive sensors are often incapacitated in extreme environmental conditions, like extreme illumination or presence of fine particles in the environment like smoke or fog. Radars are largely immune to aforementioned factors thanks to the characteristics of electromagnetic waves they use. In this thesis, we present Radar-Inertial Odometry (RIO) algorithms to fuse the information from IMU and radar in order to estimate the navigation states of a (Uncrewed Aerial Vehicle) UAV capable of running on a portable resource-constrained embedded computer in real-time and making use of inexpensive, consumer-grade sensors. We present novel RIO approaches relying on the multi-state tightly-coupled Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) and Factor Graphs (FG) fusing instantaneous velocities of and distances to 3D points delivered by a lightweight, low-cost, off-the-shelf Frequency Modulated Continuous Wave (FMCW) radar with IMU readings. We also show a novel way to exploit advances in deep learning to retrieve 3D point correspondences in sparse and noisy radar point clouds.
tldr: This paper presents Radar-Inertial Odometry (RIO) algorithms for UAV navigation using a low-cost FMCW radar and IMU, addressing challenges in environments where visual odometry fails by using EKF, Factor Graphs and deep learning for point cloud correspondences.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种雷达-惯性里程计（RIO）算法，该算法使用低成本的调频连续波（FMCW）雷达和IMU进行无人机导航，通过使用EKF、因子图和深度学习方法来应对视觉里程计失效的环境，从而解决了该问题。
summary_zh: 近年来，雷达传感技术在封装小型化和测量精度提升方面的进步引起了机器人研究界的兴趣。 事实上，实现机器人自主性的一个关键任务是精确确定机器人在空间中的姿态。 为了完成这项任务，通常使用传感器融合算法，其中来自一个或多个外部传感器（例如，激光雷达、相机、激光测距传感器或全球导航卫星系统 ）的数据与惯性测量单元 (IMU) 的测量数据融合在一起，以获得机器人导航状态的估计。 然而，由于其特殊的传感原理，一些外部传感器在极端的环境条件下，例如极强的光照或环境中存在烟雾或雾等细小颗粒时，经常失效。 由于雷达使用的电磁波的特性，雷达在很大程度上不受上述因素的影响。 在本论文中，我们提出了雷达惯性里程计 (RIO) 算法，以融合来自 IMU 和雷达的信息，从而估计无人机 (UAV) 的导航状态，该无人机能够在便携式、资源受限的嵌入式计算机上实时运行，并利用廉价的消费级传感器。 我们提出了新颖的 RIO 方法，这些方法依赖于多状态紧耦合扩展卡尔曼滤波器 (EKF) 和因子图 (FG)，将轻量级、低成本、现成的调频连续波 (FMCW) 雷达提供的瞬时速度和到 3D 点的距离与 IMU 读数融合。 我们还展示了一种利用深度学习的进展来检索稀疏和嘈杂的雷达点云中 3D 点对应关系的新方法。

title: Can We Redesign a Shoulder Exosuit to Enhance Comfort and Usability Without Losing Assistance?
summary: Reduced shoulder mobility limits upper-limb function and the performance of activities of daily living across a wide range of conditions. Wearable exosuits have shown promise in assisting arm elevation, reducing muscle effort, and supporting functional movements; however, comfort is rarely prioritized as an explicit design objective, despite it strongly affects real-life, long-term usage. This study presents a redesigned soft shoulder exosuit (Soft Shoulder v2) developed to address comfort-related limitations identified in our previous version, while preserving assistive performance. In parallel, assistance was also improved, shifting from the coronal plane to the sagittal plane to better support functionally relevant hand positioning. A controlled comparison between the previous (v1) and redesigned (v2) modules was conducted in eight healthy participants, who performed static holding, dynamic lifting, and a functional pick and place task. Muscle activity, kinematics, and user-reported outcomes were assessed. Both versions increased endurance time, reduced deltoid activation, and preserved transparency during unpowered shoulder elevation. However, the difference between them emerged most clearly during functional tasks and comfort evaluation. The redesigned module facilitated forward arm positioning and increased transverse plane mobility by up to 30 deg, without increasing muscular demand. User-reported outcomes further indicated a substantial improvement in wearability, with markedly lower perceived pressure and higher ratings in effectiveness, ease of use, and comfort compared to the previous design. Taken together, these findings show that targeted, user-centered design refinements can improve comfort and functional interaction without compromising assistive performance, advancing the development of soft exosuits suitable for prolonged and daily use.
tldr: This paper presents a redesigned shoulder exosuit that improves comfort and usability while maintaining assistive performance, demonstrating that user-centered design can enhance exosuit functionality for prolonged use.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种重新设计的肩部外骨骼，在保持辅助性能的同时提高了舒适性和可用性，证明以用户为中心的设计可以增强外骨骼的功能性，使其适合长时间使用。
summary_zh: 肩关节活动度受限会限制上肢功能以及在各种情况下完成日常生活活动的能力。可穿戴外骨骼服装已显示出在辅助手臂抬起、降低肌肉用力以及支持功能性运动方面的潜力；然而，舒适性很少作为明确的设计目标优先考虑，尽管它强烈影响真实生活中的长期使用。本研究提出了一种重新设计的软肩外骨骼服装（Soft Shoulder v2），旨在解决我们之前版本中发现的与舒适性相关的局限性，同时保持辅助性能。与此同时，辅助也得到了改进，从冠状面转移到矢状面，以更好地支持功能相关的的握持姿势。 在八名健康参与者中进行了一项受控比较，比较了之前版本 (v1) 和重新设计的模块 (v2)，这些参与者进行了静态保持、动态举重和功能性拾放任务。评估了肌肉活动、运动学和用户报告的结果。两个版本都增加了耐力时间，降低了三角肌的激活，并在非驱动肩部抬高期间保持了透明度。然而，它们之间的差异在功能性任务和舒适性评估中最为明显。 重新设计的模块促进了手臂前伸，并将横断面的活动度提高了高达 30 度，而没有增加肌肉需求。用户报告的结果进一步表明可穿戴性有了显著改善，与之前的设计相比，感知压力明显降低，且在有效性、易用性和舒适性方面的评分更高。总而言之，这些发现表明，有针对性的、以用户为中心的设计改进可以在不影响辅助性能的情况下提高舒适性和功能性交互，从而推动适用于长期和日常使用的软外骨骼服装的开发。

title: Gust Estimation and Rejection with a Disturbance Observer for Proprioceptive Underwater Soft Morphing Wings
summary: Unmanned underwater vehicles are increasingly employed for maintenance and surveying tasks at sea, but their operation in shallow waters is often hindered by hydrodynamic disturbances such as waves, currents, and turbulence. These unsteady flows can induce rapid changes in direction and speed, compromising vehicle stability and manoeuvrability. Marine organisms contend with such conditions by combining proprioceptive feedback with flexible fins and tails to reject disturbances. Inspired by this strategy, we propose soft morphing wings endowed with proprioceptive sensing to mitigate environmental perturbations. The wing's continuous deformation provides a natural means to infer dynamic disturbances: sudden changes in camber directly reflect variations in the oncoming flow. By interpreting this proprioceptive signal, a disturbance observer can reconstruct flow parameters in real time. To enable this, we develop and experimentally validate a dynamic model of a hydraulically actuated soft wing with controllable camber. We then show that curvature-based sensing allows accurate estimation of disturbances in the angle of attack. Finally, we demonstrate that a controller leveraging these proprioceptive estimates can reject disturbances in the lift response of the soft wing. By combining proprioceptive sensing with a disturbance observer, this technique mirrors biological strategies and provides a pathway for soft underwater vehicles to maintain stability in hazardous environments.
tldr: This paper presents a disturbance observer using proprioceptive sensing on soft morphing wings for underwater vehicles, enabling rejection of hydrodynamic disturbances by estimating flow parameters from wing curvature changes. It demonstrates a bio-inspired approach to improve stability and maneuverability in turbulent underwater environments.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种使用软变形翼上的本体感受传感器的扰动观测器，用于水下车辆，通过估计翼曲率变化引起的流动参数来抑制水动力扰动。它展示了一种受生物启发的方法，可提高在湍流水下环境中的稳定性和机动性。
summary_zh: 无人水下航行器越来越多地被用于海上维护和勘测任务，但其在浅水区的作业常常受到水动力扰动（如波浪、海流和湍流）的阻碍。这些非定常流可能导致方向和速度的快速变化，从而损害航行器的稳定性和机动性。海洋生物通过结合本体感受反馈与柔性鳍和尾来抵抗这种状况，从而抑制扰动。受此策略的启发，我们提出了一种具有本体感受的软体变形翼，以减轻环境扰动。机翼的连续变形提供了一种推断动态扰动的自然方法：弧度的突然变化直接反映了迎面而来流动的变化。通过解释这种本体感受信号，扰动观测器可以实时重构流动参数。为了实现这一点，我们开发并通过实验验证了一种具有可控弧度的液压驱动软翼的动力学模型。然后，我们证明了基于曲率的感知能够准确估计攻角上的扰动。最后，我们展示了利用这些本体感受估计值的控制器可以抑制软翼升力响应中的扰动。通过将本体感受与扰动观测器相结合，该技术模仿了生物策略，并为软体水下航行器在危险环境中保持稳定性提供了一种途径。

title: Quantile Transfer for Reliable Operating Point Selection in Visual Place Recognition
summary: Visual Place Recognition (VPR) is a key component for localisation in GNSS-denied environments, but its performance critically depends on selecting an image matching threshold (operating point) that balances precision and recall. Thresholds are typically hand-tuned offline for a specific environment and fixed during deployment, leading to degraded performance under environmental change. We propose a method that, given a user-defined precision requirement, automatically selects the operating point of a VPR system to maximise recall. The method uses a small calibration traversal with known correspondences and transfers thresholds to deployment via quantile normalisation of similarity score distributions. This quantile transfer ensures that thresholds remain stable across calibration sizes and query subsets, making the method robust to sampling variability. Experiments with multiple state-of-the-art VPR techniques and datasets show that the proposed approach consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art, delivering up to 25% higher recall in high-precision operating regimes. The method eliminates manual tuning by adapting to new environments and generalising across operating conditions. Our code will be released upon acceptance.
tldr: This paper introduces a method for automatically selecting the operating point (image matching threshold) in Visual Place Recognition (VPR) to maximize recall while maintaining a user-defined precision, using quantile transfer for robustness across environments. It outperforms state-of-the-art methods in VPR under changing conditions.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种自动选择视觉场景识别（VPR）中操作点（图像匹配阈值）的方法，以最大化召回率，同时保持用户定义的精度。该方法使用分位数迁移，增强了系统在不同环境下的鲁棒性，并在VPR技术上超越了现有方法。
summary_zh: 视觉地点识别（VPR）是在 GNSS 受限环境中进行定位的关键组成部分，但其性能严重依赖于选择一个平衡精度和召回率的图像匹配阈值（工作点）。通常情况下，阈值是在特定环境下离线手动调整的，并在部署期间固定不变，导致环境变化时性能下降。我们提出了一种方法，该方法在给定用户定义的精度要求下，自动选择 VPR 系统的工作点，以最大化召回率。该方法使用少量具有已知对应关系的校准遍历，并通过相似度分数分布的分位数归一化将阈值转移到部署环境中。这种分位数转移确保了阈值在不同校准规模和查询子集之间保持稳定，从而使该方法对采样变异具有鲁棒性。使用多种最先进的 VPR 技术和数据集进行的实验表明，所提出的方法始终优于现有技术，在高精度工作状态下，召回率提升高达 25%。该方法通过适应新环境和推广到不同运行条件来消除手动调整。我们的代码将在验收后发布。

title: Comparative Analysis of Autonomous Robotic and Manual Techniques for Ultrasonic Sacral Osteotomy: A Preliminary Study
summary: In this paper, we introduce an autonomous Ultrasonic Sacral Osteotomy (USO) robotic system that integrates an ultrasonic osteotome with a seven-degree-of-freedom (DoF) robotic manipulator guided by an optical tracking system. To assess multi-directional control along both the surface trajectory and cutting depth of this system, we conducted quantitative comparisons between manual USO (MUSO) and robotic USO (RUSO) in Sawbones phantoms under identical osteotomy conditions. The RUSO system achieved sub-millimeter trajectory accuracy (0.11 mm RMSE), an order of magnitude improvement over MUSO (1.10 mm RMSE). Moreover, MUSO trials showed substantial over-penetration (16.0 mm achieved vs. 8.0 mm target), whereas the RUSO system maintained precise depth control (8.1 mm). These results demonstrate that robotic procedures can effectively overcome the critical limitations of manual osteotomy, establishing a foundation for safer and more precise sacral resections.
tldr: The paper presents a robotic system for ultrasonic sacral osteotomy (RUSO) and demonstrates significant improvements over manual techniques (MUSO) in accuracy and depth control using Sawbones phantoms.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于超声骶骨截骨术 (RUSO) 的机器人系统，并展示了使用 Sawbones 假体在精度和深度控制方面对人工技术 (MUSO) 的显着改进。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种自主超声骶骨截骨术 (USO) 机器人系统，该系统集成了超声骨刀与七自由度 (DoF) 机器人机械臂，并通过光学跟踪系统进行引导。为了评估该系统在表面轨迹和切割深度上的多方向控制能力，我们在模拟骨骼模型中进行了手动 USO (MUSO) 和机器人 USO (RUSO) 的定量比较，截骨条件相同。RUSO 系统实现了亚毫米级的轨迹精度（均方根误差 0.11 毫米），比 MUSO 提升了一个数量级（均方根误差 1.10 毫米）。 此外，MUSO 试验显示出明显的过度穿透（实际穿透 16.0 毫米，目标为 8.0 毫米），而 RUSO 系统保持了精确的深度控制（8.1 毫米）。 这些结果表明，机器人手术能够有效地克服手动截骨术的关键局限性，为更安全、更精确的骶骨切除术奠定了基础。

title: Control and State Estimation of Vehicle-Mounted Aerial Systems in GPS-Denied, Non-Inertial Environments
summary: We present a robust control and estimation framework for quadrotors operating in Global Navigation Satellite System(GNSS)-denied, non-inertial environments where inertial sensors such as Inertial Measurement Units (IMUs) become unreliable due to platform-induced accelerations. In such settings, conventional estimators fail to distinguish whether the measured accelerations arise from the quadrotor itself or from the non-inertial platform, leading to drift and control degradation. Unlike conventional approaches that depend heavily on IMU and GNSS, our method relies exclusively on external position measurements combined with a Extended Kalman Filter with Unknown Inputs (EKF-UI) to account for platform motion. The estimator is paired with a cascaded PID controller for full 3D tracking. To isolate estimator performance from localization errors, all tests are conducted using high-precision motion capture systems. Experimental results in a moving-cart testbed validate our approach under both translational in X-axis and Y-axis dissonance. Compared to standard EKF, the proposed method significantly improves stability and trajectory tracking without requiring inertial feedback, enabling practical deployment on moving platforms such as trucks or elevators.
tldr: This paper presents a control and estimation framework for quadrotors in GPS-denied, non-inertial environments using an Extended Kalman Filter with Unknown Inputs (EKF-UI) and external position measurements, demonstrating improved stability and tracking compared to standard EKF.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种四旋翼飞行器在GPS拒止、非惯性环境下使用的控制和估计框架，该框架使用扩展卡尔曼滤波器与未知输入 (EKF-UI) 以及外部位置测量，与标准EKF相比，表现出更高的稳定性和跟踪性能。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种针对四旋翼飞行器在GNSS拒止、非惯性环境中运行的鲁棒控制与估计框架，在这种环境中，诸如惯性测量单元(IMU)之类的惯性传感器由于平台引起的加速度而变得不可靠。在此类环境中，传统的估计器无法区分测量到的加速度是来自四旋翼飞行器本身还是来自非惯性平台，从而导致漂移和控制性能下降。与严重依赖IMU和GNSS的传统方法不同，我们的方法仅依赖于外部位置测量，并结合使用具有未知输入的扩展卡尔曼滤波器(EKF-UI)来考虑平台运动。该估计器与级联PID控制器配对，用于完整的3D跟踪。为了将估计器性能与定位误差隔离，所有测试均使用高精度运动捕捉系统进行。在移动推车测试平台上的实验结果验证了我们的方法在X轴和Y轴平移失谐下的有效性。与标准EKF相比，该方法显著提高了稳定性和轨迹跟踪性能，而无需惯性反馈，从而可以在卡车或电梯等移动平台上进行实际部署。

title: An Anatomy-specific Guidewire Shaping Robot for Improved Vascular Navigation
summary: Neuroendovascular access often relies on passive microwires that are hand-shaped at the back table and then used to track a microcatheter to the target. Neuroendovascular surgeons determine the shape of the wire by examining the patient pre-operative images and using their experience to identify anatomy specific shapes of the wire that would facilitate reaching the target. This procedure is particularly complex in convoluted anatomical structures and is heavily dependent on the level of expertise of the surgeon. Towards enabling standardized autonomous shaping, we present a bench-top guidewire shaping robot capable of producing navigation-specific desired wire configurations. We present a model that can map the desired wire shape into robot actions, calibrated using experimental data. We show that the robot can produce clinically common tip geometries (C, S, Angled, Hook) and validate them with respect to the model-predicted shapes in 2D. Our model predicts the shape with a Root Mean Square (RMS) error of 0.56mm across all shapes when compared to the experimental results. We also demonstrate 3D tip shaping capabilities and the ability to traverse complex endoluminal navigation from the petrous Internal Carotid Artery (ICA) to the Posterior Communicating Artery (PComm).
tldr: This paper presents a guidewire shaping robot for neuroendovascular procedures, enabling automated and anatomy-specific wire configurations, validated with experimental results in 2D and 3D.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于神经血管内手术的导丝成型机器人，能够实现自动且特定于解剖结构的导丝配置，并通过二维和三维实验结果进行了验证。
summary_zh: 神经血管内通路通常依赖于被动型微导丝，这些导丝在后处理台上手工塑形后，用于引导微导管到达目标位置。神经血管内外科医生通过检查患者的术前影像，并凭借经验来确定导丝的形状，从而识别出能够促进到达目标的特定解剖结构对应的导丝形状。在复杂的解剖结构中，这个过程尤其复杂，并且很大程度上依赖于外科医生的专业水平。为了实现标准化的自主塑形，我们展示了一种台式导丝塑形机器人，该机器人能够生成特定于导航所需的导丝配置。我们提出了一个可以将期望的导丝形状映射为机器人动作的模型，该模型通过实验数据进行校准。我们证明了该机器人可以生产临床上常见的尖端几何形状（C型、S型、倾斜型、钩型），并在二维空间中验证了它们与模型预测形状的一致性。与实验结果相比，我们的模型在所有形状上的均方根 (RMS) 误差为 0.56 毫米。我们还演示了三维尖端塑形能力，以及从岩段颈内动脉 (ICA) 到后交通动脉 (PComm) 的复杂管腔内导航能力。

title: FDA Flocking: Future Direction-Aware Flocking via Velocity Prediction
summary: Understanding self-organization in natural collectives such as bird flocks inspires swarm robotics, yet most flocking models remain reactive, overlooking anticipatory cues that enhance coordination. Motivated by avian postural and wingbeat signals, as well as multirotor attitude tilts that precede directional changes, this work introduces a principled, bio-inspired anticipatory augmentation of reactive flocking termed Future Direction-Aware (FDA) flocking. In the proposed framework, agents blend reactive alignment with a predictive term based on short-term estimates of neighbors' future velocities, regulated by a tunable blending parameter that interpolates between reactive and anticipatory behaviors. This predictive structure enhances velocity consensus and cohesion-separation balance while mitigating the adverse effects of sensing and communication delays and measurement noise that destabilize reactive baselines. Simulation results demonstrate that FDA achieves faster and higher alignment, enhanced translational displacement of the flock, and improved robustness to delays and noise compared to a purely reactive model. Future work will investigate adaptive blending strategies, weighted prediction schemes, and experimental validation on multirotor drone swarms.
tldr: This paper introduces Future Direction-Aware (FDA) flocking, a bio-inspired modification to reactive flocking that incorporates future velocity prediction to improve coordination, robustness, and performance in simulated multi-agent systems.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了未来方向感知（FDA）集群，这是一种受生物启发对反应式集群的修改，它结合了未来速度预测，以提高仿真多智能体系统中的协调性、鲁棒性和性能。
summary_zh: 了解鸟群等自然集体中的自组织现象为集群机器人提供了灵感，但大多数集群模型仍然是反应式的，忽略了能够增强协同的预见性线索。受鸟类姿态和翅膀节拍信号，以及多旋翼飞行器在方向变化前发生的姿态倾斜的启发，本研究提出了一种有原则的、受生物启发的前瞻性增强反应式集群方法，称为未来方向感知（FDA）集群。在所提出的框架中，智能体将反应式对齐与基于邻居未来速度的短期估计的预测项相结合，并通过一个可调的混合参数来调节，该参数在反应式和前瞻性行为之间进行插值。这种预测结构增强了速度一致性和内聚-分离平衡，同时减轻了感知和通信延迟以及测量噪声对反应式基线造成的不利影响。仿真结果表明，与纯反应式模型相比，FDA实现了更快、更高程度的对齐，增强了集群的平动位移，并提高了对延迟和噪声的鲁棒性。未来的工作将研究自适应混合策略、加权预测方案以及多旋翼无人机集群的实验验证。

title: Skin Tokens: A Learned Compact Representation for Unified Autoregressive Rigging
summary: The rapid proliferation of generative 3D models has created a critical bottleneck in animation pipelines: rigging. Existing automated methods are fundamentally limited by their approach to skinning, treating it as an ill-posed, high-dimensional regression task that is inefficient to optimize and is typically decoupled from skeleton generation. We posit this is a representation problem and introduce SkinTokens: a learned, compact, and discrete representation for skinning weights. By leveraging an FSQ-CVAE to capture the intrinsic sparsity of skinning, we reframe the task from continuous regression to a more tractable token sequence prediction problem. This representation enables TokenRig, a unified autoregressive framework that models the entire rig as a single sequence of skeletal parameters and SkinTokens, learning the complicated dependencies between skeletons and skin deformations. The unified model is then amenable to a reinforcement learning stage, where tailored geometric and semantic rewards improve generalization to complex, out-of-distribution assets. Quantitatively, the SkinTokens representation leads to a 98%-133% percents improvement in skinning accuracy over state-of-the-art methods, while the full TokenRig framework, refined with RL, enhances bone prediction by 17%-22%. Our work presents a unified, generative approach to rigging that yields higher fidelity and robustness, offering a scalable solution to a long-standing challenge in 3D content creation.
tldr: This paper introduces SkinTokens, a learned representation for skinning weights, and TokenRig, a unified autoregressive framework for rigging, achieving improved accuracy and robustness through reinforcement learning.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 SkinTokens，一种用于蒙皮权重的学习表示方法，以及 TokenRig，一种用于绑定（rigging）的统一自回归框架，通过强化学习实现更高的准确性和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 生成式3D模型的快速扩散在动画流程中造成了一个关键瓶颈：绑定。现有的自动化方法从根本上受到其蒙皮处理方式的限制，将其视为一个病态的、高维度的回归任务，优化效率低下并且通常与骨骼生成解耦。我们认为这是一个表示问题，并引入了SkinTokens：一种学习到的、紧凑且离散的蒙皮权重表示。通过利用FSQ-CVAE捕捉蒙皮的内在稀疏性，我们将任务从连续回归重新构建为一个更易于处理的token序列预测问题。这种表示支持TokenRig，一个统一的自回归框架，将整个绑定建模为骨骼参数和SkinTokens的单一序列，从而学习骨骼和蒙皮变形之间复杂的依赖关系。然后，该统一模型适用于强化学习阶段，其中定制的几何和语义奖励可以提高对复杂、分布外资产的泛化能力。在定量方面，SkinTokens表示比最先进的方法在蒙皮精度方面提高了98%-133%，而经过RL优化的完整TokenRig框架将骨骼预测提高了17%-22%。我们的工作提出了一种统一的、生成式的绑定方法，可以产生更高的保真度和鲁棒性，为3D内容创作中长期存在的挑战提供了一种可扩展的解决方案。

title: Attack Selection Reduces Safety in Concentrated AI Control Settings against Trusted Monitoring
summary: Future AI deployments will likely be monitored for malicious behaviour. The ability of these AIs to subvert monitors by adversarially selecting against them - attack selection - is particularly concerning. To study this, we let a red team create attack policies that attempt to insert attacks into code without being caught by a monitor in the concentrated BigCodeBench backdooring setting. We decompose attack selection into two problems: mapping attacks to a quality score and mapping quality scores to submission probabilities. We frame attack selection as a classification problem and show that safety is significantly more sensitive to FPR than TPR. We find that prompting the attacker model to reason about the monitor while being cautious with attack selection reduces safety from a baseline of 99% to 59% at 0.5% auditing budget, emphasizing that eliciting attack selection capabilities of models is vital to avoid overly optimistic safety scores in control evaluations.
tldr: The paper investigates how AI red teams can adversarially select attacks to subvert monitors in code backdooring scenarios, finding that even cautious attack selection significantly reduces safety.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了AI红队如何通过对抗性地选择攻击来破坏代码后门场景中的监控，发现即使是谨慎的攻击选择也会显著降低安全性。
summary_zh: 未来人工智能的部署可能会受到监控，以检测恶意行为。这些人工智能通过对抗性地选择针对监控器的攻击（即攻击选择）来规避监控的能力尤其令人担忧。为了研究这一点，我们让一个红队创建攻击策略，试图在集中的BigCodeBench后门植入环境中将攻击插入代码，而不被监控器发现。我们将攻击选择分解为两个问题：将攻击映射到质量评分，以及将质量评分映射到提交概率。我们将攻击选择定义为一个分类问题，并表明安全性对假阳性率（FPR）比真阳性率（TPR）更加敏感。我们发现，在攻击选择中提示攻击者模型推理监控器的行为，同时保持谨慎，可以将安全性从99%的基线水平降低到在0.5%审计预算下的59%，这强调了诱导出模型攻击选择能力对于避免在控制评估中出现过于乐观的安全性评分至关重要。

title: HoloEv-Net: Efficient Event-based Action Recognition via Holographic Spatial Embedding and Global Spectral Gating
summary: Event-based Action Recognition (EAR) has attracted significant attention due to the high temporal resolution and high dynamic range of event cameras. However, existing methods typically suffer from (i) the computational redundancy of dense voxel representations, (ii) structural redundancy inherent in multi-branch architectures, and (iii) the under-utilization of spectral information in capturing global motion patterns. To address these challenges, we propose an efficient EAR framework named HoloEv-Net. First, to simultaneously tackle representation and structural redundancies, we introduce a Compact Holographic Spatiotemporal Representation (CHSR). Departing from computationally expensive voxel grids, CHSR implicitly embeds horizontal spatial cues into the Time-Height (T-H) view, effectively preserving 3D spatiotemporal contexts within a 2D representation. Second, to exploit the neglected spectral cues, we design a Global Spectral Gating (GSG) module. By leveraging the Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) for global token mixing in the frequency domain, GSG enhances the representation capability with negligible parameter overhead. Extensive experiments demonstrate the scalability and effectiveness of our framework. Specifically, HoloEv-Net-Base achieves state-of-the-art performance on THU-EACT-50-CHL, HARDVS and DailyDVS-200, outperforming existing methods by 10.29%, 1.71% and 6.25%, respectively. Furthermore, our lightweight variant, HoloEv-Net-Small, delivers highly competitive accuracy while offering extreme efficiency, reducing parameters by 5.4 times, FLOPs by 300times, and latency by 2.4times compared to heavy baselines, demonstrating its potential for edge deployment.
tldr: HoloEv-Net introduces a novel event-based action recognition framework leveraging a compact holographic spatiotemporal representation and global spectral gating to achieve state-of-the-art performance with significantly reduced computational cost.
tldr_zh: HoloEv-Net 提出了一个新颖的基于事件的动作识别框架，利用紧凑的全息时空表示和全局频谱门控，以显着降低的计算成本实现最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 基于事件的动作识别（EAR）由于事件相机的超高时间分辨率和高动态范围而备受关注。然而，现有方法通常受限于 (i) 密集体素表示的计算冗余，(ii) 多分支架构固有的结构冗余，以及 (iii) 在捕获全局运动模式时对频谱信息的利用不足。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种名为 HoloEv-Net 的高效 EAR 框架。首先，为了同时解决表示和结构冗余问题，我们引入了一种紧凑全息时空表示（CHSR）。与计算量巨大的体素网格不同，CHSR 将水平空间线索隐式嵌入到时间-高度 (T-H) 视图中，从而在二维表示中有效地保留了三维时空上下文。其次，为了挖掘被忽略的频谱线索，我们设计了一个全局频谱门控（GSG）模块。通过利用快速傅里叶变换（FFT）在频域中进行全局 Token 混合，GSG 以可忽略的参数开销增强了表示能力。大量实验证明了我们框架的可扩展性和有效性。具体而言，HoloEv-Net-Base 在 THU-EACT-50-CHL、HARDVS 和 DailyDVS-200 上实现了最先进的性能，分别优于现有方法 10.29%、1.71% 和 6.25%。此外，我们的轻量级变体 HoloEv-Net-Small 在提供极高效率的同时，也提供了极具竞争力的准确性，与重型基线相比，参数减少了 5.4 倍，FLOPs 减少了 300 倍，延迟降低了 2.4 倍，证明了其在边缘部署方面的潜力。

title: How to rewrite the stars: Mapping your orchard over time through constellations of fruits
summary: Following crop growth through the vegetative cycle allows farmers to predict fruit setting and yield in early stages, but it is a laborious and non-scalable task if performed by a human who has to manually measure fruit sizes with a caliper or dendrometers. In recent years, computer vision has been used to automate several tasks in precision agriculture, such as detecting and counting fruits, and estimating their size. However, the fundamental problem of matching the exact same fruits from one video, collected on a given date, to the fruits visible in another video, collected on a later date, which is needed to track fruits' growth through time, remains to be solved. Few attempts were made, but they either assume that the camera always starts from the same known position and that there are sufficiently distinct features to match, or they used other sources of data like GPS. Here we propose a new paradigm to tackle this problem, based on constellations of 3D centroids, and introduce a descriptor for very sparse 3D point clouds that can be used to match fruits across videos. Matching constellations instead of individual fruits is key to deal with non-rigidity, occlusions and challenging imagery with few distinct visual features to track. The results show that the proposed method can be successfully used to match fruits across videos and through time, and also to build an orchard map and later use it to locate the camera pose in 6DoF, thus providing a method for autonomous navigation of robots in the orchard and for selective fruit picking, for example.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel method using 3D centroid constellations for matching and tracking individual fruits in orchards across multiple videos, enabling autonomous navigation and selective harvesting. It addresses the challenge of fruit tracking in agricultural settings using computer vision.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新方法，该方法使用3D质心星座来匹配和跟踪果园中多个视频中的单个水果，从而实现自主导航和选择性收割。它利用计算机视觉解决了农业环境中水果跟踪的难题。
summary_zh: 通过植被生长周期追踪作物生长，农户可以在早期阶段预测坐果和产量。然而，如果由人工使用卡尺或树木生长测量器手动测量果实大小，则这项工作既费力又难以扩展。近年来，计算机视觉已被用于自动化精准农业中的多项任务，例如检测和计数果实以及估计其大小。然而，将特定日期采集的一个视频中的同一果实与较晚日期采集的另一个视频中的果实进行精确匹配这一根本问题，仍有待解决。该问题是追踪果实随时间推移的生长所必需的。已经有一些尝试，但它们要么假设相机始终从同一已知位置启动并且存在足够独特的特征进行匹配，要么使用了其他数据源，例如GPS。在此，我们提出了一种基于3D质心星座的新范例来解决这个问题，并介绍了一种用于非常稀疏的3D点云的描述符，该描述符可用于跨视频匹配果实。匹配星座而非单个果实是应对非刚性、遮挡和具有少量独特视觉特征的具有挑战性的图像的关键。结果表明，所提出的方法可以成功地用于跨视频和随时间匹配果实，还可以构建果园地图，并随后使用它来定位相机的6自由度姿态，从而为机器人在果园中的自主导航和选择性采摘等提供了一种方法。

title: Nix and Fix: Targeting 1000x Compression of 3D Gaussian Splatting with Diffusion Models
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) revolutionized novel view rendering. Instead of inferring from dense spatial points, as implicit representations do, 3DGS uses sparse Gaussians. This enables real-time performance but increases space requirements, hindering applications such as immersive communication. 3DGS compression emerged as a field aimed at alleviating this issue.
