While impressive progress has been made, at low rates, compression introduces artifacts that degrade visual quality significantly. We introduce NiFi, a method for extreme 3DGS compression through restoration via artifact-aware, diffusion-based one-step distillation. We show that our method achieves state-of-the-art perceptual quality at extremely low rates, down to 0.1 MB, and towards 1000x rate improvement over 3DGS at comparable perceptual performance. The code will be open-sourced upon acceptance.
tldr: This paper introduces NiFi, a diffusion model-based method for extreme compression of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), claiming state-of-the-art perceptual quality at very low bitrates, approaching 1000x compression.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了NiFi，一种基于扩散模型的3D高斯溅射（3DGS）极限压缩方法，声称能在极低比特率下实现最先进的感知质量，接近1000倍的压缩率。
summary_zh: 3D高斯溅射(3DGS)彻底革新了新视角渲染。与隐式表示那样从密集空间点推断不同，3DGS使用稀疏高斯分布。这实现了实时性能，但也增加了空间需求，阻碍了沉浸式通信等应用。3DGS压缩作为一个旨在缓解该问题的领域应运而生。尽管已经取得了令人瞩目的进展，但在低码率下，压缩会引入严重降低视觉质量的伪影。我们提出了NiFi，一种通过伪影感知、基于扩散的单步蒸馏进行恢复，从而实现极端3DGS压缩的方法。我们表明，我们的方法在极低码率（低至0.1 MB）下实现了最先进的感知质量，并且在可比的感知性能下，与3DGS相比，码率提升接近1000倍。代码将在接受后开源。

title: JOintGS: Joint Optimization of Cameras, Bodies and 3D Gaussians for In-the-Wild Monocular Reconstruction
summary: Reconstructing high-fidelity animatable 3D human avatars from monocular RGB videos remains challenging, particularly in unconstrained in-the-wild scenarios where camera parameters and human poses from off-the-shelf methods (e.g., COLMAP, HMR2.0) are often inaccurate. Splatting (3DGS) advances demonstrate impressive rendering quality and real-time performance, they critically depend on precise camera calibration and pose annotations, limiting their applicability in real-world settings. We present JOintGS, a unified framework that jointly optimizes camera extrinsics, human poses, and 3D Gaussian representations from coarse initialization through a synergistic refinement mechanism. Our key insight is that explicit foreground-background disentanglement enables mutual reinforcement: static background Gaussians anchor camera estimation via multi-view consistency; refined cameras improve human body alignment through accurate temporal correspondence; optimized human poses enhance scene reconstruction by removing dynamic artifacts from static constraints. We further introduce a temporal dynamics module to capture fine-grained pose-dependent deformations and a residual color field to model illumination variations. Extensive experiments on NeuMan and EMDB datasets demonstrate that JOintGS achieves superior reconstruction quality, with 2.1~dB PSNR improvement over state-of-the-art methods on NeuMan dataset, while maintaining real-time rendering. Notably, our method shows significantly enhanced robustness to noisy initialization compared to the baseline.Our source code is available at https://github.com/MiliLab/JOintGS.
tldr: The paper presents JOintGS, a framework for jointly optimizing camera parameters, human poses, and 3D Gaussian representations from monocular RGB videos for robust and high-fidelity human avatar reconstruction, particularly in challenging in-the-wild settings.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了JOintGS，一个联合优化相机参数、人体姿态和3D高斯表示的框架，从单目RGB视频中进行稳健和高保真的人体化身重建，尤其是在具有挑战性的野外环境中。
summary_zh: 从单目RGB视频重建高保真可动画3D人体化身仍然具有挑战性，尤其是在非约束的现实场景中，因为使用现成的算法（例如COLMAP、HMR2.0）获得的相机参数和人体姿势通常不够精确。基于Splatting（3DGS）的方法在渲染质量和实时性能方面取得了显著进展，但它们严重依赖于精确的相机标定和姿势标注，限制了其在实际应用中的适用性。我们提出了JOintGS，一个统一的框架，通过协同优化机制从粗糙初始化中联合优化相机外参、人体姿势和3D高斯表示。我们的关键见解是，显式的前景-背景解耦能够实现相互增强：静态背景高斯通过多视图一致性来锚定相机估计；精炼的相机通过精确的时间对应关系来改善人体对齐；优化的姿势通过消除静态约束中的动态伪影来增强场景重建。我们进一步引入了时间动态模块来捕获细粒度的姿势相关形变，并引入残差颜色场来建模光照变化。在NeuMan和EMDB数据集上的大量实验表明，JOintGS实现了卓越的重建质量，在NeuMan数据集上相较于最先进的方法提升了2.1dB的PSNR，同时保持了实时渲染。值得注意的是，与基线方法相比，我们的方法对噪声初始化的鲁棒性显著增强。我们的源代码可在https://github.com/MiliLab/JOintGS获得。

title: EventNeuS: 3D Mesh Reconstruction from a Single Event Camera
summary: Event cameras offer a considerable alternative to RGB cameras in many scenarios. While there are recent works on event-based novel-view synthesis, dense 3D mesh reconstruction remains scarcely explored and existing event-based techniques are severely limited in their 3D reconstruction accuracy. To address this limitation, we present EventNeuS, a self-supervised neural model for learning 3D representations from monocular colour event streams. Our approach, for the first time, combines 3D signed distance function and density field learning with event-based supervision. Furthermore, we introduce spherical harmonics encodings into our model for enhanced handling of view-dependent effects. EventNeuS outperforms existing approaches by a significant margin, achieving 34% lower Chamfer distance and 31% lower mean absolute error on average compared to the best previous method.
tldr: EventNeuS presents a self-supervised neural model for learning dense 3D mesh representations from monocular event streams, combining signed distance functions and density fields with event-based supervision, outperforming existing methods in accuracy.
tldr_zh: EventNeuS提出了一种自监督神经模型，用于从单目事件流中学习密集3D网格表示，结合了有符号距离函数和密度场与基于事件的监督，并且在准确性方面优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 事件相机在许多场景中为RGB相机提供了一种重要的替代方案。虽然最近出现了一些基于事件的新视角合成研究，但密集的3D网格重建仍然鲜有探索，并且现有的基于事件的技术在3D重建精度方面受到严重限制。为了解决这一局限性，我们提出了EventNeuS，一种自监督神经模型，用于从单目彩色事件流中学习3D表示。我们的方法首次将3D有符号距离函数和密度场学习与基于事件的监督相结合。此外，我们将球谐函数编码引入我们的模型，以增强对视角依赖效应的处理。EventNeuS的性能明显优于现有方法，与之前最好的方法相比，平均实现了34%更低的Chamfer距离和31%更低的平均绝对误差。

title: Hand Gesture Recognition from Doppler Radar Signals Using Echo State Networks
summary: Hand gesture recognition (HGR) is a fundamental technology in human computer interaction (HCI).In particular, HGR based on Doppler radar signals is suited for in-vehicle interfaces and robotic systems, necessitating lightweight and computationally efficient recognition techniques. However, conventional deep learning-based methods still suffer from high computational costs. To address this issue, we propose an Echo State Network (ESN) approach for radar-based HGR, using frequency-modulated-continuous-wave (FMCW) radar signals. Raw radar data is first converted into feature maps, such as range-time and Doppler-time maps, which are then fed into one or more recurrent neural network-based reservoirs. The obtained reservoir states are processed by readout classifiers, including ridge regression, support vector machines, and random forests. Comparative experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms existing approaches on an 11-class HGR task using the Soli dataset and surpasses existing deep learning models on a 4-class HGR task using the Dop-NET dataset. The results indicate that parallel processing using multi-reservoir ESNs are effective for recognizing temporal patterns from the multiple different feature maps in the time-space and time-frequency domains. Our ESN approaches achieve high recognition performance with low computational cost in HGR, showing great potential for more advanced HCI technologies, especially in resource-constrained environments.
tldr: This paper proposes an Echo State Network (ESN) approach for hand gesture recognition using Doppler radar signals, achieving high recognition performance with low computational cost compared to deep learning methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种使用回声状态网络（ESN）方法，通过多普勒雷达信号进行手势识别，与深度学习方法相比，实现了高识别性能和低计算成本。
summary_zh: 手势识别 (HGR) 是人机交互 (HCI) 中的一项基础技术。特别是，基于多普勒雷达信号的 HGR 适用于车载界面和机器人系统，因此需要轻量级和计算高效的识别技术。然而，传统的基于深度学习的方法仍然面临着高计算成本。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于基于雷达的 HGR 的回声状态网络 (ESN) 方法，使用频率调制连续波 (FMCW) 雷达信号。原始雷达数据首先被转换为特征图，例如距离-时间和多普勒-时间图，然后将这些特征图输入到一个或多个基于循环神经网络的储层中。获得的储层状态通过读出分类器进行处理，包括岭回归、支持向量机和随机森林。对比实验表明，我们的方法在使用 Soli 数据集进行的 11 类 HGR 任务中优于现有方法，并且在使用 Dop-NET 数据集进行的 4 类 HGR 任务中超越了现有的深度学习模型。结果表明，使用多储层 ESN 进行并行处理对于识别时空域和时频域中多个不同特征图中的时间模式是有效的。我们的 ESN 方法在 HGR 中以低计算成本实现了高识别性能，显示出在更先进的 HCI 技术方面的巨大潜力，尤其是在资源受限的环境中。

title: GenMRP: A Generative Multi-Route Planning Framework for Efficient and Personalized Real-Time Industrial Navigation
summary: Existing industrial-scale navigation applications contend with massive road networks, typically employing two main categories of approaches for route planning. The first relies on precomputed road costs for optimal routing and heuristic algorithms for generating alternatives, while the second, generative methods, has recently gained significant attention. However, the former struggles with personalization and route diversity, while the latter fails to meet the efficiency requirements of large-scale real-time scenarios. To address these limitations, we propose GenMRP, a generative framework for multi-route planning. To ensure generation efficiency, GenMRP first introduces a skeleton-to-capillary approach that dynamically constructs a relevant sub-network significantly smaller than the full road network. Within this sub-network, routes are generated iteratively. The first iteration identifies the optimal route, while the subsequent ones generate alternatives that balance quality and diversity using the newly proposed correctional boosting approach. Each iteration incorporates road features, user historical sequences, and previously generated routes into a Link Cost Model to update road costs, followed by route generation using the Dijkstra algorithm. Extensive experiments show that GenMRP achieves state-of-the-art performance with high efficiency in both offline and online environments. To facilitate further research, we have publicly released the training and evaluation dataset. GenMRP has been fully deployed in a real-world navigation app, demonstrating its effectiveness and benefits.
tldr: The paper introduces GenMRP, a generative framework for efficient and personalized multi-route planning in large-scale industrial navigation, addressing limitations of existing methods through a skeleton-to-capillary approach and correctional boosting.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了GenMRP，一个用于大规模工业导航中高效和个性化多路径规划的生成框架。它通过使用一种骨架到毛细血管的方法和纠正性增强技术，解决了现有方法的局限性。
summary_zh: 现有工业级导航应用需要处理大规模道路网络，通常采用两类主要方法进行路径规划。第一类依赖于预先计算的道路成本进行最优路径规划，并使用启发式算法生成备选路径；第二类是生成式方法，最近受到了极大的关注。然而，前者在个性化和路径多样性方面表现不佳，而后者则无法满足大规模实时场景的效率要求。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了GenMRP，一个用于多路径规划的生成式框架。为了确保生成效率，GenMRP首先引入了一种骨架到毛细血管的方法，该方法动态构建一个比完整道路网络小得多的相关子网络。在这个子网络中，路径被迭代生成。第一次迭代识别出最优路径，随后的迭代使用新提出的修正提升方法生成平衡质量和多样性的备选路径。每次迭代都将道路特征、用户历史序列以及先前生成的路径整合到链接成本模型中，以更新道路成本，然后使用Dijkstra算法生成路径。广泛的实验表明，GenMRP在离线和在线环境中均以高效率实现了最先进的性能。为了促进进一步的研究，我们已经公开发布了训练和评估数据集。GenMRP已在实际导航应用中全面部署，证明了其有效性和优势。

title: Shaping Expressiveness in Robotics: The Role of Design Tools in Crafting Embodied Robot Movements
summary: As robots increasingly become part of shared human spaces, their movements must transcend basic functionality by incorporating expressive qualities to enhance engagement and communication. This paper introduces a movement-centered design pedagogy designed to support engineers in creating expressive robotic arm movements. Through a hands-on interactive workshop informed by interdisciplinary methodologies, participants explored various creative possibilities, generating valuable insights into expressive motion design. The iterative approach proposed integrates analytical frameworks from dance, enabling designers to examine motion through dynamic and embodied dimensions. A custom manual remote controller facilitates interactive, real-time manipulation of the robotic arm, while dedicated animation software supports visualization, detailed motion sequencing, and precise parameter control. Qualitative analysis of this interactive design process reveals that the proposed "toolbox" effectively bridges the gap between human intent and robotic expressiveness resulting in more intuitive and engaging expressive robotic arm movements.
tldr: The paper presents a human-centered design pedagogy and a "toolbox" consisting of a manual controller and animation software to enable engineers to create more expressive robot arm movements, bridging the gap between human intent and robotic execution.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种以人为中心的设计教学法和一个“工具箱”，包括手动控制器和动画软件，使工程师能够创建更具表现力的机械臂运动，从而弥合人类意图和机器人执行之间的差距。
summary_zh: 随着机器人越来越多地融入人类共享空间，它们的运动必须超越基本功能，融入表达性，以增强互动和沟通。本文介绍了一种以运动为中心的设计教学法，旨在支持工程师创造富有表现力的机械臂运动。通过借鉴跨学科方法论的实践互动研讨会，参与者探索了各种创造性可能性，从而获得了关于表现性运动设计的宝贵见解。所提出的迭代方法集成了舞蹈的分析框架，使设计人员能够通过动态和具身维度来检查运动。定制的手动遥控器促进了机械臂的交互式实时操作，而专用动画软件则支持可视化、详细的运动序列以及精确的参数控制。对这种交互式设计过程的定性分析表明，所提出的“工具箱”有效地弥合了人类意图与机器人表达性之间的差距，从而产生了更直观和引人入胜的表现性机械臂运动。

title: SPEAR: An Engineering Case Study of Multi-Agent Coordination for Smart Contract Auditing
summary: We present SPEAR, a multi-agent coordination framework for smart contract auditing that applies established MAS patterns in a realistic security analysis workflow. SPEAR models auditing as a coordinated mission carried out by specialized agents: a Planning Agent prioritizes contracts using risk-aware heuristics, an Execution Agent allocates tasks via the Contract Net protocol, and a Repair Agent autonomously recovers from brittle generated artifacts using a programmatic-first repair policy. Agents maintain local beliefs updated through AGM-compliant revision, coordinate via negotiation and auction protocols, and revise plans as new information becomes available. An empirical study compares the multi-agent design with centralized and pipeline-based alternatives under controlled failure scenarios, focusing on coordination, recovery behavior, and resource use.
tldr: The paper introduces SPEAR, a multi-agent system for smart contract auditing, emphasizing coordination and recovery mechanisms, demonstrating its advantages over centralized and pipeline approaches.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SPEAR，一个用于智能合约审计的多智能体系统，强调协调和恢复机制，并展示了其优于集中式和流水线方法的优势。
summary_zh: 我们提出了SPEAR，一个用于智能合约审计的多智能体协调框架，它将已建立的MAS模式应用于一种现实的安全分析工作流程中。SPEAR将审计建模为由专业智能体执行的协同任务：规划智能体使用风险感知启发式方法对合约进行优先级排序，执行智能体通过合约网协议分配任务，而修复智能体则使用程序优先的修复策略自主地从脆弱的生成工件中恢复。智能体维护通过符合AGM规范的修订更新的本地信念，通过谈判和拍卖协议进行协调，并在获取新信息时修订计划。一项实证研究在受控的失败场景下，将多智能体设计与集中式和流水线式替代方案进行了比较，重点关注协调、恢复行为和资源使用。

title: Digital Twins & ZeroConf AI: Structuring Automated Intelligent Pipelines for Industrial Applications
summary: The increasing complexity of Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS), particularly in the industrial domain, has amplified the challenges associated with the effective integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) techniques. Fragmentation across IoT and IIoT technologies, manifested through diverse communication protocols, data formats and device capabilities, creates a substantial gap between low-level physical layers and high-level intelligent functionalities. Recently, Digital Twin (DT) technology has emerged as a promising solution, offering structured, interoperable and semantically rich digital representations of physical assets. Current approaches are often siloed and tightly coupled, limiting scalability and reuse of AI functionalities. This work proposes a modular and interoperable solution that enables seamless AI pipeline integration into CPS by minimizing configuration and decoupling the roles of DTs and AI components. We introduce the concept of Zero Configuration (ZeroConf) AI pipelines, where DTs orchestrate data management and intelligent augmentation. The approach is demonstrated in a MicroFactory scenario, showing support for concurrent ML models and dynamic data processing, effectively accelerating the deployment of intelligent services in complex industrial settings.
tldr: This paper proposes a Zero Configuration (ZeroConf) AI pipeline integrating Digital Twins with AI for Industrial Cyber-Physical Systems, demonstrated in a MicroFactory setting, aiming to streamline AI deployments in complex industrial environments.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种零配置（ZeroConf）AI流水线，将数字孪生与AI集成用于工业信息物理系统，并在微型工厂环境中进行了演示，旨在简化复杂工业环境中AI的部署。
summary_zh: 网络物理系统(CPS)日趋复杂，尤其是在工业领域，这加剧了人工智能(AI)和机器学习(ML)技术有效集成所面临的挑战。物联网(IoT)和工业物联网(IIoT)技术之间的碎片化，表现为通信协议、数据格式和设备能力的差异，在底层物理层和高层智能功能之间造成了巨大的鸿沟。 近期，数字孪生(DT)技术作为一种有前景的解决方案崭露头角，为物理资产提供了结构化、互操作和语义丰富的数字表示。 当前的方法通常是孤立的和紧密耦合的，限制了人工智能功能的可伸缩性和复用性。 本文提出了一种模块化和可互操作的解决方案，通过最小化配置并解耦数字孪生和人工智能组件的角色，实现人工智能管道与网络物理系统的无缝集成。 我们引入了零配置(ZeroConf)人工智能管道的概念，其中数字孪生负责协调数据管理和智能增强。 该方法在一个微型工厂场景中得到了验证，展示了对并发机器学习模型和动态数据处理的支持，有效地加速了智能服务在复杂工业环境中的部署。

title: Enabling Real-Time Colonoscopic Polyp Segmentation on Commodity CPUs via Ultra-Lightweight Architecture
summary: Early detection of colorectal cancer hinges on real-time, accurate polyp identification and resection. Yet current high-precision segmentation models rely on GPUs, making them impractical to deploy in primary hospitals, mobile endoscopy units, or capsule robots. To bridge this gap, we present the UltraSeg family, operating in an extreme-compression regime (<0.3 M parameters). UltraSeg-108K (0.108 M parameters) is optimized for single-center data, while UltraSeg-130K (0.13 M parameters) generalizes to multi-center, multi-modal images. By jointly optimizing encoder-decoder widths, incorporating constrained dilated convolutions to enlarge receptive fields, and integrating a cross-layer lightweight fusion module, the models achieve 90 FPS on a single CPU core without sacrificing accuracy. Evaluated on seven public datasets, UltraSeg retains >94% of the Dice score of a 31 M-parameter U-Net while utilizing only 0.4% of its parameters, establishing a strong, clinically viable baseline for the extreme-compression domain and offering an immediately deployable solution for resource-constrained settings. This work provides not only a CPU-native solution for colonoscopy but also a reproducible blueprint for broader minimally invasive surgical vision applications. Source code is publicly available to ensure reproducibility and facilitate future benchmarking.
tldr: The paper presents an ultra-lightweight CNN architecture (UltraSeg) for real-time colonoscopic polyp segmentation on CPUs, achieving high accuracy and speed with significantly fewer parameters compared to existing GPU-dependent models.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种超轻量级的CNN架构(UltraSeg)，用于在CPU上进行实时结肠镜息肉分割，与现有的依赖GPU的模型相比，以更少的参数实现了较高的准确性和速度。
summary_zh: 结直肠癌的早期检测依赖于实时、精确的息肉识别和切除。然而，目前的高精度分割模型依赖于GPU，使其在基层医院、移动内窥镜单元或胶囊机器人中的部署不切实际。为了弥合这一差距，我们提出了UltraSeg系列，其在极端压缩条件下运行（<0.3M参数）。UltraSeg-108K（0.108M参数）针对单中心数据进行了优化，而UltraSeg-130K（0.13M参数）推广到多中心、多模态图像。通过联合优化编码器-解码器宽度，结合约束扩张卷积以扩大感受野，并集成跨层轻量级融合模块，该模型在单个CPU核心上实现了90 FPS的速度，且不牺牲精度。在七个公共数据集上的评估表明，UltraSeg仅利用31M参数U-Net的0.4%参数，却保留了其>94%的Dice系数，从而为极端压缩领域建立了一个强大的、临床上可行的基准，并为资源受限环境提供了一个可立即部署的解决方案。这项工作不仅为结肠镜检查提供了一个CPU原生解决方案，还为更广泛的微创外科视觉应用提供了一个可重现的蓝图。源代码已公开发布，以确保可重现性并促进未来的基准测试。

title: Tinker Tales: Supporting Child-AI Collaboration through Co-Creative Storytelling with Educational Scaffolding
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) is increasingly framed as a collaborative partner in creative activities, yet children's interactions with AI have largely been studied in AI-led instructional settings rather than co-creative collaboration. This leaves open questions about how children can meaningfully engage with AI through iterative co-creation. We present Tinker Tales, a tangible storytelling system designed with narrative and social-emotional scaffolding to support child-AI collaboration. The system combines a physical storytelling board, NFC-embedded toys representing story elements (e.g., characters, places, items, and emotions), and a mobile app that mediates child-AI interaction. Children shape and refine stories by placing and moving story elements and interacting with the AI through tangible and voice-based interaction. We conducted an exploratory user study with 10 children to examine how they interacted with Tinker Tales. Our findings show that children treated the AI as an attentive, responsive collaborator, while scaffolding supported coherent narrative refinement without diminishing children's agency.
tldr: The paper presents Tinker Tales, a tangible storytelling system designed to support child-AI co-creative collaboration through narrative and social-emotional scaffolding. A user study suggests children perceived the AI as a responsive collaborator while maintaining their agency.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为Tinker Tales的具象叙事系统，旨在通过叙事和社会情感支架支持儿童与人工智能的协同创作。一项用户研究表明，儿童将人工智能视为反应灵敏的合作者，同时保持了他们的自主性。
summary_zh: 人工智能（AI）越来越多地被定位为创意活动中的协作伙伴，然而，对儿童与AI的互动研究主要集中在AI主导的教学场景中，而非共同创造协作。这留下了一个开放性问题：儿童如何通过迭代的共同创造有意义地参与到与AI的互动中。我们提出了Tinker Tales，一个有形的讲故事系统，它通过叙事和社交情感支架来支持儿童-AI协作。该系统结合了一个物理讲故事板，代表故事元素的NFC嵌入式玩具（例如，角色、地点、物品和情感），以及一个介导儿童-AI互动的移动应用程序。儿童通过放置和移动故事元素，以及通过有形交互和基于语音的交互与AI互动，来塑造和完善故事。我们对10名儿童进行了一项探索性用户研究，以检验他们与Tinker Tales的互动方式。我们的研究结果表明，儿童将AI视为一个专注、响应迅速的合作者，而支架在不减少儿童自主性的前提下，支持了连贯的叙事完善。

title: Toward Accurate and Accessible Markerless Neuronavigation
summary: Neuronavigation is widely used in biomedical research and interventions to guide the precise placement of instruments around the head to support procedures such as transcranial magnetic stimulation. Traditional systems, however, rely on subject-mounted markers that require manual registration, may shift during procedures, and can cause discomfort. We introduce and evaluate markerless approaches that replace expensive hardware and physical markers with low-cost visible and infrared light cameras incorporating stereo and depth sensing combined with algorithmic modeling of the facial geometry. Validation with $50$ human subjects yielded a median tracking discrepancy of only $2.32$ mm and $2.01°$ for the best markerless algorithms compared to a conventional marker-based system, which indicates sufficient accuracy for transcranial magnetic stimulation and a substantial improvement over prior markerless results. The results suggest that integration of the data from the various camera sensors can improve the overall accuracy further. The proposed markerless neuronavigation methods can reduce setup cost and complexity, improve patient comfort, and expand access to neuronavigation in clinical and research settings.
tldr: This paper introduces a markerless neuronavigation system using low-cost cameras and facial geometry modeling, achieving accuracy comparable to traditional marker-based systems and offering improved accessibility and patient comfort. The system achieved a median tracking discrepancy of 2.32 mm and 2.01° in human trials.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种无需标记的神经导航系统，该系统使用低成本相机和面部几何建模，实现了与传统基于标记的系统相当的精度，并提高了可访问性和患者舒适度。 该系统在人体试验中实现了2.32毫米和2.01°的中值跟踪差异。
summary_zh: 神经导航技术广泛应用于生物医学研究和干预中，以引导仪器精确放置于头部周围，从而支持诸如经颅磁刺激等手术。然而，传统的系统依赖于受试者佩戴的标记物，这些标记物需要手动注册，可能在手术过程中发生位移，并可能引起不适。我们介绍并评估了无标记方法，该方法以低成本可见光和红外光相机替代昂贵的硬件设备和物理标记物，这些相机集成了立体视觉和深度感知，并结合了面部几何的算法建模。对50名人类受试者的验证表明，与传统的基于标记的系统相比，最佳无标记算法的中值追踪差异仅为2.32毫米和2.01°，这表明其精度足以用于经颅磁刺激，并显著优于以往的无标记结果。结果表明，整合来自各种相机传感器的数据可以进一步提高整体精度。所提出的无标记神经导航方法可以降低设置成本和复杂度，提高患者舒适度，并扩大神经导航在临床和研究环境中的应用范围。

title: Enhancing IMU-Based Online Handwriting Recognition via Contrastive Learning with Zero Inference Overhead
summary: Online handwriting recognition using inertial measurement units opens up handwriting on paper as input for digital devices. Doing it on edge hardware improves privacy and lowers latency, but entails memory constraints. To address this, we propose Error-enhanced Contrastive Handwriting Recognition (ECHWR), a training framework designed to improve feature representation and recognition accuracy without increasing inference costs. ECHWR utilizes a temporary auxiliary branch that aligns sensor signals with semantic text embeddings during the training phase. This alignment is maintained through a dual contrastive objective: an in-batch contrastive loss for general modality alignment and a novel error-based contrastive loss that distinguishes between correct signals and synthetic hard negatives. The auxiliary branch is discarded after training, which allows the deployed model to keep its original, efficient architecture. Evaluations on the OnHW-Words500 dataset show that ECHWR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, reducing character error rates by up to 7.4% on the writer-independent split and 10.4% on the writer-dependent split. Finally, although our ablation studies indicate that solving specific challenges require specific architectural and objective configurations, error-based contrastive loss shows its effectiveness for handling unseen writing styles.
tldr: The paper introduces Error-enhanced Contrastive Handwriting Recognition (ECHWR), a training framework that improves IMU-based online handwriting recognition accuracy by using contrastive learning with an auxiliary branch during training, which is discarded at inference to maintain efficiency. It achieves significant error reduction on the OnHW-Words500 dataset.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了错误增强对比手写识别 (ECHWR)，这是一种训练框架，通过在训练期间使用对比学习和辅助分支来提高基于 IMU 的在线手写识别准确率，推理时丢弃辅助分支以保持效率。它在 OnHW-Words500 数据集上实现了显著的错误减少。
summary_zh: 基于惯性测量单元的在线手写识别技术为数字设备提供了纸上手写输入的新方式。在边缘硬件上实现该技术可以提高隐私性并降低延迟，但会受到内存约束的限制。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种误差增强对比手写识别（ECHWR）训练框架，旨在提高特征表示和识别准确率，同时不增加推理成本。ECHWR利用一个临时的辅助分支，在训练阶段将传感器信号与语义文本嵌入对齐。这种对齐通过一个双重对比目标来实现：一个用于一般模态对齐的批内对比损失和一个新型的基于误差的对比损失，该损失区分了正确的信号和合成的难负例。辅助分支在训练后被丢弃，这使得部署的模型能够保持其原始、高效的架构。在OnHW-Words500数据集上的评估表明，ECHWR显著优于最先进的基线方法，在书写者无关的数据集上将字符错误率降低了高达7.4%，在书写者相关的数据集上降低了高达10.4%。最后，尽管我们的消融研究表明，解决特定挑战需要特定的架构和目标配置，但基于误差的对比损失显示了其处理未见过的书写风格的有效性。

title: SuperPoint-E: local features for 3D reconstruction via tracking adaptation in endoscopy
summary: In this work, we focus on boosting the feature extraction to improve the performance of Structure-from-Motion (SfM) in endoscopy videos. We present SuperPoint-E, a new local feature extraction method that, using our proposed Tracking Adaptation supervision strategy, significantly improves the quality of feature detection and description in endoscopy. Extensive experimentation on real endoscopy recordings studies our approach's most suitable configuration and evaluates SuperPoint-E feature quality. The comparison with other baselines also shows that our 3D reconstructions are denser and cover more and longer video segments because our detector fires more densely and our features are more likely to survive (i.e. higher detection precision). In addition, our descriptor is more discriminative, making the guided matching step almost redundant. The presented approach brings significant improvements in the 3D reconstructions obtained, via SfM on endoscopy videos, compared to the original SuperPoint and the gold standard SfM COLMAP pipeline.
tldr: The paper introduces SuperPoint-E, a new local feature extraction method with a tracking adaptation supervision strategy, designed to improve Structure-from-Motion (SfM) performance in endoscopy videos, leading to denser and more complete 3D reconstructions.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SuperPoint-E，一种新的局部特征提取方法，采用了跟踪自适应监督策略，旨在提高内窥镜视频中基于运动的结构(SfM)性能，从而获得更密集和完整的3D重建。
summary_zh: 本文致力于提升特征提取，从而提高基于运动结构（SfM）的内窥镜视频三维重建性能。我们提出了一种新的局部特征提取方法SuperPoint-E，并利用我们提出的跟踪自适应监督策略，显著改善了内窥镜图像中的特征检测和描述质量。通过在真实内窥镜视频记录上的大量实验，研究了我们方法的最优配置，并评估了SuperPoint-E的特征质量。与其他基线的比较也表明，我们的三维重建结果更密集，且覆盖了更多更长的视频片段，这是因为我们的检测器触发更密集，并且我们的特征更有可能存活（即更高的检测精度）。此外，我们的描述子更具区分性，使得引导匹配步骤几乎变得冗余。与原始的SuperPoint和金标准SfM COLMAP流程相比，本文提出的方法在通过SfM获得的内窥镜视频三维重建中带来了显著的改进。

title: Causal explanations of outliers in systems with lagged time-dependencies
summary: Root-cause analysis in controlled time dependent systems poses a major challenge in applications. Especially energy systems are difficult to handle as they exhibit instantaneous as well as delayed effects and if equipped with storage, do have a memory. In this paper we adapt the causal root-cause analysis method of Budhathoki et al. [2022] to general time-dependent systems, as it can be regarded as a strictly causal definition of the term "root-cause". Particularly, we discuss two truncation approaches to handle the infinite dependency graphs present in time-dependent systems. While one leaves the causal mechanisms intact, the other approximates the mechanisms at the start nodes. The effectiveness of the different approaches is benchmarked using a challenging data generation process inspired by a problem in factory energy management: the avoidance of peaks in the power consumption. We show that given enough lags our extension is able to localize the root-causes in the feature and time domain. Further the effect of mechanism approximation is discussed.
tldr: This paper adapts a causal root-cause analysis method to time-dependent systems, proposing truncation approaches to handle infinite dependency graphs with application to factory energy management.
tldr_zh: 该论文将因果根本原因分析方法应用于时间依赖系统，提出了截断方法来处理无限依赖图，并应用于工厂能源管理。
summary_zh: 在受控时变系统中进行根本原因分析对应用提出了重大挑战。特别是能源系统难以处理，因为它们既表现出瞬时效应又表现出延迟效应，并且如果配备了储能装置，则具有记忆性。在本文中，我们将Budhathoki等人[2022]提出的因果根本原因分析方法应用于一般的时变系统，因为它可被视为“根本原因”一词的严格因果定义。特别是，我们讨论了两种截断方法来处理时变系统中存在的无限依赖图。其中一种方法保持因果机制完好无损，而另一种则近似起始节点的机制。通过受工厂能源管理问题启发的一个具有挑战性的数据生成过程，对不同方法的有效性进行了基准测试：避免电力消耗峰值。我们表明，给定足够的滞后，我们的扩展能够定位特征和时间域中的根本原因。此外，还讨论了机制近似的影响。

title: Joint Parameter and State-Space Bayesian Optimization: Using Process Expertise to Accelerate Manufacturing Optimization
summary: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a powerful method for optimizing black-box manufacturing processes, but its performance is often limited when dealing with high-dimensional multi-stage systems, where we can observe intermediate outputs. Standard BO models the process as a black box and ignores the intermediate observations and the underlying process structure. Partially Observable Gaussian Process Networks (POGPN) model the process as a Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG). However, using intermediate observations is challenging when the observations are high-dimensional state-space time series. Process-expert knowledge can be used to extract low-dimensional latent features from the high-dimensional state-space data. We propose POGPN-JPSS, a framework that combines POGPN with Joint Parameter and State-Space (JPSS) modeling to use intermediate extracted information. We demonstrate the effectiveness of POGPN-JPSS on a challenging, high-dimensional simulation of a multi-stage bioethanol production process. Our results show that POGPN-JPSS significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods by achieving the desired performance threshold twice as fast and with greater reliability. The fast optimization directly translates to substantial savings in time and resources. This highlights the importance of combining expert knowledge with structured probabilistic models for rapid process maturation.
tldr: The paper proposes POGPN-JPSS, a Bayesian optimization framework that integrates process-expert knowledge with Partially Observable Gaussian Process Networks for accelerating manufacturing optimization in high-dimensional multi-stage systems, demonstrating superior performance in a bioethanol production simulation.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了POGPN-JPSS，一种贝叶斯优化框架，结合了过程专家知识和部分可观测高斯过程网络，以加速高维多阶段系统中的制造优化，并在生物乙醇生产模拟中展示了卓越的性能。
summary_zh: 贝叶斯优化(BO)是一种用于优化黑盒制造流程的强大方法，但当处理可以观察到中间输出的高维多阶段系统时，其性能通常受到限制。标准BO将流程建模为黑盒，忽略了中间观测以及潜在的流程结构。部分可观测高斯过程网络(POGPN) 将流程建模为有向无环图(DAG)。然而，当观测为高维状态空间时间序列时，使用中间观测具有挑战性。流程专家知识可用于从高维状态空间数据中提取低维潜在特征。我们提出了POGPN-JPSS，一个将POGPN与联合参数和状态空间(JPSS)建模相结合的框架，以利用中间提取的信息。我们通过一个具有挑战性的高维多阶段生物乙醇生产流程仿真来证明POGPN-JPSS的有效性。我们的结果表明，POGPN-JPSS显著优于最先进的方法，以两倍的速度和更高的可靠性达到期望的性能阈值。快速优化直接转化为时间和资源的显著节省。这突出了在快速流程成熟中将专家知识与结构化概率模型相结合的重要性。

title: Multi-threaded Recast-Based A* Pathfinding for Scalable Navigation in Dynamic Game Environments
summary: While the A* algorithm remains the industry standard for game pathfinding, its integration into dynamic 3D environments faces trade-offs between computational performance and visual realism. This paper proposes a multi-threaded framework that enhances standard A* through Recast-based mesh generation, Bezier-curve trajectory smoothing, and density analysis for crowd coordination. We evaluate our system across ten incremental phases, from 2D mazes to complex multi-level dynamic worlds. Experimental results demonstrate that the framework maintains 350+ FPS with 1000 simultaneous agents and achieves collision-free crowd navigation through density-aware path coordination.
tldr: This paper introduces a multi-threaded A* pathfinding framework using Recast mesh generation and Bezier curve smoothing for efficient navigation of a large number of agents in dynamic game environments, achieving high frame rates and collision avoidance. It does not involve any of my core interests, though principles could plausibly be extended.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种多线程A*寻路框架，该框架使用Recast网格生成和贝塞尔曲线平滑，可在动态游戏环境中高效导航大量代理，实现高帧速率和避碰。虽然其原理在一定程度上或可扩展，但与我的核心研究兴趣无关。
summary_zh: 虽然A*算法仍然是游戏寻路领域的行业标准，但将其集成到动态3D环境中会面临计算性能和视觉真实感之间的权衡。本文提出了一种多线程框架，该框架通过基于Recast的网格生成、贝塞尔曲线轨迹平滑以及用于人群协调的密度分析来增强标准A*算法。我们在十个递增阶段中评估了我们的系统，从2D迷宫到复杂的多层动态世界。实验结果表明，该框架在1000个并发代理的情况下保持了350+ FPS，并通过密度感知的路径协调实现了无碰撞的人群导航。
